name: MAGA Watch via NDRC
subject: John Bisognano’s statement on the MAGA attempt to manipulate the census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Will you make a donation to help ensure fair representation for all?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111889468/558720304/-3547583?sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0YWMxZWQ1LThlNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkKiEKoH4z7bCfG6-ZBrfESgZFMa6BgPH85ByUlzaRY=&emci=79bfb25f-4066-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=74ac1ed5-8e66-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter — We need to talk about Republicans’ latest effort to undermine the census through two extreme anti-voter bills. The “Equal Representation Act” would add a citizenship question to the census and require the census to exclude residents who are not citizens — something that is overtly unconstitutional. And Rep. Marjorie Taylor-Greene’s “Making American Elections Great Again” bill would be even more extreme. The Trump-backed proposal orders the federal government to immediately conduct a new census — unconstitutionally excluding all non-citizen residents of the United States — in order to redraw the maps before the 2026 midterms. **Here’s why this matters:** | **_"The absurd and blatantly unconstitutional measures being proposed by MAGA Republicans to manipulate the census — which are premised on the decidedly debunked Big Lie — would strip millions of Americans of representation, simply to pursue Trump’s reckless partisan agenda.”_** — John Bisognano
President of the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
---
In 2020, the fair maps movement successfully defeated a similar racist and unconstitutional attempt to add a citizenship question to the census. Now, in the face of an even more brazen attempt to seize illegitimate power, the NDRC is committed to fighting back even harder. As NDRC President John Bisognano lays out, we absolutely must defeat these anti-democracy attacks:
**_"A fair and accurate census — which the Constitution explicitly requires be based on the ‘whole number of persons’ living in our country — is essential to ensure equal representation in Congress and appropriately determine how billions in federal funding should be shared across communities for critical resources like hospitals, roads and schools. Congress must reject this dangerous attempt to disenfranchise Americans, undermine the accuracy of the census, and give Republicans an opportunity to further gerrymander ahead of the 2026 midterms — but if it is passed and signed it will be challenged immediately, on clear and obvious grounds.”_**
---
**We can’t sit by while anti-democracy extremists attack our democracy’s most basic principles. At the NDRC, we’re not just working to defeat attempts to manipulate a fair count in the 2030 Census — we know that the fight for fair maps requires electing Democracy Defenders across the country. And with MAGA extremists ramping up their assault on our rights, we need grassroots support to drive that work forward.**
**[Rush an urgent donation to help defend a fair count, fair maps, and fair representation whenever and wherever they come under attack across the country>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111889469/558720313/-246980373?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MTGera_email_202050721-NDRC-Tier1-MTGera_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050721-NDRC-Tier1-MTGera_&utm_campaign=MTGera&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0YWMxZWQ1LThlNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lkKiEKoH4z7bCfG6-ZBrfESgZFMa6BgPH85ByUlzaRY=)**

name: PA Dems
subject: right from Bresnahan’s campaign site
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
On his campaign website, Rep. Bresnahan promised to _“always fight to protect Social Security & Medicare for future generations.”_

Peter — this is bullshit.

Bresnahan doesn’t care about protecting Medicare. He proved this by voting _YES_ on Trump’s disastrous bill and selling stock to the largest Medicaid provider, right before he first voted to strip healthcare from 21,000+ people in his own district who will lose coverage.

[Let’s show Bresnahan we are sick and tired of his political games. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Last weekend in Philadelphia, Richmond, and Baltimore
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last weekend, we hosted town halls in Philadelphia, Richmond, and
Baltimore.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250721.9H8_OJ&refcode=ema20250721-240228&t=1002&akid=240228%2E444211%2Enn1E8u ]Beto standing at the center of a crowd of supporters in Baltimore.

A woman spoke about how much progress she’s seen in her lifetime—on civil
rights, social rights, and reproductive freedom—and how afraid she is that
it’s all being rolled back.

A recent college graduate talked about the businesses closing in her
hometown. Roads falling apart. Jobs gone. She’s doing everything right,
and still wonders if there’s any future for her or her generation there.

A man told us how he’s spent hours speaking to Senators and
Representatives—doing everything he can to sound the alarm on the current
administration’s attacks on our democracy. And he’s not done. He’s fired
up to keep going.

It’s people showing up for each other, having hard conversations, and
asking the urgent questions: how do we pull ourselves out of the deep
trouble we’re in and replace it with something far better?

We also give people the chance to take action, volunteering for local
groups who are registering and organizing on the ground. It’s an important
step in building the power we need to win.

But none of this happens unless we’re there—in person, face to face,
across party lines and zip codes.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250721.9H8_OJ&refcode=ema20250721-240228&t=1003&akid=240228%2E444211%2Enn1E8u ]If you’re able, please consider donating $3 to Powered
by People today. Every dollar helps us keep this work going—putting gas in
the tank, renting venues, organizing volunteers, and meeting people where
they are.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250721.9H8_OJ&refcode=ema20250721-240228&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240228%2E444211%2Enn1E8u ]DONATE $3

We’re doing the work now—because we can’t afford to sit this one out.

Let’s keep showing up for each other.

— Beto

P.S. We’ll be in Texas for more events in [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65354?utm_source=ema20250721-240228&t=1023&akid=240228%2E444211%2Enn1E8u ]Tarrant County and
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65356?utm_source=ema20250721-240228&t=1024&akid=240228%2E444211%2Enn1E8u ]Abilene, and we’d love for you to join. Sign up to reserve your spot.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=240228%2E444211%2Enn1E8u

name: Kerry McQuisten (Newsletter)
subject: Sad Times & Celebration
body:
| | | | |
# In Memory of Joel Pawloski
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| _Top: Joel with his wife, Susan Pawloski; Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-Deremer; Assistant AG of Civil Rights Harmeet Dhillon; and OCC advisory board member Robyn McClean. Bottom: With Kari Lake and the Constitutional Carry team; Solomon Yue and Sen. Mike Lee; Constitutional Carry with me, Carol Williams, Jean Sampson, and NRA's Willes Lee; and former state rep candidate Sue Leslie at the RNC Convention._
---
**Sad Times**
It's hard to grasp that just a year ago, Solomon and I were sitting at the RNC Convention in Milwaukee listening to our friend Joel Pawloski talk about all of his future plans with his wife Susan. It's even harder to grasp that today he's no longer with us. Joel succumbed to lung cancer at 6:48 p.m. on July 12 after fighting a valiant battle. Joel was a Christian, a Patriot, a devoted family man, and a warrior on many fronts. He was surrounded by loved ones when he passed.
Joel served as the former Chair of the Marion County Republicans. He and his team broke fundraising records for that county. Under his leadership, they were instrumental in fighting off a disastrous new tax in Salem and won 11 of the 13 open seats they targeted. He went on to become the President of the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Marion County where he recruited our biggest chapter. "I LIKE billboards," he once stressed. I'm glad he got to see our first one raised in Tillamook County. I'm also thankful that he, Solomon, Susan and I got to watch our President sign the Big Beautiful Bill together in his hospital room before things turned for the worse.
Joel was a retired Army Lt. Colonel who also hosted the Oregon Leader podcast and created beautiful woodwork as Cascade Craftsman. Two of his handmade Christmas ornaments will be on our tree for decades to come.
I learned after his death that Joel had "mandated" that some of the members of his church look after me, other friends, and family. One of those final wishes was for me to get baptized as we'd discussed but never could quite get scheduled. And so, I will do exactly that.
**Celebration**
Joel wanted nothing more than to flip Oregon red and to protect our nation, and so we continue on toward that goal with optimism.
Solomon and I traveled to Josephine County last month and spoke with the Josephine County Republican Women. During that trip, we had such interest in the Oregon Conservative Caucus that we recruited enough members to form a chapter there! They need to meet SOON and elect their officers. (I know you JoCo members are reading this! Hint, hint!)
Our friend Madison Sheahan was appointed Deputy ICE Director, and began making the media rounds. So that transition has been very interesting to watch.
The Baker County Republican Women have been going gangbusters. BCRW organized the Kids Parade with some help from the Elks so that event wouldn't disappear into history. At Miners Jubilee in Baker City last week, we went viral when a crazy leftist council member decided to harass us on video. BUT, we also registered 10 new Republican voters and saw a steady string of Gen Zers taking pictures with our cardboard standee of President Trump. The party of Trump is COOL now. We also had four different petitions going at once, so that kept all the ladies hopping! Merchandise sold like crazy.
Finally, with Republicans Overseas, Solomon and I are looking forward to our next D.C. trip, which is _still _coming up in September. Hopefully by the next newsletter I'll at least have more info to share about that.
_Below: two of our new Baker County voters!_

clean_body: | | | | | In Memory of Joel Pawloski | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Top: Joel with his wife, Susan Pawloski; Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-Deremer; Assistant AG of Civil Rights Harmeet Dhillon; and OCC advisory board member Robyn McClean. Bottom: With Kari Lake and the Constitutional Carry team; Solomon Yue and Sen. Mike Lee; Constitutional Carry with me, Carol Williams, Jean Sampson, and NRA's Willes Lee; and former state rep candidate Sue Leslie at the RNC Convention. Sad Times It's hard to grasp that just a year ago, Solomon and I were sitting at the RNC Convention in Milwaukee listening to our friend Joel Pawloski talk about all of his future plans with his wife Susan. It's even harder to grasp that today he's no longer with us. Joel succumbed to lung cancer at 6:48 p.m. on July 12 after fighting a valiant battle. Joel was a Christian, a Patriot, a devoted family man, and a warrior on many fronts. He was surrounded by loved ones when he passed. Joel served as the former Chair of the Marion County Republicans. He and his team broke fundraising records for that county. Under his leadership, they were instrumental in fighting off a disastrous new tax in Salem and won 11 of the 13 open seats they targeted. He went on to become the President of the Oregon Conservative Caucus of Marion County where he recruited our biggest chapter. "I LIKE billboards," he once stressed. I'm glad he got to see our first one raised in Tillamook County. I'm also thankful that he, Solomon, Susan and I got to watch our President sign the Big Beautiful Bill together in his hospital room before things turned for the worse. Joel was a retired Army Lt. Colonel who also hosted the Oregon Leader podcast and created beautiful woodwork as Cascade Craftsman. Two of his handmade Christmas ornaments will be on our tree for decades to come. I learned after his death that Joel had "mandated" that some of the members of his church look after me, other friends, and family. One of those final wishes was for me to get baptized as we'd discussed but never could quite get scheduled. And so, I will do exactly that. Celebration Joel wanted nothing more than to flip Oregon red and to protect our nation, and so we continue on toward that goal with optimism. Solomon and I traveled to Josephine County last month and spoke with the Josephine County Republican Women. During that trip, we had such interest in the Oregon Conservative Caucus that we recruited enough members to form a chapter there! They need to meet SOON and elect their officers. (I know you JoCo members are reading this! Hint, hint!) Our friend Madison Sheahan was appointed Deputy ICE Director, and began making the media rounds. So that transition has been very interesting to watch. The Baker County Republican Women have been going gangbusters. BCRW organized the Kids Parade with some help from the Elks so that event wouldn't disappear into history. At Miners Jubilee in Baker City last week, we went viral when a crazy leftist council member decided to harass us on video. BUT, we also registered 10 new Republican voters and saw a steady string of Gen Zers taking pictures with our cardboard standee of President Trump. The party of Trump is COOL now. We also had four different petitions going at once, so that kept all the ladies hopping! Merchandise sold like crazy. Finally, with Republicans Overseas, Solomon and I are looking forward to our next D.C. trip, which is still coming up in September. Hopefully by the next newsletter I'll at least have more info to share about that. Below: two of our new Baker County voters! | | | | | | | | | | | The podcast is picking up listeners and advertisers! You can listen you'd like. name: Josh Weil
subject: This is What Our Mission is For
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
I want to share this moment with you, Friend.
Touring Washington D.C. recently was incredible, but one sight in particular spoke to me:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/33763162564B7A694F754244554F4651524E45322F3372525334394931496B6539756267353176646A6538316B795151384F6C7A4F2F5A2F6B5A43696D646D67/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-21%20at%206.12.33%E2%80%AFPM.png]
I stood there for a while, thinking about the people across Florida who have been left behind, pushed aside, or outright targeted by those in power.
Right now, our state is being used as a testing ground for cruelty. Migrants detained in secret at Alligator Alcatraz. Families priced out of housing. Teachers muzzled. Rights stripped.
Freedom redefined by the few.
Dr. King’s words reminded me why I’m in this race: because we are all tied together. Because we don’t get to sit this one out.
We are building a movement in Florida that says no one gets left behind. Not in the Glades, not in our classrooms, not at the ballot box. I am running for U.S. Senate to bring Florida back to being for the people, by the people.
If you believe in that same vision, I’m asking you to help us keep going. We have a long road ahead, and I can’t do it alone:
Rush $10 HERE to make difference in our mission. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
We’re in this together and together, we fight for justice.

Greg Abbott is hijacking a disaster — and we need your help to stop him.

👉 Chip in now to help stop Abbott’s blatant power grab and defend democracy in Texas >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=072125_4]

subject: 2 million got-aways. 0 accountability.

body:
The border crisis is a NATIONAL SECURITY NIGHTMARE.

[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/P-Y1lSPSxXMfommYckmo5U6v-alJjNain6BEYLqo0qjZ4u16ZXUxUyn0Yxj-BbawuW7y-sgZtMFsviO1rOvJPxYDkoTlPM78deKTcDdmznwtY5OQoC0uv_4-ZfqQoUxrdMAvcfI2c8ql43xwR2up_QCwEc2_JNoEdsuaqxMoHS4WGXatig2TMtnEA0dfqzKl0vVnz0RZ5qlj9u17mUWHkUrNknDF8WHrZO-qeIR6wchSaC-o7z2-3ATwA66JX919yRNFOq0ibFNrN3fDgiy2-HEpbI22rJG4Glt4FyBLl9i52cryUUywmBCORHOMgR6z5BaFXgZ3PeGyGh8WOwAT-z9xu9tX6U1Y3tLwdE8twV7fOdWX4dSbX87iFnQenf8LILykiGAUuBF_z87ZruzCvM_AlbbmguGKFT49eGuxfqjdIGC29tYjlCsAEyoukrhQdwd0aqAzowplbqwl6jPvWNYdrpdo3gFT8lqNgTyJX83eGHVdfh_Nbw83PBcQPY0LbDzSjnQcswyhErwHMsH4v8XUiuczlF6WREyL32C1qyS3l3bAwDnRqMzpEatsW8mgtNvP0cBDpqcV8jd96m8YpwGsmn92umYgu3jruy335iQP84jxMJ3AG9XLsiGxwl3B1-4VWNkQGbzKGNwXa1TCqisf7RxjawoOg6UlPenH70VjJhkO5rLm6YpXpgEcNjCyhF9LSE1VCvOeREU6nUi_pNXCGK_lB7alCjHoWAFsljnsNpLadJrFv8ZlWmmQA6A1GnXeIsM/J3MtoeEf8ni_fOf-wvvoKwdjcYhVauYV/11)

**Peter** ,

I need your full attention.

President Trump's Border Czar, Tom Homan, just sounded the alarm--and what he said is **TERRIFYING**.

[**_“The 2 million got-aways scare the hell out of me.”_**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/fUPI9OnD8ykB0SHrIPDQGqH0vgzIsYoepszk4aiAfohMsKtnNr83MoKJ9_KyDDkZYB1yrttdNoufIN8bW4G8hvUxxjZebfXLZwFgNjebrdVIZf353NMHA2WLHmytcxcQuAUXHUgqs2RtW35G1sWtHoS9JbRyh6Nv3O3GiDpBszmHu-vEctmItZOYf68QmHXPoTJxRX8F_bqog5wiMA6PQI0VdNveO03j-PSGlAjSfCJfrHmO97b6-7GxB4jCp1FdX82ZGBPLFkJb3RpPMbaCemaRZvnM6_LdNLoGH0iXpTU40A8dfHDn6lJERk0ln3zdI0Lw5LoyemGtrEcYBTOMgJuIesHqyn42CXVe-33URBRZghibN5EHHSnZlWuBKUK88hBSohfi_MGnCVOG1dY1lhy53V2XR-oNH75d20T56a_CtRn3X1ZNl0VQaeGESx_9EI64ETLvLfrHnL8__KPbW2rIuvDWrPPf-uq1AQg8MLGtZJ6VJQq6poEDKwCtbkZX29vZke1lZANKtlgPwppDzvwz6I1lsMHPzqB_IpOSLkj3kqowkNLz5KZ3cWqXDnV_v2xaxim4Fs_DH5v2LQiG0mnwSKQVDu7Mj5KCW4IfyvuRFUUrE4QXFitQ6iFkM1bFpvfUrUQSpBuynyGw3J2XK_gzsbLt0BdIq3gf_v5qPcoZ8H4uXbPw2VYmxr1OxWykzFLK8XjzMg8rAQkgx6s6gt5Ls8saptVmhfqyywaHRQs-J7w_LbYbBQehCri04-P9I-1mRQM/gnIDe-_1aLSdQx2SxXfGho2ci5pr-DPi/11)

That's**2 MILLION** illegal immigrants inside the U.S.
**No vetting.**
**No ID.

**
No clue who they are... or what they're planning.

**Let me be blunt:

**
[**This isn’t just a border crisis. name: The Voter Protection Project
subject: RE: Jim Clyburn’s birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
I know there is one gift in particular Congressman Clyburn would like.
| Today is Congressman Jim Clyburn’s birthday, and I know there’s one gift in particular he would appreciate today: [A contribution from you to help Democrats win back the House majority.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92356?t=6&akid=20688%2E878179%2EAzJAWC) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92356?t=7&akid=20688%2E878179%2EAzJAWC) As Democrats, we work tirelessly to ensure every voice is heard at the decision-making table. We can’t think of many people who have done more to further those values than Congressman Clyburn.

Jim often says that we need to make America’s greatness accessible and affordable to all, and he has dedicated much of his life to doing just that. As a leading figure in our country’s Civil Rights Movement, Jim blazed a path for justice and equality for all.

As former House Majority Whip and Assistant Democratic Leader, Jim has been an indispensable advocate for voting rights, affordable health care, broadband expansion, and gun safety.

He’s continuing that work today -- fighting to protect our communities from the daily assaults from the Trump administration, offering ways we can all push back against the GOP’s reckless actions, and traveling around the country to elect Democrats nationwide.

[We want to wish Congressman Clyburn a happy birthday and thank him for all he does for our country. One of the best ways we can do that is by helping Democrats win this year and in the midterms. Will you split a contribution between the Congressman and the Voter Protection Project before his birthday is over?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92356?t=8&akid=20688%2E878179%2EAzJAWC) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jim Clyburn and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92357?t=9&akid=20688%2E878179%2EAzJAWC)

_The Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20688%2E878179%2EAzJAWC). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20688%2E878179%2EAzJAWC).**

We can’t think of many people who have done more to further those values than Congressman Clyburn. Jim often says that we need to make America’s greatness accessible and affordable to all, and he has dedicated much of his life to doing just that. As a leading figure in our country’s Civil Rights Movement, Jim blazed a path for justice and equality for all. As former House Majority Whip and Assistant Democratic Leader, Jim has been an indispensable advocate for voting rights, affordable health care, broadband expansion, and gun safety. Hey folks,
This one's a must-listen. I sat down with my longtime friend Jane Kleeb to dig into what's going on inside the Democratic Party, the unfolding Epstein file drama, and how we can actually win back rural voters.
Jane brings unmatched insight--from leading the Nebraska Democratic Party to organizing in rural America--and this conversation is full of hard truths and sharp strategy.
If you care about Democrats winning the midterms (and beyond), hit play.
**If you 're tired of the same old hand-wringing and want to be part of the solution, become a paid subscriber. Your support powers this work and helps grow a smarter, tougher movement.**

With urgency,

--Mike

She is the Chair of the Nebraska Democratic Party. body:
Cook Political Report moves NC-Sen from Lean Republican → TOSS UP
#

There are TWO Republican-held seats that Democrats MUST flip in order to restore our majority in the U.S. Senate next year. **North Carolina and Maine.** **[If you’re ready to help us flip these seats, please consider chipping in now. Otherwise, please keep reading to learn more about both of these battleground races.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92541?refcode=em20250721-9153&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9153%2E614464%2EtAiHHJ)** **[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92541?refcode=em20250721-9153&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9153%2E614464%2EtAiHHJ)**
---

As recently as Monday, rescuers were still trying to find an estimated 101 people. But by Saturday, the official count of people missing had been lowered to three.

“This remarkable progress reflects countless hours of coordinated search and rescue operations, careful investigative work, and an unwavering commitment to bringing clarity and hope to families during an unimaginably difficult time,” City Manager **Dalton Rice** said.

Still, officials said that local, state, national and international search teams are continuing to conduct recovery operations.

Kerr County Sheriff **Larry Leitha** said during a commissioners court meeting Monday that the search for missing people could take up to six months, but setting a time estimate is also difficult.

“How long is it going to take? I mean, who knows?” Leitha said.

Abbott said Monday most of those still considered missing were people who did not check into hotels or campsites. Abbott said many of those people were added to the list of people who haven’t been located after friends and family reported them missing.

“Those who are missing on this list, most of them, were more difficult to identify because there was no record of them logging in anywhere,” Abbott said.

Kerr County Judge **Rob Kelly** , the county’s top official, said during a county commissioners court meeting earlier Monday that local officials don’t know the exact number of how many visitors who traveled to the Guadalupe for the holiday weekend had been caught in the flood.

“We don’t know how many of them there are,” Kelly said. “Don’t be discouraged when you hear that number, we’re doing the very best we can, but it is an unknown at this point.”

On Saturday, Kelly said he was grateful for the rescuers who have worked tirelessly over the past two weeks.

"To every member of law enforcement, fire and rescue, emergency management, and supporting agencies — thank you,” Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly said. “Your dedication, professionalism, and compassion have brought comfort and answers to so many."

Wake clear. | TOP NEWS “Number missing from Hill Country floods down to 3,” Texas Tribune's Ayden Runnels — “More than two weeks after catastrophic July Fourth floods along the Guadalupe River in Kerr County, authorities reported Saturday that nearly all of the people who had remained on the list of missing persons have been verified as safe. As recently as Monday, rescuers were still trying to find an estimated 101 people. But by Saturday, the official count of people missing had been lowered to three. » The officials did not give an update to the total number of people who died because of the floods. On Thursday, Gov. Greg Abbott said the statewide death toll was 135. In a press release, the city of Kerrville wrote that many of the people missing had been located "through extensive follow-up work among state and local agencies." » “This remarkable progress reflects countless hours of coordinated search and rescue operations, careful investigative work, and an unwavering commitment to bringing clarity and hope to families during an unimaginably difficult time,” City Manager Dalton Rice said. Still, officials said that local, state, national and international search teams are continuing to conduct recovery operations. Kerr County Sheriff Larry Leitha said during a commissioners court meeting Monday that the search for missing people could take up to six months, but setting a time estimate is also difficult. “How long is it going to take? I mean, who knows?” Leitha said. Abbott said Monday most of those still considered missing were people who did not check into hotels or campsites. Abbott said many of those people were added to the list of people who haven’t been located after friends and family reported them missing. “Those who are missing on this list, most of them, were more difficult to identify because there was no record of them logging in anywhere,” Abbott said. Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly , the county’s top official, said during a county commissioners court meeting earlier Monday that local officials don’t know the exact number of how many visitors who traveled to the Guadalupe for the holiday weekend had been caught in the flood. “We don’t know how many of them there are,” Kelly said. “Don’t be discouraged when you hear that number, we’re doing the very best we can, but it is an unknown at this point.” On Saturday, Kelly said he was grateful for the rescuers who have worked tirelessly over the past two weeks. "To every member of law enforcement, fire and rescue, emergency management, and supporting agencies — thank you,” Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly said. “Your dedication, professionalism, and compassion have brought comfort and answers to so many." Recovery teams have been thoroughly scouring large for any people who were swept into the Guadalupe after it swelled in the pre-dawn hours July 4 following heavy rain. Those efforts were been hindered further by continued rain and flooding in areas already impacted by the initial floods, across the Hill Country." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. body:

| | | | | We just dropped a wildly [**packed new episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bc9b681031&e=567664f14c) — and trust us, this one hits every note: politics, media shakeups, pop culture gossip, and some hilarious animal cam footage you won’t believe.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=27e2e2d582&e=567664f14c)
| **🎬 Stephen Colbert FIRED — But It’s Not Why You Think**

We kick things off with the headline everyone’s talking about: CBS firing Stephen Colbert. Some politicians are blaming it on his liberal politics — but Mark blows up that narrative with hard facts:
---
|
* The show’s massive financial losses.

* How traditional TV is collapsing under the weight of high-dollar, low-return shows.

* Why streaming and YouTube are the real game changers.

---
| Mark and Krysty even tease behind-the-scenes details on their own upcoming network show — and how they’re planning to do it the smart, sustainable way.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a91209c761&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🕵️♀️ Tulsi Gabbard’s Russia Collusion Bombshell**

Tulsi just dropped a stunner: Could the entire Russia collusion case against Trump have been fabricated? We break down:
---
|
* What we know.

* Why this story is rattling D.C.

* And, why the “get Trump at all costs” obsession could be doing permanent damage to American politics.

---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=77db4f830f&e=567664f14c)
---
| **🎤 Coldplay Jumbotron Affair Drama (With Ava’s Hot Take)**

A couple caught on the Jumbotron at a Coldplay concert just got exposed for having an affair — and it’s gone viral. Ava jumps in to give us the real lesson on how this could’ve been avoided (teenage wisdom for the win).
**🎸 Steve Miller Band Cancels Tour — For the Craziest Reason Ever**

Mark and Krysty break down the hilarious, unbelievable reason the Steve Miller Band just canceled their latest tour. Prepare to laugh out loud.

**🐻 Sunday Game Day: Game Cam Chaos in Angel Fire**

Our Sunday Game Day segment features a furry visitor who literally tries to destroy one of our trail cameras. Mark declares: This means war. (You’re gonna want to see this footage.)
**🎶 Krysty’s Streaming Pick: A Must-See Songwriter Documentary**

Krysty wraps the show with a streaming recommendation on one of America’s most talented (and underrated) songwriters. Perfect for your weekend watch list!

Some politicians are blaming it on his liberal politics — but Mark blows up that narrative with hard facts: | The show’s massive financial losses. How traditional TV is collapsing under the weight of high-dollar, low-return shows. Ava jumps in to give us the real lesson on how this could’ve been avoided (teenage wisdom for the win). 🎸 Steve Miller Band Cancels Tour — For the Craziest Reason Ever Mark and Krysty break down the hilarious, unbelievable reason the Steve Miller Band just canceled their latest tour. # [A 12 year old takes on Kristi Noem](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=168911962&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4OTExOTYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxNDkxNTUsImV4cCI6MTc1NTc0MTE1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.T56CmdJOsfyA1y6pCgiJMhjL85Z3TnZlZQWUtE9mX5o)
### What my son learned from summer camp
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Jul 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=168911962&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4OTExOTYyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzE0OTE1NSwiZXhwIjoxNzU1NzQxMTU1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3t2lqk85ENyFdqI1mFLnaK3xs-EZDZWULRL9FrCMlv0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=168911962&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4OTExOTYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxNDkxNTUsImV4cCI6MTc1NTc0MTE1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.T56CmdJOsfyA1y6pCgiJMhjL85Z3TnZlZQWUtE9mX5o&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=168911962&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4OTExOTYyLCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxNDkxNTUsImV4cCI6MTc1NTc0MTE1NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.T56CmdJOsfyA1y6pCgiJMhjL85Z3TnZlZQWUtE9mX5o)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbHVjYXNrdW5jZS9wL2EtMTIteWVhci1vbGQtdGFrZXMtb24ta3Jpc3RpLW5vZW0_._XgmmODpYPeZaUAa9ddGr2oD6sib3cLak8GlTKfuxJA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/a-12-year-old-takes-on-kristi-noem?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My son doesn't know who Kristi Noem is, but when he came home from summer camp and learned from the news about Camp Mystic, the Secretary of Homeland Security's failed response to the Texas Flooding, and her plans to gut FEMA to give billions to the rich, he felt like he had to say something.
If you don't know, he has his own substack, [The Political View from Middle School](https://substack.com/redirect/42e38452-17fe-4b10-aa70-1fddc5b8e11a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where he lets us adults know what the kids are talking about.
His latest, on how what happened at Camp Mystic impacted them, and his disbelief that grown-ups would cut funding to keep future kids safe, is below.
If you'd like to support him, give him a follow! All links below are his. If you'd like to learn more, his initial substack: "[Why Are They Attacking Us Kids?](https://substack.com/redirect/e8185660-f67a-495f-aaf6-c03def2e9427?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" explains that he is doing the substack because he feels like the people in charge don't seem to care about the impact their decisions have on kids, and that kids deserve to be heard, too, especially since in the long run they will live with the decisions made today longer than any of us will.
And now, here he is!
Lucas
* * *
It pains me to see people getting hurt, especially other kids like me that didn't get a chance at a long life. So that's why I decided to write this Substack.
Kids are this world's future and I don't like it when somebody who has a chance to change the world doesn't get any chance to. So you see, after I came back from sleep away camp this summer, I learned something terrible about another sleep away camp, just like the one I went to.
_[The Political View from Middle School is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts about what us kids think about political events, please become a free or paid subscriber.]_
[ Subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/48e00c3e-4d45-421e-ba7a-cf5810a86fa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The other one, Camp Mystic, had been flooded, and multiple kids had died. Kids of all ages had gone to this camp to have fun, but it had turned into a disaster. But why? I was confused. How had so many kids died? The flash floods were fast, sure, but it still takes multiple hours to get so bad. Surely there were warning systems and the camp would have had time to evacuate and had other people to help them. And surely there was help to search and rescue afterward and to clean up.
It turns out that those things do exist, but that they are underfunded in a lot of the country. Then I found out that the Trump administration and the lady in charge of managing our country's emergency responses were actually working to CUT Federal Emergency Management Agency funding, so there will be less help for cleanup, search and rescue, and people in the future.
And this news left me dumbfounded. Why are we cutting budgets for things that are keeping people (and kids) safe? Kids are our future!
So I asked a couple of my friends what they thought about the budget cut, and just like me, they said that it was a pretty stupid idea, and that they agreed with me. But the part that I'm really confused about is where this money that should be for ensuring people's safety is going, and I've got a suspicion that it's going to somewhere that it doesn't need to go and to some people that already have more money than they could ever need. Just like when they wanted to cut the Department of Education (which I wrote about in [Why Are They Attacking Us Kids?](https://substack.com/redirect/e8185660-f67a-495f-aaf6-c03def2e9427?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)).
I don't understand if the people in charge are just stupid and don't understand what they are doing, or are just greedier than anyone I have ever met face to face in my life. Because this money was going to somewhere useful and now it's probably just going somewhere where it won't do any good at all, at least not for most of us.
So I really hope that nobody else is affected by this decision, and I'm sad some people already have been.
So thank you for reading this Substack, and I hope you are able to stay safe on your own.
Thank you for reading-- And please share with your friends and family and everyone else if you'd like to help me keep getting the word out about how political decisions affect us kids and what we think about them.
Grady
_[The Political View from Middle School is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts about what us kids think about political events, please become a free or paid subscriber.]_

| | | | | I’m really excited to have my good friend and colleague from the House Judiciary Committee, Chairman Jim Jordan, out to headline our Paint it Red dinner on Sunday, August 17th. RSVP today by clicking [here](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=43a2294407&e=5a45b9550e). Attendees can participate at the following levels - we have something for everyone!Date: Sunday, August 17th
Time: Early Evening
Location: Downtown Spokane, WA (venue details will be shared closer to event date)[**Roundtable with Rep. Jim Jordan**](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=b2b30a6feb&e=5a45b9550e)**4:00pm - $3,500/individual or $5,000/PAC**(includes roundtable, photo, VIP reception & dinner)

Jim Jordan**](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=430d34251c&e=5a45b9550e)**at 4:30pm - $1,000/individual or PAC**(includes photo, VIP reception & dinner)[**VIP Reception with Rep. Jim Jordan**](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=77e026527a&e=5a45b9550e)**at 6:00pm - $75/person or $600 for a table of 8** I know Chairman Jordan will share with you some of our priorities on the Judiciary Committee: progress made on immigration reform, border security and the overall Republican legislative agenda, as well as oversight of the federal courts and efforts to flush politicized prosecutions out of the Department of Justice. It’s going to be a memorable evening and seats are limited, [so please RSVP as soon as possible to secure your spot. ](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=97e15d616c&e=5a45b9550e)If you would like to host a table of 8 for the dinner, or have any additional questions, please contact Anitra directly:Email: Anitra@VoteBaumgartner.com

name: Warner Mendenhall, Freedom Counsel
subject: No Jab, No Job
body:
At Berkshire Health System (BHS) in Massachusetts, 70 workers were separated from their positions after declining the COVID shot.

|

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9gcrmkv5f6gehgtrb1peiv7d2gehj9mdco7m5h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chjm1ob1cph2bs)
Friend,

During the pandemic, healthcare workers were celebrated as heroes.

However, when they stood up for their personal health freedom, **thousands** faced firing despite filing religious and medical exemption requests.

At Berkshire Health System (BHS) in Massachusetts, 70 workers were separated from their positions after declining the COVID shot. Some are still seeking legal remedy through the courts for religious and medical discrimination.

My name is Warner Mendenhall with Freedom Counsel. Our organization supports lawyers and their clients seeking legal recourse for violations of their constitutional rights. We collaborate with attorneys, medical professionals, scientists, and concerned citizens, addressing these challenges that many Americans face.

This case represents one of many important legal actions establishing significant legal precedents to protect health freedom in the future, which is why your support is vital today.

[Can you chip in $10, $35, or even $100 today to help support the Freedom Counsel network bringing in our lawsuits against COVID tyranny?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1gv011sls6rt7u9s2r73l9j6flrk1d29vcm3f8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chjm1ob1cph2bs)
[Donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrng19uc1t7copbd5jp1k21ps1hv6s99q9c3690o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chjm1ob1cph2bs)
These healthcare professionals dedicated **years** of service to their communities and decades to patient care.

Many of the BHS workers experienced severe financial consequences, including lost homes, health insurance, and financial stability. One was dismissed after experiencing adverse effects from initial vaccination. All were denied unemployment benefits when BHS classified their separations as "deliberate misconduct" and violations of "uniformly enforced policy."

The BHS firings occurred when breakthrough infections among vaccinated individuals were also being documented.

Freedom Counsel provides resources and support to help qualified attorneys bring cases like this to trial effectively. [If you believe in protecting religious liberty, medical autonomy, and constitutional rights, please consider making your most generous contribution today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9mnnoiqurmtfo41eh5038o6a6ca5u07qiuqq97o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chjm1ob1cph2bs)

# **[Pope Leo XIV marks moon landing anniversary with call to U.S. astronaut Buzz Aldrin](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Pope Leo XIV speaks by video call with Apollo 11 astronaut Buzz Aldrin, and his wife Anca Faur, from Castel Gandolfo, Italy, on July 20, 2025. / Credit: Holy See Press Office Rome Newsroom, Jul 21, 2025 / 06:30 am (CNA). Pope Leo XIV marked the 56th anniversary of the Apollo 11 moon landing with a video call to U.S. astronaut Buzz Aldrin and a visit to the Vatican Observatory, located on the papal estate of Castel Gandolfo, where he has been staying for two weeks.According to the Vatican, the pontiff’s July 20 call with the 95-year-old Buzz Aldrin, the last surviving Apollo 11 crew member, included reminiscing on the historic 1969 landing and meditating together on the “mystery, greatness, and fragility” of God’s creation as described in Psalm 8.

The One Big Beautiful Bill Act, recently signed into law by President Donald Trump, allows millions of babies born in the U.S. to receive a $1,000 “Trump Account.” These accounts, which are created by the government for those under 18 years old, are designed to help young people start investing early. “This will afford a [...]...Click to read more Anewly-declassified appendix to a years-old Justice Department watchdog report shows that then-FBI Director James Comey was swayed to preemptively announce the end of the bureau’s investigation into Hillary Clinton based on mysterious classified intelligence reports — and that the FBI failed to investigate thumbdrives containing potentially key information about use of an illicit private email [...]...Click to read more Trump was elected by the majority of American voters (meaning he's a pretty popular guy), but I guess the wokies haven't heard about that, so they want to cancel this Airbnb host for the sin of hanging a generic political sign: Pope Leo XIV speaks by video call with Apollo 11 astronaut Buzz Aldrin, and his wife Anca Faur, from Castel Gandolfo, Italy, on July 20, 2025. / Credit: Holy See Press Office Rome Newsroom, Jul 21, 2025 / 06:30 am (CNA). Pope Leo XIV marked the 56th anniversary of the Apollo 11 moon landing with a video call to U.S. astronaut Buzz Aldrin and a visit to the Vatican Observatory, located on the papal estate of Castel Gandolfo, where he has been staying for two weeks.According to the Vatican, the pontiff’s July 20 call with the 95-year-old Buzz Aldrin, the last surviving Apollo 11 crew member, included reminiscing on the historic 1969 landing and meditating together on the “mystery, greatness, and fragility” of God’s creation as described in Psalm 8. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: American Foreign Policy – Now on DVD
body:
How these questions are answered has a major impact not only on the strength and reputation of America abroad

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1k8tgg2aeoec52lrvl63m6hhoakknps2gj2tq50_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chge4o36cth2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq26kponnaiknjudjj91qrb5qgkntf5segr8uoao_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chge4o36cth2bs) Hi Friend,

Who determines America's foreign policy? What are the purposes and limits of American's actions abroad? And, what responsibility does America have for people in other nations?

How these questions are answered has a major impact not only on the strength and reputation of America abroad, but also on the lives and property of millions of American citizens.

[That's why we've produced our free online course, "American Foreign Policy," now available on DVD!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb0uegfmoqpmp95k5g8pjkk0ajb25611srt83dc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chge4o36cth2bs)

In this nine-lecture course, Michael Anton, lecturer in politics at Hillsdale College and member of the National Security Council under President Trump, examines people and events that have shaped America's foreign relations.

You'll discover the principles that guided the foreign policy decisions of the Founders and you'll explore how those principles were followed or ignored throughout American history, including: America's westward expansion, the Progressive Era, the two World Wars, the Cold War, the Global War on Terrorism, and today.

**Right now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/foreign-policy-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsufi6i4l5v4funimue5moqb03tqb61jike5aat0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chge4o36cth2bs)

And when you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty.

**We need your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. **

**So, please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using this secure link: **

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/foreign-policy-dvd**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2vndteu2bsjde1j684opp2mlmhsjo5ru7u6b070_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chge4o36cth2bs)

I hope you'll join us to discover what has motivated America's foreign policy decisions--both past and present--and to learn how best to direct it.

And remember, supplies are limited, so be sure to reserve your copy today.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: American Action News
subject: Trump’s Plan May Undo 1933’s Biggest Financial Injustice
body:
Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.

| |
---
---
|
---
# Trump’s Reset Can Give Birth To
# America’s Greatest Era Yet
# A 90-Year cycle may end soon, creating real wealth for early adopters
In 1933, Executive Order 6102 forced everyday Americans to hand over their gold at a fixed rate. Everyday citizens lost a sizable amount of their hard earned wealth at the stroke of FDR’s pen. Now, 92 years later, [President Trump has focused his energy on making things right.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze6ch9d6i2hrbsd2e6rrvoqjcanrdnc60ikee5b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6chgeaor4cth2bs) His next move has the power to trigger a financial reset that could shift trillions of dollars into the hands of the people. A provision buried in the U.S. Code Title 31, Section 5117 allows the U.S. Treasury to revalue America’s gold reserves from an outdated $42 per ounce to today’s market price. That’s a 72x increase!
---
If activated, it could
* **Reinforce America’s financial dominance**
* Reignite trust in value-backed money, making the dollar valuable again
* **Spark a modern day gold rush once the public understand their choices**

---
And the best part... Over 60 Million Americans are eligible to become a first wave benefactor in Trump’s Gold Reset. However, only those who download a copy of our 2025 Wealth Protection Guide will know the simple steps needed to take part in this historic wealth reset. Gov. Brian Kemp is making quiet moves to hand the GOP a Senate seat on a silver platter.
According to new reports, he’s planning a secret visit to the White House to coordinate with Trump’s inner circle — and their goal is clear:
Flip Georgia red.

Georgia has been one of the only things standing between Trump and total dominance. It’s a crucial swing state — and Republicans know that if they flip it, their path to a permanent Senate majority becomes a whole lot easier.

body:
Oregon's Cram Fire has scorched nearly 96,000 acres near Madras, making it the [largest wildfire in the U.S. so far this year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdKBlbZ9D4SIN3aVNidZmzTky-GR8h-7vI5L8QbonjTSjN5_X6UoxxW35oJVtDXna-NgT18plyoWXvO0rLxRiYcdcEtPy4AkBdQumRZxmiuk1qWa2gRlZNmx7o2Vv3i5yaG6Wg5FAblDSGXSgOWgfaL5IoOCBXBPt2QYGsQeQWnVOK6WNBxkG6d0QhAKeY82l-8pxqzcO6ZWfXDqf1ybZW633Xch3gaPA8TiObnP-tDhzgeOJAsfH3v7Rr1brC63t6dUWvxH2gxywKXa-HzGluF-MULCsFNPPTv3XOU-L3wEAAP__bdx5Iw) and putting it on the brink of "megafire" status.

# Tuesday, July 22, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 2003, Uday and Qusay Hussein, sons of former Iraqi President Saddam Hussein, [were killed by U.S. forces](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb8Gd1jwgGVcUKwUudttU1oYHp6XYBgBu9b8fZRp8gFpr3SPjs7Pj-3DU6ZyfPoT3Uh1K3j1jGNg22rDo5Z-4uETNdwRW0Z_fOEGAgwXlgNs0VN-bnqKLiECqgmdtEZJe3tTy3R3iwrGSi3CzUTcF9BaW7tEucgkrZJhIveXJiyAFEIZPe9Ga2ODUGlRYV8S0wIjjdrmX5XKuGPKz_qNbQ71nLK7j_HoTL0zWBms13XNPs0nZQbrJ16dwfreBoWM_Af1R_bPfwuDVarbDQyDNVSfaVAt_Dfl3Hn3Mfqz815L51R4ImwB-fFV-O7HeJ2n5uLjopypv1mmxXF6yi-t8V8tvx38CQAA___lRoem) during a raid in Mosul. Their deaths were seen as a critical psychological blow to loyalist resistance during the Iraq War. Monday marked a joyful return for our editor-in-chief, David, after major surgery. Your prayers, notes, and good vibes helped him heal, and we're delighted to share this news with our 2.7-million-strong _Flyover_ family. Thank you! Bon voyage! Today in _Travel Tuesday_ , we report on Royal Caribbean's _Star of the Seas, _the largest cruise ship ever built. 🛳️ **Are you into cruises?** Reply to this email and tell us about your favorite trip--or the one that made you swear off the sea. Check out the investment opportunity from today's sponsor, [Med-X.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGupCAQRb8GdxqkRGTBYpJO73q2syQgpTIBMYh2999P7Hl5P_C2955U3Zw_D_0wPvh1_m0iqjIlveJzD1gKZp0yzmndI85m8hktYg5o5gM1o4zXVNSMaWd8eOuucmpCZAgVqlZwaMXQg6wWhTDIfhilRTsxYSU3CE7Q1oLsrRl45dV1jQrGWkqBd43lXcfFSGGSMFo5kY6i8yXl5m_ya1lwCu90Ym7GFKugllK2ncAvwu6E3f164l6aiO5V59eFXDncjxL1no48IoEbRuMDYf0VRnT-iARum_Gu3kwuK-Z98dtXP5q4GT-vH-K7bAdaAwf938FpstGt6EHyng2sq7Jy29OH4PdekI7O17_P3PIjx6di_wIAAP__XtGQJg)

## Oregon Wildfire Nears Megafire Status
Oregon’s Cram Fire has scorched nearly 96,000 acres near Madras, making it the [largest wildfire in the U.S. so far this year](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdKBlbZ9D4SIN3aVNidZmzTky-GR8h-7vI5L8QbonjTSjN5_X6UoxxW35oJVtDXna-NgT18plyoWXvO0rLxRiYcdcEtPy4AkBdQumRZxmiuk1qWa2gRlZNmx7o2Vv3i5yaG6Wg5FAblDSGXSgOWgfaL5IoOCBXBPt2QYGsQeQWnVOK6WNBxkG6d0QhAKeY82l-8pxqzcO6ZWfXDqf1ybZW633Xch3gaPA8TiObnP-tDhzgeOJAsfH3v7Rr1brC63t6dUWvxH2gxywKXa-HzGluF-MULCsFNPPTv3XOU-L3wEAAP__bdx5Iw) and putting it on the brink of “megafire” status. Fueled by dry, windy conditions, the blaze has destroyed [multiple homes and forced evacuations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFq9CAUBeCnMTuD0SROFi7m5yeLwnRTaOkqOPEmuYPRoM7IvH1x-gjdfgcu95yvy3TRaNGt73oHlRY_OcjRQkoQJh9g9S7usOoFA1wBggW93mHijHeUScr5ZDTa59RWRi0AHEQFqpGdaOSpF0O1qW7QAze9mUXXatkz0zMhT9owwWA2jaxQlWtMct4wJrq2vnZt28mZiWUQ83VYSMvAYPKhvnl0aYPFPv0DQj37vbJqS-mIRJwJHwkfc871Hl3JCB_B0XssCjptEAgfkz9i8gGhcNqAzkHvtNSjGKnzmRa0OqwQE81ozW_mXu50Qu8IH3Wg53Pzxr4_b0SMfkZDxP9_ZUfI8QPCUQVljozWYuwladm6a7Svj9OfZn4o_hMAAP__Ka-Skw) in Jefferson and Wasco counties. Crews have reached 49% containment. Meanwhile, the eastern U.S. and Midwest are facing [severe thunderstorms and flash flooding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd6wwmPVzQbFRZCnFS5Mi6SxsBpsIGwvuLtq_j5xfeO25d0aj8_tz-rQhhmP9aXcY8mk6UEsEEfKUMtZ0lB2r9SFjBnKEXZ-YpJCai55LOTkb4nvqGmc8IKEamLbXqu0_7mpoNjMAAt5pvQzDvdd-FrqFHOa7tR9SyL4J5moTvZStEEp3t1l3ne4XofyglnnwrBNwgVK-_U3hoA0-vtML-bakvYlmIzoLUw8mRybHWuttL8d1Y3LEwZ_lorC0ITM5UjoLpRxw4WfhR8q0wRbie3AVhbi3C3jBCxn8et0L9zElx2nLsHTlbOaPR_vjz6O2TI1pCY6p798ui6jlF_LZZOPOGmIM5d6zTqy7DfH_XvqS5JeR_wIAAP__4LKS7Q) threatening millions from Missouri to Maine. Heavy rain is dumping up to 4 inches per hour in parts of the Ohio Valley, while tornado warnings and damaging wind alerts stretch from Kentucky to New England. A dangerous heat dome is gripping the central U.S., with heat indices expected to hit 115°F in cities like Chicago later this week.
## $1,000 Baby Accounts Now in Effect
Millions of U.S. babies born this year through 2028 are [now eligible for $1,000 investment accounts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAUAL9GOxwEPLSgSGN3aVM6D3zoyyDcAJ65v89cfiH9zs7Oft2XO1CguH3Cgab6tES8SsBaMS8p45ZiOXADTxktYg4I24mL4GJgXDMhlhUovBbVrsYjCpQtml4PstfjTU7tblYUvXZKutX3EzittJJSO-CTGEc_jS2Zt41rIXrO5aA6Oyg1aMeln6Szk28Ux5Vqyt13olh39OGVnpg7l442mL3WR2nkRyPmRszXdXU-_dizUMRS3kwj5kcKVMmVRsx7upiljVmEs5I_A7MUAtvoiYXBgZkcRGbBEhbmKUJ0BIHtCCsrFXJl_qxnxjab9XFRCFRuulF8O4DCX1L918enEb8BAAD__4r3ilw) under the "One Big Beautiful Bill" Act. Known as Trump Accounts, the money must be invested in low-cost stock index funds and can't be touched until the child turns 18. Families and employers can [contribute up to $5,000 annually](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV2N21MB8mLiheky6vndICc7GZYLAAB2X3o8wWpj_66ej_9Vge2gcft__6QFVdWiK2ErBWzEvKuKVYDty08xkNYg6otwsXSqgAIoHSxWof3gvvrXKIFFmPapSCjfI2sbnflWGC2tlSYm4WVyb5ypkRRo7GWsEn23v10YikdCSECT4YwbmQK2FuZquZXccJWl9THr6Tj3VHF97phXlY09EHtdd6lo796-i9o_fW2uDjC0tNJ1qvP6OO3mu-jhP0uqYr1gIuZXh6W6D5ECA5hxmuYkdCCPgILiNCQbRwpIhvaLuu0BCeMTUoCZzOMI5Scn6b-qzs-WF8mWTHyXZoH36v1T_1fCn6EwAA__9w-os9), with the goal of promoting long-term wealth building. Supporters call it a generational investment in financial literacy, while critics question its cost.
## List: Most Stolen Car in Every State
In 2024, over [850,000 vehicles were stolen across the U.S.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQAL8GOiOzNse5cJGG7tKmRAusYSODkb0Hur-PLr_w-tGMNH9e4ws58rH-xp28hDQedJdIIpTHlGlNR9lpxcCZJqIcCdc3jaChU7pXAOOCHD-jrRcfiIBMTb7tO9P2z4dx9eYd9h24eTLOaAgL0Lw421rnHtPTTAg1-69N9wCt1qazzdRZ2_WzNsGZeXKhspoWlpSbv4kP2SjET7ooN3Pa6-g3kbNU5lcFQwXDfd_NxeWNccaTBSMX-YIVDDueJy1KNlJ7KqKKpEiHmjErPhRdlD_qrYoqgkIVDHX2y3lzjFwefWX1uiPH_1H50anLw78AAAD__5TCfnQ), with the Hyundai Elantra topping the list as the most stolen car in 20 states, according to new data. The surge was largely caused by a lack of electronic engine immobilizers in models from 2011 to 2021. Viral social media videos exposed how easily these cars could be hotwired, fueling a wave of thefts. Full-size pickups like the Chevrolet Silverado 1500 and Ford F-150 were also frequent targets, particularly in rural and border states, driven by high demand for parts and interchangeable components. See the [most stolen vehicle in your state here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQAL8GOiOzNse5cJGG7tKmRAusYSODkb0Hur-PLr_w-tGMNH9e4ws58rH-xp28hDQedJdIIpTHlGlNR9lpxcCZJqIcCdc3jaChU7pXAOOCHD-jrRcfiIBMTb7tO9P2z4dx9eYd9h24eTLOaAgL0Lw421rnHtPTTAg1-69N9wCt1qazzdRZ2_WzNsGZeXKhspoWlpSbv4kP2SjET7ooN3Pa6-g3kbNU5lcFQwXDfd_NxeWNccaTBSMX-YIVDDueJy1KNlJ7KqKKpEiHmjErPhRdlD_qrYoqgkIVDHX2y3lzjFwefWX1uiPH_1H50anLw78AAAD__5TCfnQ).

Heavy rain is dumping up to 4 inches per hour in parts of the Ohio Valley, while tornado warnings and damaging wind alerts stretch from Kentucky to New England. Known as Trump Accounts, the money must be invested in low-cost stock index funds and can't be touched until the child turns 18. Families and employers can , with the goal of promoting long-term wealth building. Supporters call it a generational investment in financial literacy, while critics question its cost. List: Most Stolen Car in Every State In 2024, over , with the Hyundai Elantra topping the list as the most stolen car in 20 states, according to new data. The surge was largely caused by a lack of electronic engine immobilizers in models from 2011 to 2021. Viral social media videos exposed how easily these cars could be hotwired, fueling a wave of thefts. Full-size pickups like the Chevrolet Silverado 1500 and Ford F-150 were also frequent targets, particularly in rural and border states, driven by high demand for parts and interchangeable components. body:
We’re halfway through 2025. How can the GOP improve?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._imhNeez8vSdHnV5-ShQ)Peter,
As we begin a new era with the One Big Beautiful Bill passed and a Republican-led Trifecta in Washington, we want to hear directly from you, one of our strongest conservative voices.
Your input is critical to shaping our agenda and ensuring we stay laser-focused on the issues that matter most to patriotic Americans like you.
We're counting on your input to determine the Republican Party's **TOP PRIORITY** for the second half of 2025. Please take a moment to share your thoughts by taking our brief survey.
_**You can choose from the following (9) options:**_
* Immigration & Border Enforcement
* Tax Cuts & Fiscal Policy
* Energy & Environmental Regulation
* National Security & Defense Spending
* Election Integrity
* Parental Rights & Transgender Policy
* Second Amendment Protections
* Free Speech & Censorship
* Other (please explain)

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-OU8160WMjRMN_GNg)Your voice matters, and your response will help guide our leadership to ensure we're fighting for the values and priorities that define the conservative movement.
Take the survey now and tell us your top priority for this term.
Thank you for helping us fight for the principles that matter most.
– Team Downing| |

## Special Session Begins
State lawmakers [convened in Austin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQhZ8Gd1gw_sEuKG7jLrfd0sIw2CMRYwGKk7dfOZti--2OZqSj831ft_lmKNC-_jd31OXp47zjmQOWgmnOB1oyIWPOFPcFV9qzD2b1MwjouFAcYHaGwmtuK6cX4UZZoZaqa-QAUgzVphU0tpd28aOCrrHNMLQjtNJg36PomqEifZUJBSClkG1fK9kvVrUDynG0xnrWCnRUYqrLhgWfJvvwig9MtY33KuitlCOz5h-DicF0nme9L9b583ozmC4eBtMRAxWyVwxxR56LSfzX8V3MPaVcuDUhoOMffP7h5z8CeEJHuSSyhfaV-xCju0LZLIOpGUYhlGIwVUm746QQKPeKtWK9GwrvyeVvoh8avgMAAP__R_uUdg) yesterday for a 30-day special session to address issues ranging from flood relief to congressional redistricting. The state also released an updated revenue estimate showing billions of tax dollars are available to spend. House [Democrats said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssuMZgDwyVomxpu3VEfFxsJGIiQ0Ly9pX7Cl3PkX7D_-eqryamuC2f5oaqvkLWG7aSsFbcdbmjiyYVLCXmzeIStxKSWYIGCuOJyhOA9iamt-adV5b6mXWomBwHNgGjU7cq6owfxcgmAYwKcHzywsmRCxssDjPtojowKgEYo4yLXjJhneQTsnl2xgXCKfpY897XFSu-TAnpnZ-49y7fuqTWWu-FDB8ELgQurbX-nR_1YfH4j8VUt5Lh8iTDuZ3z1yiHx7ct3a78vcWUYhGScLrcTEx_ZP1fiKeC3wAAAP__re5xiA) "all options" are on the table—including breaking quorum—to block a redistricting plan that could add up to five GOP seats. Later, House Speaker Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) [announced the membership](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAYhJ9GOxzgUKSgSGN3aVM6iD_6T1Ac-HPevX3Ga_IAaXdnv9ndr_t4dxhxXz7dBpaeIY07nCUCEeSxHODRxQKlYNonWHAvIboljJLLlnHNpBxnh_E1qnq2E5-NqMEK3d5ELwXv69UarcF3XnScm9vsDAflW6NUMH0vWhdqtBeMaymF4EJ1jRbd5LXqQRjjnQ-V4jAjpdzQCgRPV0J8pQfkxqetjnYlOkp1-6jkUMnhPM_m--n2y6zkcK2p5PCOsSNFJPR_wpp-CrAUWIYjQ4GdHOEDCisQwVNhGWYslNET7gvzaduQCIBtsE2QL1Cd7XycGCOWTleKL5vD-G5G__vzYeVvAAAA__904432) of the committee that will tackle the issue. In the Senate, Democrats [released a statement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3u4yAQBPCnwV0idsF8FBTXuMu1V1oEFgeJ2JHZS5y3P_le4V_OjPQr5s9tvsXa6rr8jk8KfJRtXunTGzHTPvcXpRpbp97rtt5pqWsvLS5lRonjRdoL4pxjbd9ZDzncZfYwUAA7KnAI0g2PoLz1rtjsC7gRIro0jqCS0slqZz0NNZyYtIgAErS5WjD3cyTwPsVUhJaUK2_7lR_EdMRe2nd7035N23No4cH86kL9EjgJnI6zFTjx0WmNTJnO1Dny3y5wAq-tMk4ZD6M3Whn0wx7y61Nbq91YoeXyjLX9t_lnj7wD_gsAAP__jMpyIQ) accusing Republicans of aiming to "entrench GOP power by silencing the voices of communities of color." Resolution author State Sen. Phil King (R-Weatherford) insisted race would not be a factor in the new maps. Meanwhile, Acting Comptroller Kelly Hancock released an [updated revenue estimate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbFu4zAQRL-G6tYgaZkUCxXXqMu1VworaikRWYkGuXbivz8kSHH99YOHeTN_3uY3zJzP7TceNMpnKvNJH41JhOrc7hQzcqPWcjkX2vLZEuOWZqvtDbQHa-cVM7_mvlvHRa_BdDQaf7uawRo9dPvo0uLM4k2ikK7kyaF3ISxu9eivA4Uuj18w7a01RpveXbxxS_T9QCaEiDGpXtOapdSL7CT0iS3xqzypXmI5Oh53kXtT11_KTspOsRx3qYWZ6uU7fNnKU9kJl_IQZaeD1owQ6RSqyk5ftspOPxUMYJR8bvAPBd6J-QU7nrHEd6jEhI0aVHrS-SCgJvlAIUilQsq1CURkphV-doOSYAiyA9OWG6M8KoHxNzu4_jYE7W1Xx_X-kZlzc171ejsw87ed_N8nz9H-DQAA__9mp6Pj) indicating lawmakers could have more than $16 billion to spend for the impending two-year budget cycle, including some $13 billion Congress recently allocated to reimburse the state for border security expenditures.
## Paxton Investigating Flood Relief Scammers
Attorney General Ken Paxton has initiated an [investigation into scams](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGOpDAMhp8GuowST0igoLiGbq-9EpnEMJYyZJRYw_L2J3ZP9wJbfrb0SZ_-Px_zB3LiffuNTxrlc83zTkdNJEJlri8KjKlSrZz3hTbe65pwW2fQ0CntFcAckdM52zaOi46DaWk0vrubHozu28foOk2dB1yDC7bv0FhtelicR3TOB93yeMm0BzBGG-tu3rgleNuTGYaAYW2spsiSy00eJPSJdU1nflO5hfxs0_gQedXm_quBqYHpOI7bsSJezwYmLMIhUQPT1dXAVAXlwi-R-nf8hjXlHP8TiuSy06k22qlgUry_qQpvKLxvKjywsJyqBnxWFQljOr8NlxB6r5yG3pIfFFmnlb1HUr0brArewOKHKzG2ZYyvg1Pi6nxj9fZETl9d8rM13iP8DQAA__9Sp55U) targeting flood relief donations in Central Texas. Scammers impersonating the Center Point Volunteer Fire Department [tricked several donors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAQxvGnwR0RTByDCxfXuNtrr7TGMDijJRCZSZy8_Sn7Clt_0l8_ff--li_kzGX7izea5JXqUuhomURoX9qdAmNu1BrXstLGpaWMW1rAwEUbpwGWiJzfS9_FaTVxtB1N1l3O1oM1vrtOF7Dk0zj4tTejOwfnnR_sheKI_oyD6Xj6xIwDsNbYfjg5O6zB9Z7sOAYMSfWGIkvdT3IloRe2lN_1Sfsp1FuXp6vIvanzHwWzgvk4jtP3Kq_PqGD-tBXMximYrVcw46a_qeg7vqQWjaXURwnUNJcnNeENhWvRXKTqtOMjPjIV0eGKO8tbt4C3pjEJ7fqHolOuNXLZFMzdPsX7wTlzG5zqzXZDzj9I-d21zwn-BwAA__81NY7r) into sending them money. One man lost $10,000 trying to buy tickets to George Strait’s sold-out benefit concert this weekend in Boerne. "_That’s a lot of money, but I was concerned that someone stole money from people who were suffering in our state_ ," [said the unidentified victim](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAYBOCnwQ4DvyhYUNzGbm97SoPwoyQoBth19-1P3Fc43SSTfJPMz2N-mBDDsf43O-r69mk-8CoRa8U8lxNtMLFgKSEdC67hKD6a1c_AoKdMUoDZmRA_s2icXpgbeYOay77jCjhTzabV4gUb3OC5dOitGlWvlgGUkZ31ZnFN0DfGJADnjIuhlXxYrBQK-ThaYz0RDF2oKbd1w4pvU3z8pBfm1qa9iXqr9Syk-0dgIjBd19XaLafjbglM9hnrMyOByeQabLzTiimvSEvNJlT6JamPKTlarNkpMCl70fH23M4ma3deIcZQBkkEW3cT4ne4_u2ul4bfAAAA___ENIAn). "_It is sick and disgusting that people would use the tragedy of the devastating floods to enrich themselves by deceiving well-meaning people trying to help_ ," [Paxton said in a statement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO2zAMBeDT2JsMibGjePDQJdvftaNBS5RDVJYMiYmT2xdJ2xP8G4cPxHvv19f8hRw5rT9xo0meIc-JjhpJhMpcd3KMsVKtnNNCK6caIq5hBg2D0lYBzB45vua-9dOi_WhamowdTuYCRl_a2-RhGAEIzGCDs6fBuEU7My5w8cNiB9Py9H6mLYAx2vTnzprz4mx_ITOODl1oek2eJZdObiT0xBriKz-odC5vbZxuInttTj8auDZwPY6j-yAUySXRa6VEBWO35kcD13e7Bq6FImGl9_nfqX9Q_aakdnxKTgpTyvfkqCpOD6rCKwrnpELBu79HSqLcDQvLS_G2U6k5_QXV4VYVBqHSlsnvB8fI9WybXq8bcvxEl-8N_pjgTwAAAP__rWWb6g). "_I will use the full weight of my office to investigate these claims and hold bad actors responsible_."
## Dig World Coming to Grapevine Mills
Dig World, a construction-themed adventure park backed by _Shark Tank_ entrepreneur Robert Herjavec, will [open in Grapevine Mills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0M2OozAQBOCnMTdH2BAcDhxyQVqtZq97RI1poDX-YdydMHn7VeYV9lollT7V34_pAyhQ2v5AxEG-1zwlPDmgCJaJD_QEgZGZcppxo8RrgG2dbG2vunba2mkBCq-prZZhrpfeVDgYd23MzZr6Vu1DY8Cs2De97ealc50Hb10_e0BwrXFNRcN7rHbWGlObtrs4083etTc0fe_Br6qtcSHJ5SI7Cn4Dr-GVn1guPscqDLvIwaq5KzsqO57neYmc3p2yIyb9YGXHmBO-lB05Qgjzgykhv_NPWlgvhZ6oC0LQPieW8vBCOWn8etARMYkG0bITa9kxoj6gfGqfI6VNS9YpF9n1D0zZEYq-382v31f3VZVhOU4Kgbhzqq23CBR-0PJ_Vz8H-y8AAP__uUWWlg) next year. It will join other popular attractions like the immersive art installation Meow Wolf and Legoland Discovery Center. Established in Katy in 2022, the park allows children to [operate full-sized construction equipment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuO5CAUheHV2BklwA_sgGASZz3phNY1XPBV87CALnfN6kc1W-j86NPR_-dj_wAKlPxviKjbt8t7wrsGbA3LXi80BKFirZTTgZ5SdQG82yWXE-OKSblboPDax97qg9tV9KiFmgaxSMGX_tTz4cykBgXCAio-D3ZBOR3rfKxS4jL3pN8YV1IKwcU4P5SYD6PGBcW6GjCuGzlaark82okNv6G68MpPLA-TYx_02dpVu-FXJ7dObvd9P2wED38p4XvRyS2SKfnKtXVy8wUufFJCFimEyr4ukyMlzyx5ducSLPPYKjtyro25kiOrJ5RP1iB9MkiW2S-L7MLi0LzBvmh73RQC1Vl1I_cRKPy_1n4W9KnlvwAAAP__RouOCg) that has been modified to ensure safety. The Grapevine Mills location is partnering with Frisco-based Dude Perfect to feature construction-inspired trick-shot attractions. Co-founder Jacob Robinson was [inspired to create the family-friendly attraction](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu5CAQBNDT4MwW9GcMExBs4uxvuqGFoW23hMGC_uOZ26-8V9j8qUpVf77nb0-J8vbbH-j4vZY549USMmOd24mBfGrYGpW84Ea5rclv6wwSHr00PcAcPaXPrLvoFhmfqkOnzONLWVDSdrszfrUWAnpvrF3iqEcrw4hgpH1oo3VH7g6TBkApqfQ4GDUuwWiL6vkMPqxCS4zEpQ68I-PbtzV9ygvrEMrRJbczn018_RIwCZjWUvkqlfch_CT-qXj484YCpnuZgAkzY2VP-cDMAqZIW3-VmmK_VX_iizL2B6V02666eF6UErXRCC23w1P618v_99bLwd8AAAD__z97gLw) by his son’s fascination with construction equipment. He secured funding to expand it after appearing on the popular _Shark Tank_ TV show earlier this year.

clean_body: A morning newsletter focused entirely on news from the state of Texas. If it’s important news inside TX state lines, we cover it. | | | | | | Tuesday, July 22, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1947, , one of the founding members of the Eagles, was born in Gilmer. In 2008, Rolling Stone magazine ranked Henley as the 87th greatest singer of all time. A new attraction that was featured on Shark Tank is coming to North Texas. Get in today's Roundup section. Protect your identity and personal information while you are online with today's sponsor, . Abilene 🌥️ 97/75° | Amarillo ☀️ 96/70° | Austin ☁️ 96/76° | Brownsville 🌥️ 95/79° | Corpus Christi ☁️ 93/79° | DFW 🌤️ 98/75° | El Paso 🌩️ 97/76° | Houston 🌤️ 95/79° | Laredo ☁️ 104/78° | Lubbock ☀️ 96/73° | Midland 🌦️ 94/74° | San Antonio 🌥️ 98/77° | Tyler ☀️ 94/73° | Waco 🌥️ 95/74° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Special Session Begins State lawmakers yesterday for a 30-day special session to address issues ranging from flood relief to congressional redistricting. The state also released an updated revenue estimate showing billions of tax dollars are available to spend. House "all options" are on the table—including breaking quorum—to block a redistricting plan that could add up to five GOP seats. Later, House Speaker Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) of the committee that will tackle the issue. In the Senate, Democrats accusing Republicans of aiming to "entrench GOP power by silencing the voices of communities of color." Resolution author State Sen. Phil King (R-Weatherford) insisted race would not be a factor in the new maps. Meanwhile, Acting Comptroller Kelly Hancock released an indicating lawmakers could have more than $16 billion to spend for the impending two-year budget cycle, including some $13 billion Congress recently allocated to reimburse the state for border security expenditures. Paxton Investigating Flood Relief Scammers Attorney General Ken Paxton has initiated an targeting flood relief donations in Central Texas. Scammers impersonating the Center Point Volunteer Fire Department into sending them money. One man lost $10,000 trying to buy tickets to George Strait’s sold-out benefit concert this weekend in Boerne. "That’s a lot of money, but I was concerned that someone stole money from people who were suffering in our state ," . "It is sick and disgusting that people would use the tragedy of the devastating floods to enrich themselves by deceiving well-meaning people trying to help ," . "I will use the full weight of my office to investigate these claims and hold bad actors responsible." Dig World Coming to Grapevine Mills Dig World, a construction-themed adventure park backed by Shark Tank entrepreneur Robert Herjavec, will next year. It will join other popular attractions like the immersive art installation Meow Wolf and Legoland Discovery Center. Established in Katy in 2022, the park allows children to that has been modified to ensure safety. The Grapevine Mills location is partnering with Frisco-based Dude Perfect to feature construction-inspired trick-shot attractions. Co-founder Jacob Robinson was by his son’s fascination with construction equipment. He secured funding to expand it after appearing on the popular Shark Tank TV show earlier this year. | Flying together with our sponsor Your personal info is everywhere. Here’s how to erase it. Home addresses, phone numbers, emails, even your family members’ details—all sitting online for anyone who knows where to look. And it doesn’t stop with data brokers. It’s on public records sites, obscure forums, and random people search engines you’ve never heard of. The internet never forgets. With , you can remove your private data from hundreds of sites and keep it from showing up again. () ➤ Port Bolivar: A wildfire sparked by a lightning strike last Friday has burned 160 acres of a remote bird sanctuary. The local volunteer fire department is allowing it to die out naturally as it is not currently threatening any developments. () ➤ McAllen: Dominga “Penny” Ledesma, 53, was sentenced to 18 months in federal prison for her role in a $21 million gambling scheme involving electronic slot machines. () ➤ Alpine: An adult black bear was killed in a vehicle collision earlier this month, marking the tenth such death of the threatened species in the region since 2019. () ➤ Rockwall County: Joshua Pritchett, the former city manager of La Marque in Galveston County, was arrested Saturday on felony charges filed shortly after his resignation earlier this month for arson and evidence tampering. () ➤ San Angelo: St. Margaret’s Parish has received an exemption from Pope Leo XIV to offer the Traditional Latin Mass, which was restricted in 2021 by Pope Francis. The exemption makes the parish one of the few in the world allowed to continue offering the ancient rite. () ➤ The Texas Longhorns stole another five-star recruit from Georgia, flipping the No. 1 running back in the nation away from his commitment to the Bulldogs. () ➤ Houston Astros slugger Isaac Paredes was placed on the 10-day injured list after straining his hamstring during Saturday's game against the Seattle Mariners. The injury has the potential to alter the team's approach to the league's July 31 trade deadline. () ➤ San Antonio Spurs center Victor Wembanyama hosted the Hoops Gambit—a part-basketball, part-chess tournament—in his hometown of Le Chesnay, France. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’ve been through it all. Or so I thought…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The Left’s playbook is to destroy the lives of patriots like us.
The Left’s playbook is to destroy the lives of patriots like us.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1624391/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YveVlIUzJUYkZ4UA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsejFCdFc5Zw/qP2hpZHM9bmNSdlBTbDFXSU1EbHhscw/gaH97FQ/s7tf0f8446c)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Dear Patriot,
---
As I watched the troubling coverage of ICE agents being assaulted on the news the other morning, I felt compelled to write you this letter.
---
What I witnessed was a powerful reminder that the radical Left’s playbook is simple, _but nevertheless _evil_ :_
---
_**Their goal is to utterly DESTROY the lives of patriots like you and me!**_
---
While the brave men and women of ICE carry out the _people’s_ mandate to secure our border and our streets, the Democrats are doxing, attacking, and upending the lives of these honorable officers who are simply doing their jobs.
---
It’s disgusting! But sadly, I know all too well just how far the Left will go to tear down a patriot.
---
I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. _Or so I thought..._
---
**...But now, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in state court.**
---
They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me: _**the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_.**_
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON”**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
[**Please help me reach this life-saving (_truly_!) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1624391/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsejFCdFc5Zw/qP2hpZHM9bmNSdlBTbDFXSU1EbHhscw/gaH97FQ/sfk9a0379ab)
