name: Forward Party
subject: Fund America’s Comeback - And Celebrate Our Birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re raising $30,000 for our 3rd birthday!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=1)
---
| Peter \-- Last week we told you about our exciting birthday bash we’re holding next [Tuesday, 7/29 at 7 PM eastern](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=2). To help build the celebration and keep the momentum going, **we’re raising $30,000 to keep the movement alive** and to help build the tools we need to succeed over the _NEXT 3 years_. We’ve had generous offers of matching funds up to $15,000 so we only need to raise half of our goal to hit it! Double your donation today. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=3 "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!") [Chip In $33 For 3 Years Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_3year?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=4)
---
It’s no secret that the Forward Party is the little fish in a very big pond. The legacy party fundraising machines are juggernauts. But they also do something we don’t and won’t. If you’re on their email lists, you get dozens of fundraising emails per week. That’s just not the Forward way. **We’d rather listen to you** and learn what matters to you than ask for money. But the reality is, being successful with politics takes a ton of money. So, today is one of those days where we have to ask. But we’ll make you this promise - **we’re only going to ask you for money one week out of every month** to make sure that most of our energy is dedicated to solving problems for you.
**To Build This Party We Need Money.**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=5 "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!") [Chip In $33 For 3 Years Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_3year?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=6)
---
Now back to the good stuff...
Next Tuesday join us for our third birthday party! It’ll be the biggest online event we’ve ever hosted. You’ll hear from familiar Forward Party leaders like Andrew Yang and Lindsey Williams Drath, but you’ll also hear from new and growing FWD Leaders from across the country, and we’ve even got a few special guests up our sleeves that we’ll be announcing soon.
**Click the invite below to register!**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=7)
Americans no longer feel the legacy parties represent them. We are all, together, building a party that can do a better job listening to our members and delivering solutions that make the American dream a reality for more of us. It’s time we celebrated our success and looked toward what we need for the future to build an organization that lets good qualified candidates run outside the two-party system.
A donation today helps us get a little closer to that goal.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/forward_turns_3?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=8 "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!") [Chip In $33 For 3 Years Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_3year?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=9)
---
**Not Left. Not Right. Forward.**
Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=10)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=12) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=13) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=14) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_fundraising_email_1_a&n=15) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. It’s time we celebrated our success and looked toward what we need for the future to build an organization that lets good qualified candidates run outside the two-party system. A donation today helps us get a little closer to that goal. "Celebrate Our Birthday Together!" Not Left. Not Right. Forward. Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE PAC DEFENDS PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP REQUIREMENTS
body:
Filing supports requiring proof of citizenship for federal voting forms |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE PAC DEFENDS PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP REQUIREMENTS** (Seattle, WA – July 22, 2025) – Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections PAC (RITE PAC) has [filed an amicus brief](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=19b66cc2ca&e=ea91f782ea) in the U.S. District Court for the Western District of Washington defending the legality of requiring documentary proof of U.S. citizenship in connection with federal voter registration forms.

The brief, submitted alongside the Republican Party of Arizona, defends Executive Order 14248, “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.” It argues that the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) empowers the Election Assistance Commission to request documentation, such as proof of citizenship, determined necessary to verify eligibility of the applicant. The Supreme Court and lower federal courts have already affirmed this authority.

The brief also defends a provision of the Executive Order which directs federal voter registration agencies to assess citizenship status before offering registration forms. RITE PAC argues that this directive is consistent with the NVRA’s purpose of confining voter registration opportunities to U.S. citizens, and reinforces existing federal laws prohibiting non-citizen voting and registration.

“This is not a radical proposal. Only U.S. citizens are allowed to vote in federal elections,” said RITE PAC President Justin Riemer. “Before someone registers to vote, officials should be able to confirm they’re eligible. That’s what the law provides, and our brief defends that.”

RITE PAC will continue fighting for measures designed to prevent non-citizen registration and protect the integrity of the election system. ###
---

There’s no longer any mystery when it comes to what Republicans are trying to do in Texas.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111899827/558772279/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0OWI1YjZhLWYzNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T7g8qvQVc-EM23wOsPoNMeRs_oKTzGoea8y_GIopquA=&emci=23951d74-5266-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=649b5b6a-f366-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)

Peter, this clip will make your jaw drop. When President Trump was asked about Texas’s sudden plans to redraw its congressional map, he let the entire cat out of the bag. [**See it for yourself — and if you can, make a donation to help stop this brazen power grab and expose Republican plans to cheat in the midterm elections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111899828/558772280/1779338036?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TrumpVideo_email_20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideoNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideoNOR_&utm_campaign=TrumpVideo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0OWI1YjZhLWYzNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T7g8qvQVc-EM23wOsPoNMeRs_oKTzGoea8y_GIopquA=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111899829/558772281/1779338036?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TrumpVideo_email_20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideoNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideoNOR_&utm_campaign=TrumpVideo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0OWI1YjZhLWYzNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T7g8qvQVc-EM23wOsPoNMeRs_oKTzGoea8y_GIopquA=)
---
Look, it’s extremely rare for states to voluntarily redraw their electoral maps mid-decade. The _New York Times_ reported last month that the White House was putting pressure on state lawmakers in Texas to *literally* go back to the drawing board and create more Republican House seats. And last week, Gov. Greg Abbott announced that they’d try to push new redistricting at a special legislative session.
In this clip, President Trump admits they want a “simple redrawing where we pick up five seats.”
It gets worse. President Trump went on to hint that this is part of a larger strategy to manipulate maps ahead of next year’s election, adding, “We have a couple [of] other states where we’ll pick up seats also.”
**This is a fight the National Democratic Redistricting Committee was built to win — in fact, fights like this are exactly why we exist.** For our democracy’s sake, we must stop radical gerrymandering from being used as a strategy to win elections.
Let’s call this exactly what it is — **cheating** — and do everything we can, in Texas and across the country, to shut it down. [**The days ahead are all hands on deck. Rush a donation to the NDRC today, and let’s fight like hell to stop this shameless attempt to steal congressional seats.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111899830/558772282/1779338036?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TrumpVideo_email_20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideoNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250722-NDRC-Tier1-TrumpVideoNOR_&utm_campaign=TrumpVideo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY0OWI1YjZhLWYzNjYtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T7g8qvQVc-EM23wOsPoNMeRs_oKTzGoea8y_GIopquA=)
We’ll be in touch as this story continues to develop.
Thank you,
The NDRC Team

disclaimer_text: paid for by Dr. Scott Jensen for Governor
body:
| | [](http://email.mg.drscottjensen.com/c/eJxkj0uOHDEMQ08z3gzUsGT5t_Ay5whkS-5UUJ9BVyW5flCdZXYk8QCS8ksX24d9X7TVVLMbx37JuG6PUftkZMiUB_AsBhJlQpcg2ItKJXHaplYK01nDHAOWxLW4Hw1HLZJDDsYl9p6KxuG9Ypg3I-aWRp6iz0RIyLE8sEYuAT2mnJMf44P99nzo6xzHdf20_bT9MY7Nre3_bLPzlOf7ReDuM2IFHbUDxxGgihcwVg1iFlWnO17Pmy2BNKVMMGkScIkVip8EqRYcEnVaD-7V9OvPsq7LmfIH--cmy_ouvdq3W3_ux_U5ZVlN3WXb1yrXvyHF8yQK0HOvwJgQJM0EPCIP30s2me53o78BAAD__wgqc-0)

Good Morning, Peter

Minnesota used to be a promise: work hard, play fair, and you’ll get a shot at a good life. But that promise is broken.

Crime is rising. Schools are failing **our kids**. Small businesses — the backbone of **family livelihoods **— are being crushed under taxes and mandates. Everywhere I go — cafés, classrooms, clinics — I hear the same question: What happened to our Minnesota?

I’m not running to manage the mess. I’m running to fix it — **for our families, for our future**

| [DONATE NOW](http://email.mg.drscottjensen.com/c/eJwkjzuO3DAMQE9jNQsOJOpfuEiRuUZAiZTXgW0NbO3m-oFnOxJ8D3ikL17lqPJn5TmHHFXtx6A67t14Ls0ZBxFjBdeSAHlqUMiSKYkpIymeG2e0TclsorcmBZeT-pyFs8uFkClqTuKCmFRT0KWSIctRrTNq9DoiGjTOp4fJ3iVrtAkxBl3r5PS-PPi8ah_jrxyXHI_ad7XNn2O8rsn-mvA54fOS-nXKgw7hPm5iwief8Nbgx4PWT1j6t5xHP-9zP2iI2uW6aHn_bl3R0ZgMXHMB56uFTJpAHLMlEc_cVD-Xm00WOYSI0LAhuOQzJN0QQk6mkucmxapz5te_ddvWK8TJ6WWndXvnj_n3PX8cfXw0WjdhNWR_bTR-QpJ2DdFCiSWDM8EAhRbAVe-qLikKNfU94_8AAAD__6bMhwE)
---

---

---
This campaign isn’t about politics as usual. It’s about returning power to the people. Safer streets. Better schools. Real accountability. A government that listens instead of lectures.
****
Minnesotans don’t want chaos or corruption. They want** ****common sense leadership**** ** that puts **families, teachers, cops, farmers, and small business owners back at the table.
******
If you believe it’s time to shake things up, then I need your help.

**Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to help us get Minnesota back?

Together, we can reclaim what’s ours.

— Dr. Scott Jensen
Candidate for Governor

name: General John King
subject: Low on gas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat.

|
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj830ff0h018p4p6iinea10h3iedk624tsvo64ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat.

We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. _**Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense.**_

This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally.

The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. [**For just the small contribution of $3, you can keep our campaign on the road for another 25 miles.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf780uf0a0pgud1huqihpjdk38v4tfsbgclug8gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv9g7jitnj48i7ucm7g54gc63ad15o41fih8ukdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)
[**DONATE $3**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd7udfu950886loahlncnrvir3adg7k7s9vgpang_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs) [**DONATE MORE**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgjtn64uebnbmpe6hp1s236mujqbo5skfln6apj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)
Logistics and planning are the keys to a successful mission and a winning campaign.

We’ll defeat Jon Ossoff by outworking him, so that means we must keep fuel in the truck and our team on the trail.

[**A $3 contribution or more is all it takes to push our campaign one step closer to victory.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqfl8fjp14lg67fnlgb12cj1r8p0tnhguq877n0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)

Thank you,
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt0lp4hqonjqpt4o52aluvd4r9d188s9ae66trg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)
John King

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4ebinr0q2vimqhl1uv2im94tdt32htc6jtjdjdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)

|
General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. [**Join the mission by pitching in $10 to help John defeat Jon Ossoff and win the #1 Senate race in the country.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlsr917et6u8s7uituh1qlb7ibnlcpo0fju6eqgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9g60p74chh2bs)

|
# Lawmakers Return to Austin
---
| |
---
| The 89th Legislature gaveled in briefly Monday afternoon to kick off the special session. And while **Governor Abbott has yet to add OTC Ivermectin** access to the agenda of items he has instructed lawmakers to address, Representative Joanne Shofner has already filed HB 84, a replica of the bill she championed during the regular session. In advance of the House and Senate reconvening, TFVC Political Director Michelle Evans hand-delivered to Abbott’s office a hefty binder with the names of **over 7,000 Texans who signed our petition** urging the Governor to join four other states in allowing pharmacists to dispense Ivermectin without a prescription. Governor Abbott has the authority to add agenda items at any time during the special session or, if he feels there is still unfinished business at the conclusion of this special session, he can call legislators back again. **TFVC is optimistic that our voices will be heard and we look forward to getting this bill passed!**

---
|
---
|
---
| _Last week, Michelle hand-delivered over 7,000 signatures to Gov. Abbott’s office. These join a growing call from lawmakers urging him to add the issue to the Special Session agenda._
---
|
# News
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYwNjI3NjkzMzU1Nzk2MDk1LFwiclwiOjE2MDYyNzc1MTk5OTUwNTcxNX0iLCJzIjoiMGVkYWExNDQ1NWE0MGQ0YSJ9)

|
## Order Your Exemptions
|
---
Printable exemptions passed during the recent legislative session, but the print from home option is not available yet and may not be ready by the start of school. While we wait for new rules to be adopted, TFVC urges parents to request affidavits now via the DSHS website to avoid enrollment delays.

---

---
|
## Sound off!
|
---
During the COVID-19 response, many Texans faced obstacles filling prescriptions for well studied treatments like ivermectin - despite its Nobel Prize recognition - due to media backlash and government interference.

**With that in mind, here is this month’s question:**
|
---
| | | | | During the COVID-19 pandemic, were you able to easily access ivermectin?
---

clean_body: | | There is still time for Abbott to empower patients | | | | | | Lawmakers Return to Austin | | | The 89th Legislature gaveled in briefly Monday afternoon to kick off the special session. And while Governor Abbott has yet to add OTC Ivermectin access to the agenda of items he has instructed lawmakers to address, Representative Joanne Shofner has already filed HB 84, a replica of the bill she championed during the regular session. In advance of the House and Senate reconvening, TFVC Political Director Michelle Evans hand-delivered to Abbott’s office a hefty binder with the names of over 7,000 Texans who signed our petition urging the Governor to join four other states in allowing pharmacists to dispense Ivermectin without a prescription. Governor Abbott has the authority to add agenda items at any time during the special session or, if he feels there is still unfinished business at the conclusion of this special session, he can call legislators back again. TFVC is optimistic that our voices will be heard and we look forward to getting this bill passed! | | | Last week, Michelle hand-delivered over 7,000 signatures to Gov. Abbott’s office. These join a growing call from lawmakers urging him to add the issue to the Special Session agenda. | News | | | | | | Order Your Exemptions | Printable exemptions passed during the recent legislative session, but the print from home option is not available yet and may not be ready by the start of school. While we wait for new rules to be adopted, TFVC urges parents to request affidavits now via the DSHS website to avoid enrollment delays. | | | | | | ICYMI: Shot Callers | In last week's episode, prolific author, Mark Gober, shared his insights into challenges with the allopathic healthcare model and ideas for a new path forward. | | | Vax Views | | | | | | Sound off! | During the COVID-19 response, many Texans faced obstacles filling prescriptions for well studied treatments like ivermectin - despite its Nobel Prize recognition - due to media backlash and government interference. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’ve been through it all. Or so I thought…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The Left’s playbook is to destroy the lives of patriots like us.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/c9618bdf3624c941/?utm_campaign=20250721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Dear friend,

As I watched the troubling coverage of ICE agents being assaulted on
the news the other morning, I felt compelled to write you this letter.

What I witnessed was a powerful reminder that the radical Left’s
playbook is simple, _but nevertheless evil:_

_ THEIR GOAL IS TO UTTERLY DESTROY THE LIVES OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU AND
ME!_

While the brave men and women of ICE carry out the _people’s_
mandate to secure our border and our streets, the Democrats are
doxing, attacking, and upending the lives of these honorable officers
who are simply doing their jobs.

It’s disgusting! But sadly, I know all too well just how far the
Left will go to tear down a patriot.

I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled
corruption. I’ve been through it all. _Or so I thought... _

...BUT NOW, A DEMOCRAT ATTORNEY GENERAL IS MAKING ME STAND IN A RIGGED
TRIAL FOR BOGUS STATE-LEVEL CRIMES, BECAUSE SHE KNOWS THAT NOT EVEN
THE MOST POWERFUL MAN ON THE FACE OF THE PLANET – PRESIDENT TRUMP
– CAN SAVE ME WITH A _FEDERAL_ PARDON IN STATE COURT.

They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after
they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!

_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_

But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot
step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: THE
AMERICAN PEOPLE.

So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that
can save me: _THE COLLECTIVE VOICES OF MILLIONS OF PATRIOTS LIKE YOU._

My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for
2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — “THE PEOPLE’S
PARDON”
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/c9618bdf3624c941/?utm_campaign=20250721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]
— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.

PLEASE HELP ME REACH THIS LIFE-SAVING (_TRULY_!) GOAL TODAY BY
IMMEDIATELY ADDING YOUR NAME TO “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” AS
CITIZENS UNITE TO CALL FOR MY FREEDOM AND TO DROP ALL CHARGES AGAINST
ME.
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/c9618bdf3624c941/?utm_campaign=20250721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/c9618bdf3624c941/?utm_campaign=20250721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]
__

ADD YOUR NAME
[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/c9618bdf3624c941/?utm_campaign=20250721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Thank you and God bless you,

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/c9618bdf3624c941/?utm_campaign=20250721&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:
The Establishment can’t fake what we bring | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=cc8796ad536d49788d1fb38550fae2b2&_e=m8z7R-HZTHNA1xHgpT1GVW7SbinbyJMpW-8fmfX_OfkadqHH5VUvvpsgl8kRJ05uAY3hiniG8RJXVxY1ySF8I8kaBsg2iDZpYRHtIwUo_4lWzz6iRWfIpR37BxasuBxvKW0dHTkE9gNMfoq_r2ElVk0JGRHr2JFAUSbt_FlFUhVU8MjePzBx29gVKS3rBSHqMQxYou2-MRNmNs_oC5t9VId2D269KGF_7x2qvYCEAnzm5ChI2yGLTvh3YEuduZkuyqnWeAS8cjZPzOvK2prcEfakZpUjLeweCDR_yKnVYO59Io31-5oyNrV31DbEEh_GSG3hZMyyw_soyu_dPfEvgqx7YlgA8HYdkCR4GyaYaXOBgvP3OV7e0tc4QVqOM1Fd17QP78f_hAcqw1BqBqbknhOzG6BpVsJukJW7NYF-8mR2KeONPfNfiCU8kc95dYXIUtvswyiT3FrIauJ0rzPMj544n4X5Nu135b4dzy8DIiPJaN6-wGVDGBvzHsbGfFBxNIm-QCS3j4IURPDxmtv0P3lL_ElB3n7KqeBh_thRbVW5P9-d9nOA-EKTaYklWBj0)
---

Peter, They call me a "grifter."

That’s their go-to insult when someone refuses to kneel at the altar of the Minnesota GOP establishment. When someone speaks plainly. When someone reaches people they can’t even look them in the eye.

David Penn hit the nail on the head — they don't fear me personally. **They fear what I represent: young people waking up. Black men refusing to be bought.** Patriots who can’t be controlled. A real populist movement rising from the ashes of their failed games.

| [ **JOIN THE REAL POPULIST MOVEMENT** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=cc8796ad536d49788d1fb38550fae2b2&_e=m8z7R-HZTHNA1xHgpT1GVW7SbinbyJMpW-8fmfX_OfkadqHH5VUvvpsgl8kRJ05uAY3hiniG8RJXVxY1ySF8I8kaBsg2iDZpYRHtIwUo_4lWzz6iRWfIpR37BxasuBxvKW0dHTkE9gNMfoq_r2ElVlQu4b-EjBP6pLQ14by95jx04cXXAyzDPvgXeIfKiDOMMpHLoyC3MuEeQPAYSU4dc9xgeWgSAzqKEU7y-SFs4efdXHBF8Fk2mO5ctXpAMNu1sImbg24kS9-vg29T8OO-LvwNAeTy-dk3S5fQHHDQwmDt23wEZn8TjmgIhHjnGUhIVQSkooM2x0HBWnw43UYkCTwUrqp6_RLglezwYAb7N8AD9xlNgpeUPaqOFZtjAOWpdqKok5ZgiBnoAkJn-sZkloYyy1FqZfB9MUVaOZMXxA9p2cK7RYtSzDct0Hg5Ic6SsXyqTlYC03_OOgZfYtuNSMBL5WF6pFqESD3R36JuZdAWTxRglzjn-96uNHpae9grYbkcWCiektN_TjmThjsVIQAZitlr6P6JsZCXzlScagGS6XJ7L0CHDNz4OYX_c1Om)
---

I didn’t join this fight to make friends with career politicians or sip cocktails at donor galas. **I joined because the truth needs a voice.** Because mentoring young men matters. Because coaching matters. And because leading by example is the only way this country survives.

To the "young Republicans" parroting talking points — I don’t blame you. **You’ve been raised in a machine that feeds on cowardice. But you’ve also got a choice: step up, learn from men who’ve walked the fire, or stay irrelevant in the war we’re in.**

We don’t have time for fake unity. We need _real_ alignment. On principle. On purpose.
If you're with me — if you're done with the lies — chip in and let’s finish what we started.

I’m not here to kiss the ring. I’m here to put the people back at the center of this fight — not the donors, not the consultants, not the country club gatekeepers.
_**If you’ve seen through the games — if you know we need a real shift in direction — then**[stand with me now.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=cc8796ad536d49788d1fb38550fae2b2&_e=m8z7R-HZTHNA1xHgpT1GVW7SbinbyJMpW-8fmfX_OfkadqHH5VUvvpsgl8kRJ05uAY3hiniG8RJXVxY1ySF8I8kaBsg2iDZpYRHtIwUo_4lWzz6iRWfIpR37BxasuBxvIf36mhokx7p8N5rjUgwE8a-ECceU3hfspNGpk4OJCMFneqoZwXDD5GISB3wyaMXLi2EJDOEBYAdMDz_TbR8HCOtQ9qjEFysXDMToDTZ3D0lhZFZ1Zj6PUugzMzctaNBbtPmpBrEYikvMjNyjZn3PIORymd-GQYnbvn8bGbJKCBfCtXGl-m1WuIFcVCe5CvFiFrxyGgtVIzvDC2PS-OPR-npCzRbzGNC0UYeKkgZJLSpC45xAqz18o7b7jSBrhPdR1eoCy0grrZpH_nP0I0IOzYzyMu8p36EwvpDYwtjV96J_PAcSA_TowPZ4Jvufo_Xm_81RALbzedMITGI-4eTuynMFdgs_J4ba7HJ4LKgWe4W-jURGe8HCQCNgpm8GHvAh813fuAlh48-vkDohhqfTylUxH0uNnKTBJwL0tyTQyDs%3D)****_

In truth and fire,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=cc8796ad536d49788d1fb38550fae2b2&_e=m8z7R-HZTHNA1xHgpT1GVW7SbinbyJMpW-8fmfX_OfkadqHH5VUvvpsgl8kRJ05uAY3hiniG8RJXVxY1ySF8I8kaBsg2iDZpYRHtIwUo_4lWzz6iRWfIpR37BxasuBxvKW0dHTkE9gNMfoq_r2ElVk0JGRHr2JFAUSbt_FlFUhVU8MjePzBx29gVKS3rBSHq24tvRqIwGHSstpUy0BlHnGJX8-gH-PBE_yuESsr11nMW7S6M0G9OwNEU1z65TnlEtbzFD0nDbygg5wYjH1LP_sjO2RQNS00U19w5BA7WHSh670qzwj5OtNfVDknH56NTAY5leL5VFzDMo6a8FnsRq4bSJP9JYt-vzhMsna2ad-b19d0HTIr1cECUZNBRb2lYwrBYGYuzhWXL7ciQsHpp_aw_PgEPD5HaTPAg6bHn9oimXdCMVwA3TW_xcD3w0DMY4RV-FNczE--7WsT67r3LDgP7dMQ9RrstDA7e6cx7hoEIHn0KUW33kQt6wBbqlnpSw7NQesObiBpmR2k9nKE1vNaYW2EFDEotl0Z6PsQN7yQiY9yk7S6RnoidgIzrQuhf)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=cc8796ad536d49788d1fb38550fae2b2&_e=m8z7R-HZTHNA1xHgpT1GVW7SbinbyJMpW-8fmfX_OfkadqHH5VUvvpsgl8kRJ05uAY3hiniG8RJXVxY1ySF8I8kaBsg2iDZpYRHtIwUo_4lWzz6iRWfIpR37BxasuBxvKW0dHTkE9gNMfoq_r2ElVk0JGRHr2JFAUSbt_FlFUhVU8MjePzBx29gVKS3rBSHqimk4Po-_IusDzRvo6TAoyrlR53o0E0CDDdxNDgGIqFEK8l9geUYpVDfaC1aan9DRkr_AWtLBvqsHI0VxUDIY0LQKgXNTagNiySl_UV78zGb7ynsBLhjRKsFy0jt2WAvFi9NHYuT0d-0CDbKIZWMFYZKYHvknk8Jk6iqOEk2Ztmzm_yraxKFr5tyXjlzHulIw_3ibDAGoVXeBTKt_J7phez0dS7L_0F66s4I6ZH3UTvApQ4srmTyc-MJRU721JLaxLH5NqUAvCP-JVYndrdYN-DRKxJYdPCC3iNka7HB_oRjcZ_TUtXE_jx82eWZFjspaAB4dRMRZbopg5Y8AvFRyrx3cFwRLruNd_ZBVDrQOtyv-YJ4CG92gTZlY1oR-9wqt)

name: Warner Mendenhall, Freedom Counsel
subject: No Jab, No Job
body:
At Berkshire Health System (BHS) in Massachusetts, 70 workers were separated from their positions after declining the COVID shot.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11686257/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbkFjQ3Rzc2d2bQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsRW04U2owOA/qP2hpZHM9bmMzRVhJUXk4SWU1R2dscw/gaH-QwA/seuee7f31a2)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11686257/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9mcmVlZG9tLWNvdW5zZWwvc2ItYWN0aW9uLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsRW04U2owOA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mYzI1MDYwNCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMzRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWxvZ28/gaH-QwA/s6t0d080cd8)
Patriot,

During the pandemic, healthcare workers were celebrated as heroes.

However, when they stood up for their personal health freedom, **thousands** faced firing despite filing religious and medical exemption requests.

At Berkshire Health System (BHS) in Massachusetts, 70 workers were separated from their positions after declining the COVID shot. Some are still seeking legal remedy through the courts for religious and medical discrimination.

My name is Warner Mendenhall with Freedom Counsel. Our organization supports lawyers and their clients seeking legal recourse for violations of their constitutional rights. We collaborate with attorneys, medical professionals, scientists, and concerned citizens, addressing these challenges that many Americans face.

This case represents one of many important legal actions establishing significant legal precedents to protect health freedom in the future, which is why your support is vital today.

[Can you chip in $10, $35, or even $100 today to help support the Freedom Counsel network bringing in our lawsuits against COVID tyranny?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11686257/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9mcmVlZG9tLWNvdW5zZWwvc2ItYWN0aW9uLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsRW04U2owOA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mYzI1MDYwNCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMzRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazE/gaH-QwA/sas0622339e)
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11686257/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9mcmVlZG9tLWNvdW5zZWwvc2ItYWN0aW9uLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsRW04U2owOA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mYzI1MDYwNCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMzRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWRvbmF0ZV9idXR0b24x/gaH-QwA/s7rbc6d202e)
These healthcare professionals dedicated **years** of service to their communities and decades to patient care.

Many of the BHS workers experienced severe financial consequences, including lost homes, health insurance, and financial stability. One was dismissed after experiencing adverse effects from initial vaccination. All were denied unemployment benefits when BHS classified their separations as "deliberate misconduct" and violations of "uniformly enforced policy."

The BHS firings occurred when breakthrough infections among vaccinated individuals were also being documented.

Freedom Counsel provides resources and support to help qualified attorneys bring cases like this to trial effectively. [If you believe in protecting religious liberty, medical autonomy, and constitutional rights, please consider making your most generous contribution today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11686257/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9mcmVlZG9tLWNvdW5zZWwvc2ItYWN0aW9uLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsRW04U2owOA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mYzI1MDYwNCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMzRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXRleHRfbGluazI/gaH-QwA/s7ma8da389d)
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-QwA/s7s019fe951)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-QwA/scpc25a4d6a)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-QwA/scr04195ace)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-QwA/s6id7a34f72)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-QwA/s2g60adeb36)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-QwA/sdgca02de97)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-QwA/s6v45734742)

[Donate Other](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11686257/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9mcmVlZG9tLWNvdW5zZWwvc2ItYWN0aW9uLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsRW04U2owOA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mYzI1MDYwNCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMzRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWFueV9idXR0b24x/gaH-QwA/s7jae294fd7)
Your support helps ensure cases like this receive proper attention and resources. Please consider supporting Freedom Counsel's network of professionals working to address these important legal questions through your donation today.

If you or someone you know has been affected by similar circumstances, please know resources are available. We're committed to connecting individuals with appropriate legal support and information.
[Donate](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11686257/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9mcmVlZG9tLWNvdW5zZWwvc2ItYWN0aW9uLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsRW04U2owOA/qP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mYzI1MDYwNCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXJldnNoYXJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9c2ImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjEwMzRfd3IxJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWRvbmF0ZV9idXR0b24y/gaH-QwA/sbn10314e9b)

Warner Mendenhall

Many of the BHS workers experienced severe financial consequences, including lost homes, health insurance, and financial stability. One was dismissed after experiencing adverse effects from initial vaccination. All were denied unemployment benefits when BHS classified their separations as "deliberate misconduct" and violations of "uniformly enforced policy." The BHS firings occurred when breakthrough infections among vaccinated individuals were also being documented. Freedom Counsel provides resources and support to help qualified attorneys bring cases like this to trial effectively. Your support helps ensure cases like this receive proper attention and resources. Please consider supporting Freedom Counsel's network of professionals working to address these important legal questions through your donation today. If you or someone you know has been affected by similar circumstances, please know resources are available. We're committed to connecting individuals with appropriate legal support and information. With appreciation, Warner Mendenhall Freedom Counsel is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to Freedom Counsel are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution.

Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12168.1.5e8077e7a3cae5b981fd6ceb159da4ef) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12169.1.72e6df24383da33ea6139702b8e15321)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12170.1.030e5965ed57717fb77cc9788c8fa5f7)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12171.1.cc3985d37b35208fb833b652101ed7ce). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12172.1.c846a28205c7b322ed54b32b8406dbb6) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12173.1.b7b820355d3c11fbe1013056aefb6d16) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12174.1.137e6d1a9e287b16cb215f8b03a7778c) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12176.1.25906b12e65e9d6544ae48d529159299) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=23288504.12177.1.bd5cc694a8d2d6e9a67334e93fbd4106) Thank you,

body:
VP Visit & Picnics 🇺🇸

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3a273f51831f/robs-nepa-rundown?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| Good Morning,
This week, Rob was hard at work in Washington, standing up for our values and delivering results for Northeastern Pennsylvania. From cutting red tape to pushing back against wasteful spending, Rob continued the fight to protect your tax dollars and our communities. Midweek, he returned to the district to join Vice President Vance at Don’s Machine Shop, highlighting the strength of American manufacturing and the impact of "no tax on overtime" policy right here at home. Rob also had the chance to connect with grassroots supporters at the Luzerne County GOP’s summer picnic, where he gave an update on the latest from D.C. and emphasized how critical it is to support our great local candidates this November.
Let’s dive into this week’s Rundown ⬇️
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | Rob introduced the SMART Act: the Strategic Mitigation and Resiliency Transparency Act, to bring greater accountability and transparency to how FEMA uses taxpayer dollars. This would require FEMA to conduct a thorough cost-benefit analysis of its mitigation activities. By ensuring that mitigation efforts are both effective and efficient, the SMART Act will help protect communities from future disasters while making sure federal funds are spent wisely.
---
|
---
[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=6e32ef5bf4&e=131e83a3c2)
| Rob enjoyed welcoming Vice President JD Vance to West Pittston, and even took him to Majestic Lunch, a staple of Pittston for decades. Rob and the administration believe small businesses and their workers are the backbone of America, and will always fight for their success.

[|
---](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=02963f4c07&e=131e83a3c2)
| Our Small Business of the Week is Jeannie’s Chapel Street Salon, in Honesdale. Be sure to support local businesses!
---
|
---
| The midterms are creeping up on us and are more critical than even 2024. That’s why the far-left is attacking Rob with lies and smears. He’s fighting for NEPA values, the American economy, and the truth.
**Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

With no hurricane activity this week (so far) in the Atlantic basin, I'm focusing this issue of disaster brief's on key developments in international conflict, where some progress has been made toward peace in the DRC and Azerbaijan, while conditions in the Middle East continue to destabilize as Israel wages its campaign of terror in the region.
I'll be covering fewer total conflicts in this issue, but with more detailed background about the conflicts, tracing the roots of these conflicts over centuries.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hA9ELHs0slrKA1uUuKPK5n1U9TZUaFOa9j1f_mHZr-s?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168947113)
* * *
#### **Democratic Republic of Congo**
_**Background:**_
The Democratic Republic of the Congo is a nation haunted by grandeur and betrayal, its story unfolding like a Conrad novel scrawled in blood and ambition.
Carved into a personal fiefdom by Belgium's King Leopold II in the late 19th century, the Congo was brutalized for rubber and ivory under a regime so savage it halved the population.
When independence came in 1960, it arrived not as a triumph but a calamity--without preparation, infrastructure, or unity.
The CIA helped orchestrate the assassination of the country's first elected prime minister, Patrice Lumumba, a charismatic symbol of self-determination, and soon installed Mobutu Sese Seko, who cloaked kleptocracy in leopard-print hats and ruled for 32 years with Western backing.
When his regime finally collapsed in 1997, it sparked Africa's World War, a conflagration drawing in nine nations and[ killing millions.](https://substack.com/redirect/48d42b3f-0456-4251-b84c-ea89f8d9536c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
What followed was not peace but a chessboard of militias, foreign armies, and mining interests, all feeding on the DRC's unimaginable wealth in cobalt, gold, and coltan, like flies to a carcass.
Elections came, but power rarely changed hands cleanly. The state became both prize and hostage, its vast jungles concealing not only minerals and violence but the simple, aching desire of a people long denied the right to shape their own fate.
_**Recent News:**_
The government of DRC signed a [ceasefire agreement ](https://substack.com/redirect/1262e20d-180d-4810-b15a-ae5ee1e21dfc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)with M23 that was facilitated by Qatar on Saturday, with [both pledging ](https://substack.com/redirect/dae737e5-9cc9-4907-bc1d-0087f37ab2ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to sign an official peace treaty by mid-August. The DRC signed a peace treaty with [Rwanda in June](https://substack.com/redirect/a0e08ae6-b9da-4abd-8694-c184fc728a60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Conflict in the DRC has led to about [six million ](https://substack.com/redirect/48d42b3f-0456-4251-b84c-ea89f8d9536c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)deaths in the last 30 years.
#### **Ethiopia-Eritrea**
_**Background:**_
The Ethiopia-Eritrea conflict is a tale written in scorched earth and silent trenches, where the ghosts of empire linger and borders are drawn not by consensus, but by conquest and revenge.
Eritrea, once an Italian colony and later absorbed into Ethiopia after World War II, found its voice in rebellion, waging a brutal 30-year war for independence that culminated in hard-won sovereignty in 1993. ...

Mesoscale News is one of Substack's bestselling newsletters, with exclusive investigations, commentary, and breaking news. The average cost for a Substack subscription is currently $8 and rising, with too many amazing authors to subscribe to everyone. That's why I'm dropping the price of my monthly and annual subscriptions for new subscribers. I incur some costs in the work I do, but I have always believed in making information accessible when it's critical for the public to know. Subscribe before June 21, 2025 to redeem this offer! | Jul 22 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | With no hurricane activity this week (so far) in the Atlantic basin, I'm focusing this issue of disaster brief's on key developments in international conflict, where some progress has been made toward peace in the DRC and Azerbaijan, while conditions in the Middle East continue to destabilize as Israel wages its campaign of terror in the region. I'll be covering fewer total conflicts in this issue, but with more detailed background about the conflicts, tracing the roots of these conflicts over centuries. Democratic Republic of Congo Background: The Democratic Republic of the Congo is a nation haunted by grandeur and betrayal, its story unfolding like a Conrad novel scrawled in blood and ambition. Carved into a personal fiefdom by Belgium's King Leopold II in the late 19th century, the Congo was brutalized for rubber and ivory under a regime so savage it halved the population. When independence came in 1960, it arrived not as a triumph but a calamity--without preparation, infrastructure, or unity. The CIA helped orchestrate the assassination of the country's first elected prime minister, Patrice Lumumba, a charismatic symbol of self-determination, and soon installed Mobutu Sese Seko, who cloaked kleptocracy in leopard-print hats and ruled for 32 years with Western backing. When his regime finally collapsed in 1997, it sparked Africa's World War, a conflagration drawing in nine nations and What followed was not peace but a chessboard of militias, foreign armies, and mining interests, all feeding on the DRC's unimaginable wealth in cobalt, gold, and coltan, like flies to a carcass. Elections came, but power rarely changed hands cleanly. The state became both prize and hostage, its vast jungles concealing not only minerals and violence but the simple, aching desire of a people long denied the right to shape their own fate. Recent News: The government of DRC signed a M23 that was facilitated by Qatar on Saturday, with sign an official peace treaty by mid-August. The DRC signed a peace treaty with . Conflict in the DRC has led to about in the last 30 years. Ethiopia-Eritrea Background: The Ethiopia-Eritrea conflict is a tale written in scorched earth and silent trenches, where the ghosts of empire linger and borders are drawn not by consensus, but by conquest and revenge. Eritrea, once an Italian colony and later absorbed into Ethiopia after World War II, found its voice in rebellion, waging a brutal 30-year war for independence that culminated in hard-won sovereignty in 1993. ... Greg Abbott is hijacking a disaster — and we need your help to stop him.

Not for relief.

| Peter,
You know what mob violence looks like. But what if the next big attack on democracy comes quietly -- through courts, not crowds?
This November in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court Race, that quiet coup is unfolding.
MAGA operatives are marshaling massive resources to the Keystone State with alarming speed.
Winning in PA is how they plan to destroy vote-by-mail, suppress abortion rights, override checks on power, and rewrite maps - all under the radar.
No dramatic protests. No January 6 headlines. Just a courtroom stealth takeover.
This is a five-alarm situation for our democracy, and we're going to need your help to stop it.
[Can we count on you now -- not later -- to stand guard for democracy? A donation today fuels ads, flyers, and get‐out‐the‐vote efforts where the public is still clueless about what's at stake. President Donald Trump, during his recent Iowa rally, recalled how **[he successfully dealt with nationwide Antifa riots](https://substack.com/redirect/b3d11f4f-6605-4259-b9a1-bcb06bed8316?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** targeting America's historic monuments, signing a bill that made defacing monuments punishable by 10 years in jail.
We was not messing around...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b3d11f4f-6605-4259-b9a1-bcb06bed8316?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b3d11f4f-6605-4259-b9a1-bcb06bed8316?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"They wanted to rip the hell out of the statues... they wanted to get rid of Thomas Jefferson," Trump told the crowd. "We stopped them, I took out an old bill from 1909... If you so much as touch a monument or a statue you, go to jail for a 10 year period!"
"That march broke up so quickly!" Trump added.
Watch MAGA in action right here:
[Click to Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b3d11f4f-6605-4259-b9a1-bcb06bed8316?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Self-deportation strategy shows big success
Tens of thousands of illegal aliens **[have reportedly self-deported](https://substack.com/redirect/e01695ac-13e5-42c9-b543-eba562fed3e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** since the Trump administration repurposed the CBP One app, which previously allowed migrants to schedule asylum interviews under Biden but now lets illegal aliens submit their intent to voluntarily leave the United States.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e01695ac-13e5-42c9-b543-eba562fed3e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The administration is offering financial incentives and penalties to encourage self-deportation** , including $1,000 payments for those who leave voluntarily while threatening fines of nearly $1,000 per day for those who refuse to depart the country.
* **DHS launched a comprehensive campaign promoting voluntary departure** , featuring ads with Secretary Kristi Noem telling illegal aliens to "leave now," while ICE published a self-deportation guide warning that forced removal will have severe consequences. including reentry bars and no time to organize personal affairs.

* * *
# Trump ditches woke UN cultural org for crossing the line with DEI and anti-Israel sentiment
President Donald Trump **[is withdrawing the US from the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization](https://substack.com/redirect/9777e3cf-b4f8-44cc-bf1f-33ae2ee4d6a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** (UNESCO) after a 90-day review, citing the organization's "woke, divisive cultural and social causes" that are "totally out-of-step with the commonsense policies that Americans voted for in November."
* **Administration officials took issue with UNESCO's DEI policies and anti-Israel bias** , including the organization's 2023 "anti-racism toolkit," 2024 "Transforming MEN'talities" initiative aimed at reshaping how men think about gender issues, and designation of Jewish holy sites as "Palestinian World Heritage" sites.
* **China's growing influence within UNESCO raised national security concerns** , with Beijing serving as the second-largest funder and Chinese nationals ,like deputy director-general Xing Qu in key leadership positions, while the CCP uses its influence to advance Beijing's interests and downplay minorities like Uyghur Muslims.
* **This marks the third time the US has withdrawn from UNESCO** , following previous exits under Ronald Reagan in 1983 (citing politicization and hostility toward free societies) and Trump in 2017 (citing anti-Israel bias), with the Biden administration having rejoined the organization.

* * *
# Trump forcing companies to disclose illegal immigrant employees
The Trump administration has **[significantly ramped up ICE audits of businesses'](https://substack.com/redirect/23b138b2-ff1a-4741-9786-17f12971d12b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** employment verification records, requiring companies to produce I-9 forms and supporting documents within three days of notification, forcing employers to stop ignoring illegal immigrant hiring practices.
* **Companies are scrambling to comply with immigration rules** , with business leaders and attorneys describing being in "I-9 hell" as they rush to find and correct mistakes on employment verification forms in anticipation of possible inspections and hefty penalties.
* **High-profile enforcement actions have resulted in substantial fines and criminal charges** , including $8 million in combined penalties for three Denver businesses that hired over 100 unauthorized workers, and a San Diego company manager receiving probation for employing illegal immigrants in a facility storing military components.
* **Industries with large immigrant workforces are becoming more cautious** , with the hotel industry seeing a 36% increase in background checks during the first half of 2025, while ICE raids have also uncovered labor exploitation cases including 14 juveniles found at California marijuana farms.

body:
Minnesotans have shown the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111917681/558816817/155687941?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDE2NjE0Ny0wNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J03nser6sVsXlErqu6OMmGy-L_2FnShiESny18PVeBw=)

Peter,
Minnesotans have shown the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every child, brought competitive, high-paying jobs to our state, and passed the most aggressive expansion of labor rights in the country. We’re investing in family and medical leave, cutting child poverty, delivering unprecedented funding for public education, and more.
I couldn’t be more proud of how far we’ve come—but we know better than to let up before the job is done.
To protect the progress we’ve made, we must stop Donald Trump and his MAGA allies from running back the clock. As they sow division across the country, we’re moving forward with decency, courage, and ambition.
If you believe in governing like a good neighbor—with an abiding commitment to making life better for everyone—please chip in today.

clean_body: Minnesotans have shown the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose. | = Peter, Minnesotans have shown the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose. We secured free school meals for every child, brought competitive, high-paying jobs to our state, and passed the most aggressive expansion of labor rights in the country. We’re investing in family and medical leave, cutting child poverty, delivering unprecedented funding for public education, and more. I couldn’t be more proud of how far we’ve come—but we know better than to let up before the job is done. To protect the progress we’ve made, we must stop Donald Trump and his MAGA allies from running back the clock. As they sow division across the country, we’re moving forward with decency, courage, and ambition. If you believe in governing like a good neighbor—with an abiding commitment to making life better for everyone—please chip in today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I'm grateful, Tim Walz ********=******

name: Snake Eyes Sunglasses
subject: These Sunglasses Shouldn't be Legal...
body:
Most civilians don't know this - and I’m shocked the mass media hasn’t picked up on this yet...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21663/6374453/c5f201a36e82aca9609e8696fcb2d23d714ad8b9/d86bbaf71877651f250c6d4f0c69afab28045c44)

_July 22nd, 2025 at 06:23 PM UTC_
---
| | |

| | Hey Reader, Most civilians don't know this - and I’m shocked the mass media hasn’t picked up on this yet. But a group of American engineers have created **[the first unbreakab](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21663/6374453/7b02b8dad65ccf57e0d617fa6025b971270a05cf/d86bbaf71877651f250c6d4f0c69afab28045c44)[le tactical glasses](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21663/6374453/7b02b8dad65ccf57e0d617fa6025b971270a05cf/d86bbaf71877651f250c6d4f0c69afab28045c44)** that meet MIL SPEC ballistics standards for combat use... It’s all thanks to a groundbreaking new methods of using proven technology to create extreme durability and protection in even combat conditions. Now available to civilians for the first time. **[==> THESE are unbelievable](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21663/6374453/7b02b8dad65ccf57e0d617fa6025b971270a05cf/d86bbaf71877651f250c6d4f0c69afab28045c44)** **Thank You.** **P.S.** Right now, I'm throwing in 4 sets of lenses, a hard case, and FREE S&H!

biological males in athletic competition. Under President Donald Trump, common sense has returned, and women's sports are now
protected.

For an update on these exciting developments, Idaho Representative Barbara Ehardt returns to the Moms for America Podcast. A
long-time champion of legal protection for women's sports, Representative Ehardt will share all the great news from the White
House to the Supreme Court. Like, subscribe and share.

Patriotic Destinations For Your Family to Visit This Summer

If you plan to travel this summer, we have ideas to bring your family together and foster patriotism. Whether far from home or in
your own state, there are many exciting Liberty Trips that appeal to children of all ages. This week, we are sharing some of the
top trips for patriotic family vacations that will educate, inspire, and nurture the heart of a patriot in the next generation.
Take a look!

clean_body: Just last year, the Biden Administration made shocking updates that endangered women and girls in sports. Now, we have exciting updates on the fight to protect women's sports! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] July 22, 2025 • Newsletter Important Updates: Title IX and Women's Sports Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Just last year, the Biden Administration made shocking changes to Title IX, forcing women and girls to go head-to-head with biological males in athletic competition. Under President Donald Trump, common sense has returned, and women's sports are now protected. For an update on these exciting developments, Idaho Representative Barbara Ehardt returns to the Moms for America Podcast. A long-time champion of legal protection for women's sports, Representative Ehardt will share all the great news from the White House to the Supreme Court. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] Moms for America Weekly Blog [-] [] Patriotic Destinations For Your Family to Visit This Summer If you plan to travel this summer, we have ideas to bring your family together and foster patriotism. Whether far from home or in your own state, there are many exciting Liberty Trips that appeal to children of all ages. This week, we are sharing some of the top trips for patriotic family vacations that will educate, inspire, and nurture the heart of a patriot in the next generation. Take a look! Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® The Mom View [] [] Empowering Conversations Start Here! From parenting to public policy, The MomView delves into the topics that shape our culture, impact our nation and influence our homes, because every issue is a mom issue. **$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I just received some disturbing news from home
body:
I’m worried
| | | | Dear Friend,
I've got some bad news and I've got some bad news and no time to waste.
**My radical Democrat opponent just outraised me in the second quarter of this year.**
That's right.
Shawn Harris is a far-left activist who is running a campaign to destroy my name and our movement, and the deep-pocketed liberal elites and the uniparty swamp are flooding his campaign with cash to finance it.
I don’t care that the big donors are lining up behind him. My strength comes from grassroots patriots like you, the real Americans who are demanding our leaders put America First.
**But we can't let them outspend us into defeat.**

**_[Will you rush a donation of $25, $50, or $100 right now to help me close this gap and keep battling the Uniparty](http://email.email.greene4congress.com/c/eJxcks9u3CAYxJ8G31hh8L8cfGjibA5VI22kHNoLIvDZywoDAbyW-_SVve62ynW-8cxPY8Toje6XFtWPiNKzVhFRitg3ROlL83OpevX58ohNd8LQvZLf65E-7c4rvXutFJf59D5_9r_iQNQ0vz37a353p8XD3btXHmAU2qxq3WWqbepeqD6DNq9Llj-UdU6yc_vQ9EUja-glgGQlKWmuyqqkOSNKgqoz3VJCS1JTmhdFQ6vDB6EEoCklqaH6aAAVZCs6DAHAQiGdHQLEeJBuzEx7TsnHjeuI6DGCnAIcZm0DqNWB6HEU4eKCBpzEYlzAtxwcsQfnDWB3hYC9MzppqYWNWK4fpYErZ_koZum4nSR33jvcTxxG_pcYsWNYC4O2A2JdChMgWk1p5CMoPY2IdftGmxjdFCQg1llp-D7ifpJi9EIPFrHuFo13AJH0_xQGpriRWLCJ95NVQeio7cC3on9ke6yzCWy6VeLjaXmfLwtUr4hW3BqtEOu-iNsDYt3357enMvyALLTKz9oYHasaFWTY_sS6_LWlfwIAAP__h8TP8Q)_?**

# [The Disappearing Veteran Voices in Congress](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=168957908&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4OTU3OTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NTMxOTY0ODQsImV4cCI6MTc1NTc4ODQ4NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.C7rtYMNxHNScXHGGiiLlj0c_w6sgJrBoqpFTv2qRHCA)
### Fifty years ago, veterans made up 80% of Congress. Now it's less than 20%
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| Jul 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=168957908&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY4OTU3OTA4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MzE5NjQ4NCwiZXhwIjoxNzU1Nzg4NDg0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.87fjJE3VyylCySS1qe-4NaABcVKwF06Zo-p1g23-2Rw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62431ca8-fbfd-4f85-9d04-4560f62c60cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

sourced from department.va.gov/veterans-day/.
When I took the oath as a second lieutenant in the U.S. Army on July 26, 1996, I never could've guessed that decades later, I'd be asking why aren't more of us who wore the uniform representing the American people in Congress?
Stories like mine are becoming rare. And that's just plain wrong.
Fifty years ago, four out of every five members of Congress were veterans. Today, it's less than 1 in 5. Just 78 veterans in the House. Just 18 in the Senate. That's 18%.
At a time when the Department of Defense and Department of Veterans Affairs are two of the largest and most expensive agencies in government,**** the people who understand those systems best are increasingly missing from the rooms where decisions are made.
One of the most underreported crises in American politics is the disenfranchisement of veterans from the electoral process, especially for those who identify as political independents, which nearly half of all veterans do.
According to Pew, 49% of veterans identify as independent, 29% as Republican, and 20% as Democrat. That's a product of military culture: the military is, by design, a nonpartisan institution. We're trained to put the mission above party--and many of us carry that ethos into civilian life.
But that independent streak creates a problem: closed primary systems in many states prevent independents from voting in primary elections--the very elections that decide 90% of races in America.
If you're a veteran in Pennsylvania, Florida, or New York and you want to vote in a primary? You're out of luck unless you declare for a party, even if it conflicts with your values.
Let's do the math:
Pennsylvania has 688,200 veterans. If 49% are independent, over 337,000 veterans are shut out of primaries
Nationally, more than 2 million veterans in closed-primary states face the same barrier.
Thanks for reading From the Desk of Honorable Patrick J. Murphy! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..lc_-OSyalfQxNPabVvTq0FQCEgsF5sBQAtCtk78KO_M?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168957908)
# Eisenhower is a Perfect Example
When we talk about veteran leadership in public life, there's no better case study than Dwight D. Eisenhower--the five-star general who led the Allied victory in World War II and later became the first Supreme Commander of NATO.
For most of his life, **Eisenhower refused to join a political party.** He was, in the truest sense of the word, an independent. It was a reflection of his deep belief in the military's nonpartisan role. He served the country, not a party.
In fact, both **Democrats and Republicans tried to recruit him** to run for president as early as 1948. He turned them down, but in 1952, Eisenhower finally entered the race as a Republican, though he governed as a centrist. He preserved New Deal programs and expanded Social Security, invested in American infrastructure with the interstate system of roads and highways, all while paying down our national debt.
In today's political climate, it's hard to imagine a candidate like Eisenhower thriving. He was fluid in his politics, pluralistic in his thinking, and allergic to ideological purity tests. That kind of independence made him one of the most trusted leaders of the 20th century.
But today,**** our system now rewards division over consensus-building.
(BTW as was confirmed this week that the "big beautiful bill" will add $3.4T to our national debt, it's worth remembering that **only** **two modern presidents** have presided over a period without adding to the debt: **Dwight D. Eisenhower and Bill Clinton.**)
We need a new Ike for our times. More veterans who can lead with integrity.
This is more than a ballot access issue.**** It's about representation.
Veterans bring something special to the table: an authentic understanding of duty, sacrifice, discipline, and cross-partisan cooperation. We know what it's like to serve alongside people we disagree with and still get the job done.
Good character is the foundation for good governance.
When veterans are underrepresented in Congress, **veteran issues fall behind** in mental health access, VA benefits, Toxic exposure (think Camp Lejeune), support for caregivers (like the Dole 21st Century Veterans Healthcare Act), and fair retirement and disability coverage (like the Major Richard Star Act).
We need to lower the barriers to veteran political involvement, and that starts with three concrete actions:
#### **1\. Open the Primaries**
Veterans shouldn't have to choose between their values and their voice. It's time for states to **adopt open or semi-open primaries** so that independent voters--especially those who served--can participate in democracy without compromising their principles.
#### **2\. Support Veteran Candidates**
Organizations like With Honor and Vote Vets have done vital work recruiting and supporting veteran candidates from both parties. But we need more. We need both political parties to prioritize veterans in primaries--and voters to support them across the aisle.
#### **3\. Educate the Public**
Civic education that highlights the **nonpartisan tradition of military service** can build broader support for reforms like open primaries and greater veteran representation.
America is at a crossroads. Trust in our institutions is down. Polarization is up. And the middle ground--where veterans naturally stand tall--is vanishing.
We need leaders who can disagree without demonizing. Who can serve without seeking fame of viral clips. Who can rebuild trust in a broken system.
We need veterans more than ever.
Let's make it easier for them to serve again--not just in uniform, but in public office.
-- Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

Peter, As a dad raising two kids here in North Carolina, I think a lot about their future and what kind of country we’re leaving behind. That’s why I’m so concerned about the bill that MAGA Republicans and Donald Trump rammed through Congress. They’re calling it a “Big Beautiful Bill.” But let’s be honest: there’s nothing beautiful about a bill that will raise health care costs, hike energy bills, shut down rural hospitals, and gut good-paying jobs — especially here in North Carolina. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111920575/558826021/1157030115?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjgwNzQ4ZC0wYzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OOyNlw0OrKgGnSrQcKex0giUO7UbsHuYydkYiBBdhtc=&emci=d3f6f014-5666-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2280748d-0c67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=28008880) This isn’t how you help working people. It’s how you make life harder for folks who are already doing everything they can to get by. **This bill is a step backwards for our economy and our health, plain and simple.** I went to Congress to fight for everyday people, not corporate interests or political stunts. I’m here for families who want a fair shot, strong schools, decent wages, and health care that’s actually close to home. **That’s what I’m focused on. But I need to hear from you:** [**Do you think Trump’s Big Ugly Bill will hurt working families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111920577/558826022/1157030115?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjgwNzQ4ZC0wYzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OOyNlw0OrKgGnSrQcKex0giUO7UbsHuYydkYiBBdhtc=&emci=d3f6f014-5666-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2280748d-0c67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=28008880) | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111920580/558826025/1157030115?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjgwNzQ4ZC0wYzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OOyNlw0OrKgGnSrQcKex0giUO7UbsHuYydkYiBBdhtc=&emci=d3f6f014-5666-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2280748d-0c67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=28008880)

clean_body: | = Peter, As a dad raising two kids here in North Carolina, I think a lot about their future and what kind of country we’re leaving behind. That’s why I’m so concerned about the bill that MAGA Republicans and Donald Trump rammed through Congress. They’re calling it a “Big Beautiful Bill.” But let’s be honest: there’s nothing beautiful about a bill that will raise health care costs, hike energy bills, shut down rural hospitals, and gut good-paying jobs — especially here in North Carolina. This isn’t how you help working people. It’s how you make life harder for folks who are already doing everything they can to get by. This bill is a step backwards for our economy and our health, plain and simple. I went to Congress to fight for everyday people, not corporate interests or political stunts. I’m here for families who want a fair shot, strong schools, decent wages, and health care that’s actually close to home. That’s what I’m focused on. But I need to hear from you: | We can beat this. We can build something better. But it starts with standing up together. Thanks for being part of this, — Wiley = Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina
