name: Chris Ahuja
subject: ICE raids. In our backyard - AGAIN. Sherman tells voters to "sit down."
body:
We stand up to Trump’s secret police - for the District and our Community.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=3c0b923a90&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | [Donate](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=247f5d386d&e=5a6ee82cdb)
---
| **Peter,****ICE is terrorizing our communities.** They’ve ramped up raids here in the Valley—and now, with the passage of the BBB, ICE will have more funding than some parts of the military. **Trump and his secret police are at war with LA.**[**Can you contribute $27, $54 , $120 or more to help us build a movement that stands up to ICE and defends our neighbors?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=d7f4707f17&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Just a few weeks ago at a town hall here in the 32nd district, an older man - whose family fled the Nazis - stood up and asked Brad Sherman what he planned to do about ICE**.Sherman looked him in the eye and said: _**“Eloquent speech, but you’ve spoken too long. Sit down.”**_**I wish I were making that up.****I’m not afraid to say it: ICE must be abolished.** In Congress, I’ll never vote to fund ICE and I will never tell you to be quiet in the face of injustice. I’ll fight like hell to protect our neighbors and serve our district.**It is imperative that we replace Sherman** so that when Democrats retake Congress, we have solid support for reining in Trump’s power. We cannot afford elected officials who roll over in the face of injustice.[**Will you rush a donation of $27, $54, $120 or what feels right to you? Let’s send a message together; our communities will not be intimidated!**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=e47ef8863d&e=5a6ee82cdb)**We are in this together,****Chris Ahuja** **Democratic Candidate for Congress, CD-32**

---
| | | | | | | | [ View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/chrisahuja/ahuja-sherman-tells-voter-to-sit-down?e=5a6ee82cdb)

## About Guy Ciarrocchi:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8aa3e61e5c&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
As a common-sense conservative thought-leader, **Guy Ciarrochi’s** writings provoke thought on important topics such as education, politics, culture, and anti-Semitism. Guy draws on decades of experience from South Philly to the Philadelphia suburbs to Pittsburgh, from Harrisburg to Washington, DC, having served at the highest levels of government, as a candidate and strategist, as well as Chamber CEO. Guy has been listening, observing and guiding his readers for years.

name: Team Latimer
subject: Awaiting your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Did you see this message from George?

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=LouWLONLwY1Muu5YF%2FkOF2b5EdsOjQWTVKf3JeTDxigebR1Jaf32K8YnmyN4URe7ZmhH1FHRoyMVVpqAKFYklEoWwWeBl6H8Raq2TrNSjfkVW59%2Fretr2lUjPHbQXWtpsEt54CN6%2Fxv0sgpNxCaWJuJya0Y5RCWUGIbCG7NnN5HRVpL1wMT5Kaco0oA8ZZyXjTbgfHfHsOcXZ47S7pSRxV%2F7CtMmS%2Fy%2FSiAHSSgFMMQLuUNBvvRPaGrxmaKTnhZDWRYs5kxDm6IY6ZKkqW77ik4FDcaqbdnImQJvjRecMtIsf4Mbv7mvjb1bSd6ZYlDjtxQcrQagbS9IqTHrh2GJViykHsw6O4Hin6%2BBXJRvzDZR6kFUxYlp6GfO%2FRUDgF%2BuXo3JGAXOwGZDbihUbkgK8VrKVfgP%2BxmIojM4l%2B7tr1CLYHOlcoQA8sX%2BtDd4kDFd)

Hey Peter, did you see this message from George?

As we officially mark the six-month mark since George was sworn into office, we want to hear from supporters just like you about what’s on your mind. [Will you take our 2025 priorities survey to let George know what issues you care most about?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111927064/558845288/-1128585130?source=SBD_GL_EM_SV_072225_PrioritiesFWD_120DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmViMTg2MzEtMTY2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1U62C8piRW7qQvmhdhbcLPtsp2O4yxUIikZRkPkwjhk=&emci=a932ce46-5a63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2eb18631-1667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21388742) | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111927079/558845312/-1128585130?source=SBD_GL_EM_SV_072225_PrioritiesFWD_120DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmViMTg2MzEtMTY2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1U62C8piRW7qQvmhdhbcLPtsp2O4yxUIikZRkPkwjhk=&emci=a932ce46-5a63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2eb18631-1667-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=21388742)

Thank you,

Team Latimer
* * *
_Begin Forwarded Message from George Latimer:_
Peter, it’s officially been more than six months since I was sworn into office, and there’s been no shortage of challenges along the way.

Throughout the highs and the lows, hearing directly from New Yorkers on what matters most to them is what renews my commitment and energy to fight for our community and continue working to build a better future.

That’s why I wanted to reach out today. I want to know what’s on your mind and how I can best serve you. name: Dan Osborn
subject: I’m used to people underestimating me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I’m Dan Osborn, the blue-collar mechanic and former union president running for U.S. Senate here in Nebraska
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111927308/558845871/358649031?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5567-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzZlN2I1My0xNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ICeVg8cffdIIRFXu8VUVfQVs8AR28v413HW_satFKCc=)
Hello,
**I’m Dan Osborn, the blue-collar mechanic and former union president running for U.S. Senate here in Nebraska against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts.**
I’m used to people underestimating me. It’s been happening my whole life.

When Kellogg’s tried to cut our pay and benefits at the cereal plant where I worked, we walked out. The company never expected we’d strike for 11 weeks through the bitter cold. But we did. And we won a fair contract and saved 500 good-paying union jobs.
After I was fired for leading the strike, I decided to run for Senate against Republican Deb Fischer. None of the pundits and so-called experts thought I had any chance. But we got 47% of the vote. Ours was one of the closest Senate races in the entire country last year.
And now, I’m running for Senate again, this time against Republican Pete Ricketts – a literal billionaire. I’ve been told by more than a few people that I’m nuts. How could I possibly take on someone with unlimited funds and expect to win? But the first poll already shows we’re statistically tied: 46% to 45%.
**I’m running again for the U.S. Senate to flip this seat for working-class people, because I am sick and tired of the billionaires and corporations screwing over families like mine and getting away with it. They may think they can buy every Senate seat and write the laws to make themselves even richer. But ours is a movement, and we are just getting started.**
I’m not a billionaire. I can’t write my campaign a million-dollar check any time I want to. Instead, I’m funding my campaign entirely with donations from grassroots donors like you.
**We can defeat billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts and flip Nebraska’s Senate seat. But the only way I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and win is if grassroots donors like you chip in right now to my campaign:**
[**Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign for U.S. Senate against Republican Pete Ricketts here in Nebraska and Jacky Rosen's campaign? No amount is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111927310/558845874/358649031?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5567-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzZlN2I1My0xNjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ICeVg8cffdIIRFXu8VUVfQVs8AR28v413HW_satFKCc=)
There is so much at stake right now in our country. I am ready to go to Washington and give these billionaires hell. But I am counting on your donation now to help me win.

We can flip this Senate seat – but we can only do it together.
Thank you,

Dan Osborn
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=y1lR7ZHxiRneCptxUEoB38Ow%2BBL%2BLzx07q7oMBhtwNTt6XDVxZe4n1iRg39rqeX9G9jSkzPiXc9TRl8kyf%2BUoFBb%2F%2F5HQTbNA2lko%2B67b4khzLei8EzIbzJzTqrdYaMEGgrUrFCS%2B4ubEtaRn1ad9bBkhGCgAocEBlCNxJg67wfRcnaUjmJdqKxk8LPbltx%2BDenwu%2F78Vrblav0kZboqbbuNBCDWwvWWS23qS0Ha0NCcN9V1hbZXypGyuqlVjh%2FytNdNT%2FcASP8GeehC0owA43OtV4RUmb03yIVMw9mBtPIgwUqP7rt%2BKvFsENlhBaMQ2FBaH0Xx6oW6oCambSc1D3x%2BjdRgI10ePjjjz3MmvfwUWNx4pcZ6Ea0oI8%2FXKqnl7JnvMVEuFWs6IssLolZa6c1Fv0tVd6ipQqME4A9nBeE%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. name: Sean Feucht
subject: Resistance Is Coming From Canadian Bureaucrats!
body:
The Greater The Resistance, The Greater The Breakthrough!| | |
---
| |
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=fbd567399bcf44de98b5419777e78b3c&_e=rpVsJ92g7eXLq1cpS2_kX6ZJCRwJXYCEb1fc1Q2S8cactDwELDAMUyqbkebHdCa5M8aNOq9ImGqg1YkPCxEKh_NG30BYfEw_jF_n00JxIQ-CIHDH8f4nIOCFIy2mssiooccAiwZlXjex_GiEUWaHw_u6uShefN0_PkYUfPcDOXcV-vXpj9wKVV9-B2RdmCNr8Fz3iP3E8GBAsP1vi3_VECz572UPCV1K2wB9fW1CZdBC2WWvCz-UxMpNVeGXe6nvRpVlbfgU0_tR1Gi8F3rqlNH2jQ23gWWSDT0g85N4kzHFGG64f7xxlTYrPisUW-xrK1vibvacYQjA91oitr_NczaSBtHH2GjcbiQOIAlXdVa7WnE1h-QDKN9Pm9eo8jrunqHD8vNjctzceyPf_T7NsW0uKazIdr7RZrKjIO-tZ_E0MjufHOIJ748DRvCVfmrX1XWzAnJXEe9naPCjgUHOVg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
**Resistance is coming from Canadian bureaucrats!** Today, a Canadian newspaper published an article detailing the lengths bureaucrats and anti-Christian activists are going to in order to keep us from worshipping. I’m not surprised—and you shouldn’t be either! During the COVID-19 pandemic, Canadian politicians unleashed some of the most draconian restrictions on their citizens. Freedom of speech, freedom to gather, and freedom to worship were shamefully throttled—by the government itself. And that anti-worship sentiment is still in full effect. Just listen to this quote from a Canadian official: “I have the utmost respect for the value of free speech. I do not believe this event aligns with Parks Canada’s core values of respect for people, equity, diversity and inclusion, or integrity.” They claim to respect free speech—**but only when it aligns with woke ideology.**
---

Today, a Canadian newspaper published an article detailing the lengths bureaucrats and anti-Christian activists are going to in order to keep us from worshipping. I’m not surprised—and you shouldn’t be either! During the COVID-19 pandemic, Canadian politicians unleashed some of the most draconian restrictions on their citizens. Freedom of speech, freedom to gather, and freedom to worship were shamefully throttled—by the government itself. And that anti-worship sentiment is still in full effect. Just listen to this quote from a Canadian official: “I have the utmost respect for the value of free speech. ## Start your day in the know
Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same [YouTube channel](https://substack.com/redirect/91734523-965f-4eb8-83b4-1466eb085962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as my 6pm show. ## This week on The Sean Spicer Show...
We've got a great week coming up! Today I'm joined by Will Chamberlain then tune in Wednesday for my conversation wit journalist John Solomon of Just the News. Thursday we've got a great panel, featuring Elizabeth Mitchell, Mercedes Schlapp, and Larry O'Connor. Finally, Friday I'm talking with author Michael Shellenberger. Turn on notifications so you don't miss it!
## Wellness update...
If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center.
If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me!
## Making America healthy again...
Do you ever feel like we're in an information overload?
Between all of the wins of the Trump administration and the constant barrage of domestic and foreign stories, it can be hard to keep it all straight.
Well today I want to focus on something that hasn't been getting a ton of publicity, but deserves recognition.
It's the kind of objectively good news that we can all get behind.
I'm talking about MAHA and all of its latest accomplishments.
The White House recently released a fact sheet with all that RFK and the Department of Health and Human Services are doing to heal America from the inside out.
With all of the talk about economy and immigration and foreign policy, it can be easy to let good news like this slip through the cracks.
But I think it's important to talk about-- if for no other reason than because seems to transcend the partisan divide.
Just check out this chart that analyzes public support of MAHA:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/30c4cfd2-c6aa-4e91-8583-53e42eac8fac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Even the majority of very liberal participants hold at least a somewhat positive view of MAHA.
They must be doing something right... let's break it down. ...

clean_body: MAHA is healing the U.S. from the inside out. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more MAHA is healing the U.S. from the inside out. | | | Jul 22| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ICYMI: Judicial Watch Takes on the Epstein Case... Stories I'm reading... \- via New York Post \- via New York Post \- via Fox News \- via New York Post \- via The Hill Start your day in the know Are you starting you day in the know? Every morning at 9am ET you can join the Morning Meeting with myself, Mark Halperin and Dan Turrentine. We walk thru the news of the day like no one else and then take your questions. You can find it all on the same as my 6pm show. Make sure to subscribe and hit the notification button so you don't miss it! This week on The Sean Spicer Show... We've got a great week coming up! Today I'm joined by Will Chamberlain then tune in Wednesday for my conversation wit journalist John Solomon of Just the News. Thursday we've got a great panel, featuring Elizabeth Mitchell, Mercedes Schlapp, and Larry O'Connor. Finally, Friday I'm talking with author Michael Shellenberger. Turn on notifications so you don't miss it! Wellness update... If you watch the show or have been reading the newsletter for a while you know I have been on my own MAHA/wellness journey. One of the big things I have done is switched out many of the personal care products (soap, toothpaste, vitamins, etc) and home care products (cleaning supplies, detergent) with products from an American based, family company where wellness is front and center. If you are interested in finding out what I did, text INFO to 276-500-1185 and join me! Making America healthy again... Do you ever feel like we're in an information overload? Between all of the wins of the Trump administration and the constant barrage of domestic and foreign stories, it can be hard to keep it all straight. Well today I want to focus on something that hasn't been getting a ton of publicity, but deserves recognition. It's the kind of objectively good news that we can all get behind. I'm talking about MAHA and all of its latest accomplishments. The White House recently released a fact sheet with all that RFK and the Department of Health and Human Services are doing to heal America from the inside out. With all of the talk about economy and immigration and foreign policy, it can be easy to let good news like this slip through the cracks. But I think it's important to talk about-- if for no other reason than because seems to transcend the partisan divide. Just check out this chart that analyzes public support of MAHA: | | ---|---|--- Even the majority of very liberal participants hold at least a somewhat positive view of MAHA. They must be doing something right... let's break it down. ... name: Heritage Action National ICE Survey
subject: Do you still stand with ICE?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205gayf51dxxcnels3tmzlbs3yi0uz7np8szf3w8szb6u4ep3hzxucm98gjmtyy5g19rxi3socq2rcpg252&__stmp=szt7d8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szt7d8&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03u50sp47adcql0lz4u1seicjh5v37odyqn3rjv4tyvds77fbckxoyoz1n2f9ciawtxo9q4odfgprvlxcxricmwg00qsbq3twwb27rwybeky7hto3cicdlbo6ru87w8ou147bst2xw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szt7d8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szt7d8&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szt7d8&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szt7d8&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03u50sp47adcql0lz4u1seicjh5v37odyqn3rjv4tyvds77fbckxoyoz1n2f9ciawtxo9q4odfgprvlxcxricmwg00qsbq3twwb27rwybeky7hto3cicdlbo6ru87w8ou147bst2xw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szt7d8&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szt7d8&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: AOC and the Squad called for DOXING ICE agents!
body:
...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.

...But Karoline Leavitt just put them in their place.
| Friend,
---
There’s no question about it, far-left radicals and anti-American extremists have truly taken control of the Democrat Party...
---
Today’s Democrat leaders – a handful of socialist Senators, AOC, and the Squad – have called for the **DOXING** of the brave men and women of ICE who are simply trying to carry out their job.
---
**These radicals _knowingly_ put our law enforcement officers in harm's way. _It’s despicable_.**
---
Which is why, straight from the White House podium, Karoline Leavitt just sounded off on them!
---
**_She single-handedly ended AOC’s career when she left her SPEECHLESS with one simple statement:_**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdp5uj4kc7hq89ipg2l0ib9jm0acj2t3npu90it0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs) **“I would encourage AOC and other Democrats _to actually meet with the United States Border Patrol..._ These are honorable Americans who are just simply trying to do their job to enforce the law. They go home to their families every night, just like we all do, and they deserve respect and dignity for trying to enforce our nation's immigration laws and to remove public safety threats from our communities.”**
---
Friend, if you agree with Karoline, then we need YOU to go on record!
---
**We’re circulating a 10 MILLION-PATRIOT PETITION to __prove__ just how many American citizens proudly stand with ICE and demand these far-left radicals like AOC be _CENSURED_ for doxing our officers.**
---
[**So please, ADD YOUR NAME to the official petition right away to stand with our ICE agents. >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgovvrevl5lgsgh2f2j23makosckakquqd2d743o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I’ve Risked Everything for the Truth– Will You Stand with Me?
body:
There have been nights when I’ve questioned if it’s worth it. The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure—it takes a toll. I’ve sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety. But then I think of the lives we’ve touched. Like the voters who saw our exposés on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8na3a3kqkp65c9i93uqkr5gi54lol04jajocpi8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcn746823pvs3nb7mus7uv22uau9sq0f41no9h8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm writing to you not just as a journalist, but as someone who's poured his heart, soul, and life into a mission that's bigger than me.

For over 15 years, I've fought to expose the truth--about corruption, fraud, and the powerful who think they can hide in the shadows. It's been a journey of sacrifice, risk, and relentless determination, and I'm asking you to [**join me in this fight by supporting**O 'Keefe Media Group****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhbii14ono7amqh1rgjaagc8nlumcqqc9g0o0a88_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs).

Picture me in 2009, a kid from Westwood, New Jersey, with nothing but a cheap camera and a fire in my belly.

I grew up in a family that taught me to work hard and stand for what's right, but I had no money, no connections, just a belief that the American people deserved to know what was happening behind closed doors.

I maxed out credit cards to buy plane tickets and equipment, [**racking up $50,000 in debt for one investigation alone --exposing NPR's bias in 2011**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq31gkmkfjk5dib9ku7h3modiipfia8pd4kl36vg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs).

I'd lie awake at night, wondering how I'd pay it off, but I kept going because I knew the truth was worth it.

A few years before that in 2009, I got my big break. I went undercover at ACORN, a group funded by your tax dollars. Posing as a pimp and with an undercover journalist posing as a prostitute, we caught employees on hidden camera offering advice on dodging taxes and running illegal operations. The videos hit like a thunderbolt--**Congress cut ACORN 's funding, and the organization collapsed**.

It was proof that one person could change the game. But it also painted a target on my back. The powerful don't like being exposed**, and they 've been coming for me ever since**.

**[**Will you help me keep exposing the truth?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrgfpara76h34f2c9ddmfa8q0q741sg81b69u6hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)**

I need to raise **$28,400 as soon as possible** to fund our July operations, cover travel for our next sting, and pay our team. [**Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will keep our cameras rolling and our mission alive. Donate now.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z602divq1mb4m6jpicvubf8vpja1egbmam9cmhv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

In 2010, I faced one of my darkest moments.

I was arrested for entering Senator Mary Landrieu's office, investigating claims she was ignoring constituents during the healthcare debate. Despite showing my ID went I entered the building, I was still charged for entering a federal building under false pretenses.

The government slapped me with felony charges, and I spent a night in a jail cell, [**staring at the walls, wondering if my dream was over.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5emklqpdrt88c9m02idanakfgqcagrdboona3gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

I was 25, facing years in prison, and the media painted me as a villain. But I thought of the people counting on me--the Americans who deserved to know the truth--and I refused to give up.

I pleaded guilty to a misdemeanor, got three years of probation, 100 hours of community service, and a $1,500 fine. **Even on probation, I didn 't stop**. I built a team of citizen journalists and kept digging, exposing voter fraud and media bias while under the government's thumb.

That resilience paid off. In 2011, we released videos that forced NPR's CEO and executives to resign, revealing their bias to the world.

In 2014, I crossed the Rio Grande dressed as Osama bin Laden to expose border security failures, sparking a U.S. Senate investigation. My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, called me "one of the great journalists," and **Rush Limbaugh said our NPR sting was a "grand slam."**

But every victory came with a cost--more lawsuits, more threats, more attempts to silence me.

**[**Your support can keep this fight alive**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zetosurrr83arnp8t9cbv0b1n6fjrie9j254kgq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)****.** We're the only ones exposing the bureaucrats undermining our Republic, and we need **$28,400 by in days** to continue. [**A donation of $50 or $200 will fund our next investigation and protect our work from activist lawsuits**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl24gklfvrfh74a2he8isdcup9c0a3ud8n8iqpb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs).

The hardest blow came in 2021.

**I woke up to the FBI pounding on my door in Mamaroneck, New York, raiding my home over a diary allegedly belonging to President Biden 's daughter. **

They took my phones, my computers, everything--trying to scare me into submission.

I stood in my apartment, watching them tear through my life, and felt the weight of their power.

But I also felt a fire inside me.

If they were coming this hard, it meant I was hitting a nerve.

I refused to back down, speaking out on Fox News with Sean Hannity, declaring, "This is an attack on the First Amendment." That moment strengthened my resolve to keep fighting, no matter the odds.

The lawsuits have been relentless.

From ACORN employees to activist attorneys, I've faced legal battles that would break most people. Even my own organization, Project Veritas, sued me in 2023, alleging financial mismanagement after I founded O'Keefe Media Group.

They tried to bury me, but I kept going, **because the truth is bigger than any one fight.**

**[**I need you now more than ever**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkpsbn8dqpq1ov3586ulhrlhfs455gplgdopopkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)****.** Summer donations are down, and [**we must raise**$28,400 within days** to keep exposing corruption. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z82sup76ir9965r1eqssbjatgf9imjpbs5sgvpog_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

[**Your gift of $25 or $75 will help us train citizen journalists and fight back against those trying to silence us. Donate today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqrdb2i02q91mggvoni8f74ekks7abbfse9m7h40_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

There have been nights when I've questioned if it's worth it.

The legal bills, the threats, the constant pressure--it takes a toll.

I've sacrificed relationships, financial security, and my own safety.

But then I think of the lives we've touched. Like the voters who saw our exposes on election and Voter ID fraud, leading to new laws in multiple states.

Or the families who benefited when we exposed Medicaid incompetence, forcing retraining. Every time I feel like giving up, I remember why I started: **because the American people deserve a government that serves them, not one that hides behind lies.**

With **O 'Keefe Media Group**, I'm building a legacy.

We're not just reporting news--we're training an army of citizen journalists to carry the torch. Our recent work has exposed media cover-ups, government waste, and corporate greed, sparking firings and policy reviews. But we're not done.

The bureaucrats undermining President Trump's agenda, wasting your tax dollars, and pushing their own agendas are still out there. **We 're the only ones holding them accountable with hidden cameras and fearless journalism.**

**[**Will you stand with me?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z18l0j3mfvcd6utob63196joru5c4kjtnph417n0_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)**

[**We need**$28,400 within days** to keep going. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlfjr34pta8s1sq7cjtpamqp3v4tr57khqqncego_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

[**Your donation of $50, $100, or $500 is a direct blow against corruption, ensuring the truth reaches millions.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z163jh2n38hkjivsu7n1gn5m8am015vem84o8op8_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

I'm not an activist. I'm a journalist, driven by an obsession to uncover what the powerful want hidden.

The mainstream media won't do it--they're too busy protecting the elites.

But I've never backed down, and I never will. I've risked everything for this mission, and I'm asking you to join me.

Your support isn't just a donation--[**it 's a lifeline**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrgso5lqptpnit1r1publfvsh83io2esovp8tbtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs).

It's a statement that you believe in truth, transparency, **and the fight for our Republic**.

Please, if my story moves you, if you believe in what we're doing, [**donate today**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5snkor5uemt9ksb4r9l8v7u35liamgrlm10ih08_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs). [**We 're down to the wire, and every dollar counts. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr0tr7kjmgpm5v2lj34ju0cgnfhoapilqao2f5lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb6c9i66oj4cph2bs)

Together, we can keep **exposing the truth and holding the powerful accountable**.

Thanks for standing with me,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

clean_body: Friends, We’re just six months into the Trump-Malliotakis majority — and we’re already delivering MAJOR WINS for New York City’s only Republican-held seat. Help keep our momentum going. | Friends, We’re just six months into the Trump-Malliotakis majority — and we’re already delivering MAJOR WINS for New York City’s only Republican-held seat. | | Here’s what we’ve achieved for Staten Island and Southern Brooklyn so far: ✅ Secured our border and ended NYC’s migrant crisis ✅ Quadrupled the SALT deduction for middle-class homeowners ✅ Delivered the largest tax cut in history for seniors and working families ✅ Brought NYC gas prices down by 50 cents a gallon ✅ Secured funding for our ferry system and regional airports ✅ Rescinded Biden’s disastrous congestion pricing plan ✅ Shut down the Floyd Bennett Field migrant encampment and saved Aviator Sports Complex But make no mistake: the far-left is FURIOUS. They want revenge — and they see NY-11 as their golden opportunity to erase the only Republican voice in New York City. Friends, we CANNOT let that happen! | | | | | | | | | | | | | The battle for the House could come down to this one seat. With your support, we can keep delivering results, defending our values, and putting America — and New York — FIRST. Let’s win this together. Thanks, Nicole P.S. Democrats won this seat in the last Trump midterm. I won it back in 2020. But now they’re throwing everything they’ve got in an attempt to repeat history. | | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Support Jonathan Nez’s historic run
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3328%2E400544%2El4_dfU)
Folks,
I’m proud to support Jonathan Nez’s campaign for Congress next door in Arizona’s 2nd District. He’s spent his career fighting for everyday folks in rural Arizona, and represents the type of “Dirt Road Democrat” who can win in tough districts.
Just like me, Jonathan Nez has spent his career in public service here in the Southwest. He’s worked tirelessly to improve the lives of community members throughout rural Arizona, including his time as President of Navajo Nation.
He’s a man of faith and family, but unlike his opponent, _Jonathan Nez doesn’t have billionaires and special interests on call to fund his campaign._ He’s counting on folks like you to help build this movement.
**[Will you please split a donation today between me and Jonathan Nez to support his historic run for Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_1_split?refcode=em20250722-3328&refcode2=3328_400544_l4_dfU&akid=3328%2E400544%2El4_dfU)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_1_split?refcode=em20250722-3328&refcode2=3328_400544_l4_dfU&akid=3328%2E400544%2El4_dfU)**
Unlike his opponent Eli Crane, Jonathan Nez is a proven leader who has always put results over partisan politics. He’s grounded in the real concerns of his district, while Eli Crane hits the right-wing podcast circuit from his McMansion in a gated community well outside of the district boundaries.
Nez’s district is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – winning this seat is critical to taking back the House. [**Will you join me in supporting his campaign by splitting a donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_1_split?refcode=em20250722-3328&refcode2=3328_400544_l4_dfU&akid=3328%2E400544%2El4_dfU)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_1_split?refcode=em20250722-3328&refcode2=3328_400544_l4_dfU&akid=3328%2E400544%2El4_dfU)**
Thanks for your time and support,
Deb Haaland

clean_body: Folks, I’m proud to support Jonathan Nez’s campaign for Congress next door in Arizona’s 2nd District. He’s spent his career fighting for everyday folks in rural Arizona, and represents the type of “Dirt Road Democrat” who can win in tough districts. Just like me, Jonathan Nez has spent his career in public service here in the Southwest. He’s worked tirelessly to improve the lives of community members throughout rural Arizona, including his time as President of Navajo Nation. He’s a man of faith and family, but unlike his opponent, Jonathan Nez doesn’t have billionaires and special interests on call to fund his campaign. He’s counting on folks like you to help build this movement. Unlike his opponent Eli Crane, Jonathan Nez is a proven leader who has always put results over partisan politics. He’s grounded in the real concerns of his district, while Eli Crane hits the right-wing podcast circuit from his McMansion in a gated community well outside of the district boundaries. Nez’s district is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – winning this seat is critical to taking back the House. Thanks for your time and support, Deb Haaland

name: Illegal Immigration Alerts
subject: Tom Homan Addresses Death Threats
body:
Did you read his powerful response?
| Friend,
---
This is sickening.
---
President Trump’s border czar Tom Homan has received **_death threats_** simply for enforcing our country’s immigration laws.
---
The Left is hoping these threats will break Homan into submission and force him to call off the deportations.
---
But Homan didn’t flinch. Here’s his response to these despicable threats:
---
**“I’M NOT GOING ANYWHERE.”** [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6384050d3bb142aeb488c50636eeafd4&_e=OxCnHYe0jPaTp5epDOZsNqJzKHll4BYn1YdEjYjOC3VoabW8yP-A_11nmtpO1AjMLRvzuJUs9lcuAOIh711O8FO1aitQpMrxKIA9qAPurymEqfjwAsKL1f4ZLyNPDoxWAb-yR44YM98LEb6NCZ_spXObFK-Oj7FdSVUMXo2DlD3nWQ1i_Yl_PyIkxRGXYUl8ismInurOFVddpdKkfdIOf_2RTZxsX-wvV2f2-sdbNwn-P_XCPaSC5TP1KaFAqhb9jAGE7w1SI9jvELsOCvLU2bRzSQaG9mrvqhv7NT-ItBS2KCwyIPiScCT_9kYzxm2LWvUOmGYv5iJdyDK-McbmzXuZnF1GA6hE4AwKkW2uKtX8uXn6OBI4_LbNmvynWQQu9V_9a60ceVOKCv9pZuAGbWK2QnGGdm-y25JP8QpwL27vX13J5g0k5D0sJcVfMEFvAuXLPBzVgUzBdymzkc5tJCmSevJT8V9SCWkKk2L-tcr7Law1pZ6ECXJRoFA9J_wyO1QHBolFoI45W4si2qebd-AMkbct3beyVMLRgcERz5LwDZXH5xkANCubQ2TPbC5n0o3wfvhQqvm1AJrJ3pRBY1WUGRpmquTWBNZDjGUYJ0E%3D)

That’s the spine of steel America needs to start WINNING again. Thank God President Trump has put a true patriot in charge of securing the border and making America safe again.
---
**_Tom Homan isn’t backing down. Instead, he’s DOUBLING down!_**
---
_That’s why – until every last illegal is deported, Homan wants to be sure that absolutely _NONE_ of them are counted in the next United States Census._

**_“I think [the Biden] administration thought these millions of people were going to be future Democratic voters. But one of the things Biden also did, in addition to destroying all the programs we put in place to give us the most secure border, he overturned the Trump Census rule, which means _millions of people they release in sanctuary cities will be counted in the next Census_ , which is going to result in what? Simply put, this is a dire moment for our country...

name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: UPDATE: Reaching our 50 state goal
body:
Showing up where Republicans aren’t.
---
Hi Derek, we’re reaching out to share a big update with you today → Earlier this year, the DNC announced our goal to host a People’s Town Hall in every single state nationwide. In the aftermath of disastrous policy choices from Trump and his Republican allies, we’ve seen Republicans outright _refuse_ to talk to their constituents, so we decided to do it for them. We’ve spent the last four months making sure that folks have an outlet to voice their concerns about the government that is meant to represent them. Democratic voices — including Sen. Cory Booker, Gov. Tim Walz, Sen. Elizabeth Warren, and so many more — have joined us to talk to communities across the country. Red, blue, or purple, we believe everyone deserves a government that listens to their voices and represents them. **And we just hosted a People’s Town Hall in our 50th state.** In just about four months, we’ve hosted _over 130_ of these town halls across the country to reach folks everywhere, no matter who they voted for last year. And we’re not slowing down — if anything, hitting this milestone has only motivated us to keep pushing. **We’ve said it before, but we’ll say it again: If Republicans aren’t willing to show up for their own voters, we’ll do it for them.** [If you believe in a government that shows up for its people regardless of difference or location, please consider donating to the DNC today so we can continue to show up for communities nationwide — red, blue, and everywhere in between.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250722_4021_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4038_22930333_eb7vqt&akid=4038%2E22930333%2Eeb7vqt) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250722_4021_fr&refcode2=4038_22930333_eb7vqt&akid=4038%2E22930333%2Eeb7vqt)**

**Live on Zoom** In this educational session, we’ll break down the science of stem cells in a simple way for you to understand. You'll learn:
* What stem cells are and how they function
* How regenerative therapies are ethically and safely sourced
* Why regenerative therapies are used in the U.S. as a wellness adjunct, not a treatment or cure
* How regenerative stem cell-based therapies may support individuals with autism and other neurological conditions
* What to look for when considering providers or clinics
* Real testimonials of the benefits of regenerative therapy

Whether you’re a parent, practitioner, or simply curious, this webinar is designed to educate and empower you with practical knowledge. ** Registration is FREE but required.**

name: Attorney General Jason Miyares
subject: Why I ran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
While others play politics, I protect the people| | | Friend,

**My mom, Miriam, fled Communist Cuba with nothing but her courage.** She found freedom in America, and decades later, she cast her vote for me to serve in the House of Delegates.
That moment changed everything.
**I’ve never forgotten the look in her eyes.** _Her story is why I fight — to defend this country, this Commonwealth, and everything we hold dear._
In a world full of division, I’ve chosen service. **While others play politics, I protect the people:** _✅ Safer schools_
_ ✅ Fewer murders_
_ ✅ Deadly fentanyl off our streets_
_ ✅ Justice for crime victims_
_ ✅ Accountability for the radicals_
I’ll **never** stop fighting for what matters. And I’m asking you to stand with me.
👉 _**[Stand with me — become a People’s Protector team member today.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/k5u8Na3lqPl4oqYv4JdArKIWbbq4f0NxDpgeCvmlczrlelDTGPt4FnKEpY5jpyWGHgRveKOwT6cXrsWeyC2WsMmkVQlwKfKPJ6rzlbJDXSQWc35a3a5lNSV4UDALxnRv-f0zVdd4aIVa2oLN9H4WG5btatPnYyx4VNKcwnSCei27wPLeg0ykZXIoQMIvqMOTu6s0zZLa2sv5VRcj4u93GoOdKHwNd_s7_GySq1SSKynnPPjY0wJZ7onlzuOtvOeKhunYLvmIn_olwPDkIWKs2fMJCuY8w69J5KlFzgdyNWEul-1H-DnWwOlnYQpUSSfhsPYJCWuuulgaYzDSlmDxt2fRJqBwk4T-MjR9Q071ZTJGAb98stDcF9-3UtbPegyavf8X_0K_MQHgsb1IBkUa7Azls0CAJvTPH_rNFdR7SP1cvwHR6V2tmwYFyCVVs3QIV3uwWsIfNr0mEt98_k9zdcLhp04Bw37ZhMgxTxwiuszl5l7NkyLWMJxO1AJA6fkZUpPPo37vomrdJqq1JOyzTY7TPuYQOC2vu2lsISQAa35fCztw9zzwXoPF22lImX3bOnsWpQ-lImsqNe81mjbH/sz4nanUfGnJAfrFS3Q0mkHzS70uonVSw/11)**_

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I deployed nine times to over 70 countries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, I thrive in tough fights. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington |

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=ff5ce5f7d89f4339b340cb1b57ee01b5&_e=u-IZpSYF7NjsK4zydhqXEgZlNVPHEXHoZM2HXKvrRw1AYnWN_fP9iISAMO7tVn4Hpy-NYx1OtmggJA0jkitVbyu6bvkM2t-FNGX5hf19wdT30Dk_jEmrDhINO5oaxlY5sW_bqSElA00sYawpsKM_kie3Vktj6uRYNj7w6MSCuPQ0Qovf088nkIWj8VNGeoBgmSWQqm6WcHTqh7-zUMScumA3Di-VX-6OwL3eAy-BSspfumDAg3GWjETW-QWCyXh8g7t7FnBZsT6odbuVckCPkAX9WaTQ4zUaZlZ0YFXQ9TCPTgorN7RtwURV1F0Ghd5Mq0PAq2oqh3Wa28LkLm-rTQqb9JMFwWdb0ABtZRSRxxiKNjtAJYFWawSRUKwS5V7jQhFHmtone3p_fUkxP7DS8yHTH-6cppmMMrE1ATteDJuVk2GenTZUMsXLQ_HseD_EPtR81W1Xl7SbhY5IxyHjZtlbu31MUFDoozgmyFzL96dnBep0N02pJd4k7td-kHJCtMhKX6Ozrjczu_-voQl5UYoLzEWFcooXZdJVjuv7gqYd2Pmff6ColCmIKdxaXx8XeVS27tsa7HpfyhQdphHm5xKe0FbOVt5PxXSc0rHbCp0yDAp-5sFJZx8iN-Cgzhz-S8cwX6MJuWNobh0Qxj9cC2dMzswXM10EC6bcNrVFRRM-YXskveaoWzRvdWmRvNC2g0uM5LOgyoOlCWLj4ALKkMOBlS-riuVCnMzgIZ3F-DpjNv_zx0cEITsSlXQCfcMsHqfFDGo889jsx64HXLKBWCP2PbkR95huV9hWKD5Qa1Q%3D)

**I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing** , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. At the end of the day, my request of you will end in one of two ways:
* 1.) **[you contribute to help elect a former Navy SEAL to the United States Senate](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=ff5ce5f7d89f4339b340cb1b57ee01b5&_e=u-IZpSYF7NjsK4zydhqXEgZlNVPHEXHoZM2HXKvrRw1AYnWN_fP9iISAMO7tVn4Hpy-NYx1OtmggJA0jkitVbyu6bvkM2t-FNGX5hf19wdT30Dk_jEmrDhINO5oaxlY5sW_bqSElA00sYawpsKM_kie3Vktj6uRYNj7w6MSCuPQ0Qovf088nkIWj8VNGeoBgmSWQqm6WcHTqh7-zUMScumA3Di-VX-6OwL3eAy-BSspfumDAg3GWjETW-QWCyXh8g7t7FnBZsT6odbuVckCPkAX9WaTQ4zUaZlZ0YFXQ9TDarQP3WPd9JCRL9G31iNU4YEc1TR5NSrPBGK7zfFSv_IlBiV0y1ITjZxutK1u7mldwujDQWUyGUPukgWxESYvCJ2hSaVeA7g8kT3zQQ9m4-XsHnxtubZusQaRUgxGbzY7dLgvGYzOt-BNog6WElpXz3TYjH5DjkTy1z6XHaWmegmZyuXOFTBTRMth5K9w5rFHzsm3BS0znsGPrVLSlVzB1A_G-qZEqOQhlOf9BC7Ro9UDyoF70EhbxlJ75dj2vKREz-ACHLPTQpKuUku0wMyNQ9Fw4lgNBe3080yj6YvqcjsXc4mnVb6reBt_okLlEGw2_cVsr6bwFJMtmNORGtz18Qoy9oRz2J9rKah3m--yxS5ZY9YCJWq_HHEbalyXRMP2DdL3L4WpD_QKHakAys7ac0S72Vf-effQnrwp1G8B-Xvxn2xebet2mTCOHsFTo4EltIgR83XCh5oCUmJlnbEfVJk7dkr-oEneHSBjtMpnPrTN9aBW0Dh_iLjwTjXQrLj8%3D)**.
* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND
CONTRIBUTE $2 OR MORE **](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=ff5ce5f7d89f4339b340cb1b57ee01b5&_e=u-IZpSYF7NjsK4zydhqXEgZlNVPHEXHoZM2HXKvrRw1AYnWN_fP9iISAMO7tVn4Hpy-NYx1OtmggJA0jkitVbyu6bvkM2t-FNGX5hf19wdT30Dk_jEmrDhINO5oaxlY5sW_bqSElA00sYawpsKM_kie3Vktj6uRYNj7w6MSCuPQ0Qovf088nkIWj8VNGeoBgmSWQqm6WcHTqh7-zUMScumA3Di-VX-6OwL3eAy-BSspfumDAg3GWjETW-QWCyXh8g7t7FnBZsT6odbuVckCPkAX9WaTQ4zUaZlZ0YFXQ9TBvhXL77f2PV1mxsdT65DkADWIqXbEoCvgj-6jhlrzWErV_PWD_ZliT9PG2bfXwWHvGiBUGUxA11YtqED0riKAAemwrwEjgvf44RVd6YHYsDPTmedPOjkoh7V3amqHjEitOzIyz36AR0qb6rjH9st1WQOOMsFGt3lZ8k46qxAcNtlH41C6ht9LDV4inEt1ysOd0VMIIYTybCRlFo3c-HpvInjVtw0pEQHUWaC-qjVMzS1pSWZyn97b2ZNiEi2uE6AEqZfEpDXXR9E3EcYHDbQ9FVQa42kH6-aDR4W2fpyxilykWoicD0RxLWK8_xbaCLOmYLCiD_hUa3MuH8IU6H6X6oCHa0etEmMiA3vwC7RicRa8FAlWd02awmE7wENV2Zxgw-biw-rkn9Do1CfPpwlTONZ0ivd6Ak2ItxeTqBOlohoi0OayZl9f8Gr4FmeVcawaq54e-qNK_-j64gdrqYP20TMqrVXvTIoxdyOTZmwmRUaMEbHs9w0CEqy72JdiyLqE%3D)
**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war. Minnesota is at a crossroads. While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe. This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves. If you are reading this email right now and you don’t live in Minnesota, then I’m sure you’ll agree with me that every American must be represented by individuals in Congress who want to build a better version of the America we live in today—individuals of integrity. That’s not who my opponent is. We have an incredible opportunity to elect a Republican to the U.S. Senate next year - something voters in this state haven’t done since they re-elected former Senator Norm Coleman in 2002. I’ve faced worse odds overseas and am ready to bring that same grit to Washington. Here’s what I stand for: Restoring law and order by supporting our police and cracking down on crime. Cutting taxes and regulations to ease the burden on retirees and small businesses. Securing our borders to protect our communities and sovereignty. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. The Democrats have deep pockets, and the radical left will stop at nothing to keep this seat. I’m running to serve you, to protect our way of life, and to ensure Minnesota remains a place where faith, family, and freedom thrive. I hope you’ll invest in me right now – any amount will help. With gratitude, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

name: Mamdani Update via Our Revolution
subject: They're freezing Mamdani out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

After finally meeting with Zohran Mamdani last week, House Democratic
Leader Hakeem Jeffries left the meeting and refused to endorse him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32966?source=email-20250722&t=1011&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Headline: Mamdani finally meets Jeffries — and comes up short

It’s clear what is happening here: once again, the Democratic
establishment, beholden to AIPAC and billionaire interests, is turning its
back on the will of the people.

This is the same establishment that demands progressives line up behind
their chosen nominees – but refuses to unite behind candidates like
Mamdani when it matters most. That’s not democracy – it's hypocrisy. And
we’re NOT going to stand for it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32966?source=email-20250722&t=1012&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Add your name to demand Jeffries and the Democratic establishment
listen to the will of the people and back Zohran Mamdani!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32966?source=email-20250722&t=1013&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]ADD YOUR NAME

AIPAC and dark money corporate donors see Mamdani’s campaign as a threat.
They’re working overtime to defeat him by flooding the race with millions
in donations to candidates willing to run against him – and they’re
counting on Democratic leaders to help. Every time “leaders” freeze out a
candidate supported by real people, they send a message: only their chosen
few deserve power.

But our movement knows better. We believe in backing leaders who fight for
us – not for billionaire donors or political insiders.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32966?source=email-20250722&t=1014&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Bernie tweet following his great meeting with Mamdani, warning about
the oligarchs preparing to undermine democracy and his campaign

Last week, Our Revolution delivered thousands of signatures directly to
New York Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, urging her to listen to grassroots
voices and back Mamdani. And we’re ready to do it again and again to make
sure other establishment Democrats hear our message loud and clear.

Let’s be clear: when an establishment-backed candidate wins their primary,
progressives are told to fall in line “for the sake of unity.” But when
it’s a people-powered candidate like Mamdani, that standard vanishes. This
double standard silences our movement and undermines the will of
Democratic voters.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32966?source=email-20250722&t=1015&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]We can’t let this stand. Add your name now to tell Jeffries and the
Democratic leadership: back Mamdani NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32966?source=email-20250722&t=1016&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

The Our Revolution Team

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9067%2E5885482%2E-fvsjf ]Website |

clean_body: If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing Republicans in state legislatures across the map. | | | | | ---|--- | 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading. State Democrats are facing competitive special elections over the next few months. We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who can defeat the far-right MAGA agenda. If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪 But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC. Together, we can power state Democrats to victory in elections that are typically underfunded and overlooked. 🗳️ | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | We hope you can step up today. 🙂 Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Ben Blom
subject: Which animal will grace the calendar cover? Vote now!
body:
Our first ever wildlife focused calendar!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111932145/558862297/779512579?contactdata=Q5C9fgBRE+ueIUMXnPXAx0UiqZVJ/ysy2LBftI4m1kR8BqfCBG6ZO8NinNl7b8v2bQAoYpOnWrFLlA78ynz1yrx9HZiXxj+D/cTu7oddpOi2iAdznSnJxZBqaQydD5Gvri7CTaVVUEMUdyqc+5JM4baq+uwKxrbO5xX9chWH3Vs=&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmYTYyYzIzLTFmNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uxkWnndXLWvTc-l9CsA5FQ8Ftz1pWBSMNqdfOS8x2eU=&emci=52cde83d-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=afa62c23-1f67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
Hi Peter,
It’s time to [**vote for the cover of our 2026 calendar!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111932146/558862298/-192495310?contactdata=Q5C9fgBRE+ueIUMXnPXAx0UiqZVJ/ysy2LBftI4m1kR8BqfCBG6ZO8NinNl7b8v2bQAoYpOnWrFLlA78ynz1yrx9HZiXxj+D/cTu7oddpOi2iAdznSnJxZBqaQydD5Gvri7CTaVVUEMUdyqc+5JM4baq+uwKxrbO5xX9chWH3Vs=&ms=26Calendar2_Link1&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmYTYyYzIzLTFmNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uxkWnndXLWvTc-l9CsA5FQ8Ftz1pWBSMNqdfOS8x2eU=&emci=52cde83d-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=afa62c23-1f67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551) This year, I wanted to thank you for your participation and highlight a few milestones in our restoration work across California.
While I believe that every redwood animal deserves their own spotlight in our calendar, they especially deserve protected habitats to thrive in.
**To me, the 2026 calendar showcases our habitat restoration wins:**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111932147/558862299/-192495310?contactdata=Q5C9fgBRE+ueIUMXnPXAx0UiqZVJ/ysy2LBftI4m1kR8BqfCBG6ZO8NinNl7b8v2bQAoYpOnWrFLlA78ynz1yrx9HZiXxj+D/cTu7oddpOi2iAdznSnJxZBqaQydD5Gvri7CTaVVUEMUdyqc+5JM4baq+uwKxrbO5xX9chWH3Vs=&ms=26Calendar2_Image1&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmYTYyYzIzLTFmNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uxkWnndXLWvTc-l9CsA5FQ8Ftz1pWBSMNqdfOS8x2eU=&emci=52cde83d-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=afa62c23-1f67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551) | **🌲** A Humboldt marten, a species once thought extinct, was spotted near one of our restoration sites. With only 500 in Northern California and Oregon, sightings are rare (so rare we used a cousin’s photo, the Pine marten!), but as we work to restore and reconnect their habitat, we hope to see more.
---|---
**🐟** In a section of Streelow Creek in the North Coast region that was buried for over 60 years, our aquatics habitat monitoring team found 40 trout and a variety of amphibians in a newly restored area of the creek, just _one year_ after the restoration. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111932148/558862300/-192495310?contactdata=Q5C9fgBRE+ueIUMXnPXAx0UiqZVJ/ysy2LBftI4m1kR8BqfCBG6ZO8NinNl7b8v2bQAoYpOnWrFLlA78ynz1yrx9HZiXxj+D/cTu7oddpOi2iAdznSnJxZBqaQydD5Gvri7CTaVVUEMUdyqc+5JM4baq+uwKxrbO5xX9chWH3Vs=&ms=26Calendar2_Image2&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmYTYyYzIzLTFmNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uxkWnndXLWvTc-l9CsA5FQ8Ftz1pWBSMNqdfOS8x2eU=&emci=52cde83d-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=afa62c23-1f67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
---|---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111932149/558862301/-192495310?contactdata=Q5C9fgBRE+ueIUMXnPXAx0UiqZVJ/ysy2LBftI4m1kR8BqfCBG6ZO8NinNl7b8v2bQAoYpOnWrFLlA78ynz1yrx9HZiXxj+D/cTu7oddpOi2iAdznSnJxZBqaQydD5Gvri7CTaVVUEMUdyqc+5JM4baq+uwKxrbO5xX9chWH3Vs=&ms=26Calendar2_Image3&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmYTYyYzIzLTFmNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uxkWnndXLWvTc-l9CsA5FQ8Ftz1pWBSMNqdfOS8x2eU=&emci=52cde83d-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=afa62c23-1f67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551) | **🦉** In the Southern Sierra, our monitoring efforts have confirmed nesting pairs of spotted owls and goshawks (pictured here) in our Alder Creek and Freeman Creek project areas. Our restoration efforts are increasing wildfire resilience in these nesting areas, ensuring these species have a safer place to live.
---|---
These stories are just a glimpse of the revival happening across our landscapes, and we want the calendar cover to reflect this spirit of renewal.
[ Vote for the 2026 Calendar Cover ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111932150/558862302/-192495310?contactdata=Q5C9fgBRE+ueIUMXnPXAx0UiqZVJ/ysy2LBftI4m1kR8BqfCBG6ZO8NinNl7b8v2bQAoYpOnWrFLlA78ynz1yrx9HZiXxj+D/cTu7oddpOi2iAdznSnJxZBqaQydD5Gvri7CTaVVUEMUdyqc+5JM4baq+uwKxrbO5xX9chWH3Vs=&ms=26Calendar2_Button&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmYTYyYzIzLTFmNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uxkWnndXLWvTc-l9CsA5FQ8Ftz1pWBSMNqdfOS8x2eU=&emci=52cde83d-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=afa62c23-1f67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)
While we don’t have photos of all the wildlife I mentioned, the selected images symbolize the resilience of nature and the power of our collective efforts.
**[Voting closes on July 25, so be sure to tell us your favorite redwood star!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111932152/558862304/-192495310?contactdata=Q5C9fgBRE+ueIUMXnPXAx0UiqZVJ/ysy2LBftI4m1kR8BqfCBG6ZO8NinNl7b8v2bQAoYpOnWrFLlA78ynz1yrx9HZiXxj+D/cTu7oddpOi2iAdznSnJxZBqaQydD5Gvri7CTaVVUEMUdyqc+5JM4baq+uwKxrbO5xX9chWH3Vs=&ms=26Calendar2_Link2&sourceid=1166591&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFmYTYyYzIzLTFmNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uxkWnndXLWvTc-l9CsA5FQ8Ftz1pWBSMNqdfOS8x2eU=&emci=52cde83d-ef5c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=afa62c23-1f67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1504551)**
Thank you for your support in restoring and protecting these vital ecosystems.
With gratitude,
| Ben Blom
Director of Stewardship and Restoration
---|---

clean_body: Our first ever wildlife focused calendar! Hi Peter, It’s time to This year, I wanted to thank you for your participation and highlight a few milestones in our restoration work across California. While I believe that every redwood animal deserves their own spotlight in our calendar, they especially deserve protected habitats to thrive in. To me, the 2026 calendar showcases our habitat restoration wins: | 🌲 A Humboldt marten, a species once thought extinct, was spotted near one of our restoration sites. With only 500 in Northern California and Oregon, sightings are rare (so rare we used a cousin’s photo, the Pine marten!), but as we work to restore and reconnect their habitat, we hope to see more. ---|--- 🐟 In a section of Streelow Creek in the North Coast region that was buried for over 60 years, our aquatics habitat monitoring team found 40 trout and a variety of amphibians in a newly restored area of the creek, just one year after the restoration. | ---|--- | 🦉 In the Southern Sierra, our monitoring efforts have confirmed nesting pairs of spotted owls and goshawks (pictured here) in our Alder Creek and Freeman Creek project areas. Our restoration efforts are increasing wildfire resilience in these nesting areas, ensuring these species have a safer place to live. ---|--- These stories are just a glimpse of the revival happening across our landscapes, and we want the calendar cover to reflect this spirit of renewal. While we don’t have photos of all the wildlife I mentioned, the selected images symbolize the resilience of nature and the power of our collective efforts. Thank you for your support in restoring and protecting these vital ecosystems. With gratitude, | Ben Blom Director of Stewardship and Restoration ---|--- Photos by Jeremy Hynes / Unsplash, Tom Koerner / USFWS, and Sasha Matic / Unsplash | ---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Carolina at United We Dream
subject: DACA recipients need us now more than ever
body:
Times are tough. We won’t survive without depending on each other. | | | Peter — Our fight to support DACA recipients and immigrant youth has never been more important, but times are tough. More people than ever before are set to lose their health insurance. Low-income families will struggle to afford food. Our loved ones, neighbors, and family members will be snatched off the streets, abducted, and disappeared using taxpayer money. **There is no surviving this moment on our own**. We must come together as working people across all backgrounds to fight back, and there’s an urgent opportunity for you to support that fight. Across the country, DACA recipients are facing an uncertain future. We’re crowdfunding the resources they need to renew their DACA status, keep families together, and empower immigrant youth with a clear message: **_Your home is here._** [**The cost of renewing DACA has increased to $555 online, and even more for paper applications. Please, make a donation to our DACA Renewal Fund today. clean_body: Times are tough. We won’t survive without depending on each other. | | | Peter — Our fight to support DACA recipients and immigrant youth has never been more important, but times are tough. More people than ever before are set to lose their health insurance. Low-income families will struggle to afford food. Our loved ones, neighbors, and family members will be snatched off the streets, abducted, and disappeared using taxpayer money. There is no surviving this moment on our own. We must come together as working people across all backgrounds to fight back, and there’s an urgent opportunity for you to support that fight. Across the country, DACA recipients are facing an uncertain future. We’re crowdfunding the resources they need to renew their DACA status, keep families together, and empower immigrant youth with a clear message: Your home is here. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We know DACA is legal and right. Our fight to protect our communities continues, not only in the courts, but in our everyday lives. The need for our DACA Renewal Fund is at an all-time high, and your generosity will ensure we don’t have to turn anyone away. | Stay informed as things evolve quickly by texting DACA INFO to 787-57 to remain in the loop. It’s up to us to fight with and for each other. Thank you. — Carolina, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

clean_body: In just his first six months in office, President Trump is already the most successful President in recent history, racking up victory after victory. | Fellow American, In just his first six months in office, President Trump is already the most successful President in recent history, racking up victory after victory. After months of failing, the Democrats and their allies in the mainstream media are changing tactics to derail President Trump’s historic winning streak. We need to be 100% united behind President Trump at this critical moment if we’re going to combat these lies and keep delivering for the American people. Your response has never been more critical than it is right now. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

Friend, Florida isn’t just leading the way. We’re writing the playbook for America’s comeback. Under Governor Ron DeSantis, Florida became the _first_ state to officially partner with the Trump administration to crack down on criminal illegal aliens. We took a bold stance —** _and we’re winning._** Just look at Alligator Alcatraz**,** Florida’s own deportation center, that’s taking violent illegal aliens _off our streets and out of our communities_. **[It’s working so well that at least five other GOP-led states are looking to follow Florida’s lead and implement their own version of Alligator Alcatraz.](http://links.email.ronpac.com/s/c/g_qAmFgihREZmmxiRslAhBJEhpIu-0D6NxMN5BoVqb-PdC8i4uLcCeqQFMu6NYmhYMM2U2jHIovI6QZqLg-cuIPZmMMsHkjpdbfRgLJiu1uaFj7MjA8C2Ed1EJiAcyw9RoX7pNr4uylps-wmD8x8FsLbmyL4XzpAO2m_4VaTu1tH24SEnRLewFGk8eAGOPLkA2KhWYd5QbGoNPwirlOJKfPMLdJNuU71-u0B-3e_oZKgyv1pXSMjcFlZBkX9hR-eTvc99phO2eF3DGRCquNIZzQxJLxfp-3o0U9FERSK9PBbCL3nJ6E1lEeKQ4GmHCcDFJLkM3FsOB4XMiANoS2lKZpxAWLg_5C7hH6bkzg8o-vGf8JQ_uFg_VdHpWmOYXQjPBiY-26fsA60vm-PtSBDSUrGmtx4MiZPLE_vX4MMl-aJz34x5UZai9kn_A821vY2J-JYva4XESAu0id1gcgpGr7uL9O8iNdfzZVi1NdFkX4b5dM8P06dVqEX4_x32FScr719t3oLQtOTLGntUYf2D1CWAFb57zZ7aE1ANWGUcE6QVtXLPsA8mV9e_YAYWLZwQWE0IX4M4ySNGx8QFHLWnaf5aYjJ_wWg4ZdNzZknfZbf-xtFBA/2UdwrdNbQisnQvpHbzuMkexe5ATHCGm_/11)**

clean_body: Florida wrote the playbook for America’s comeback. Now, we’re expanding our footprint nationwide.| | | Friend, Florida isn’t just leading the way. We’re writing the playbook for America’s comeback. Under Governor Ron DeSantis, Florida became the first state to officially partner with the Trump administration to crack down on criminal illegal aliens. We took a bold stance — and we’re winning. Just look at Alligator Alcatraz, Florida’s own deportation center, that’s taking violent illegal aliens off our streets and out of our communities. | | “ We've had several other states that are actually using Alligator Alcatraz as a model for how they can partner with us as well.” -DHS Secretary Kristi Noem | | But if we’re going to help expand combating illegal immigration, then we need to help President Trump and Republicans across the nation. Governor Ron DeSantis created RON PAC to help elect energetic, conservative leadership that delivers on its word. For far too long, politicians have made promises they haven’t kept. It’s time to change that. | | | | | | | Will you step up and help us build the movement? -RON PAC | | | | | | Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC). # Join Us in Support of Sharif Street for Congress
---
## You’re invited to join our hosts Lynne & Bill Hart at their Annual Backyard BBQ Fundraiser in support of Senator Sharif Street’s campaign for Congress (PA-03).

---
This is more than just a summer BBQ — it’s a chance to come together with neighbors and friends, hear from Sharif directly, and support a proven leader ready to fight for our communities in Washington.
---
| | 📅 Sunday, August 17, 2025
🕐 1:00 PM-5:00 PM
📍 7001 Brentwood Road, Philadelphia, PA 19151
---
Sharif has spent his career delivering real results for working families. Now, he’s ready to bring that same passion and experience to Congress. **Let’s help him get there.**

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Holding Trump accountable with the BEACON Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
The BEACON Act is about transparency, oversight, and protecting our democracy. At a time when trust in our institutions is under threat, this legislation is an important step forward.

Trump has fired dozens of Inspectors General–you know, those independent watchdogs who keep us safe REGARDLESS of who is in power. And the ones who remain are watching their backs.

This month, I proudly introduced the BEACON Act along with my Democratic colleagues in the House and Senate. This crucial bill would create a nonpartisan Inspector General tasked with overseeing the Executive Branch – because no administration should be above the law or immune from scrutiny.

The BEACON Act is about transparency, oversight, and protecting our democracy. At a time when trust in our institutions is under threat, this legislation is an important step forward.

[_**If you’re with me, I hope you’ll join me in showing your support by adding your name below**_**.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111933056/558866157/1282494771?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjhkNTI4Mi0yMTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gCqmQ-CUyxynK_7sXVZc78YiM6U-8UwIpS1sKC9hsz4=&emci=74e64a02-1367-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=268d5282-2167-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=750857)

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td98bd0cc-46bd-4126-8325-ef0dc96e2453/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, we can’t stress enough how important the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency is to our election security. CISA helps state and local election officials deal with threats that they’d never be able to handle on their own, like hackers. **But now this key agency is being threatened by the Trump administration.** Even though CISA was created from a law that Trump HIMSELF signed in 2018, the GOP’s massive election misinformation campaign has put CISA in danger – especially since it called out MAGA lies that the 2020 election was “rigged”. **Peter, we need to show our “leaders” that CISA can’t be taken away without a fight. We need to defend this important agency so that our elections remain safe from foreign influence and cyberthreats.** [**If you agree, will you sign our petition to save CISA today? We need 150 people in 22122 to step up and show that people across America are committed to preserving the integrity and safety of our elections.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68287fa1-2f79-4b0d-b4e5-4ecbf8598009/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy.
