name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Trump’s war on the grassroots just got real
body:
Trump just made it official — he’s targeting the grassroots.
He signed an executive order to investigate ActBlue, the platform millions of Democrats use to support pro-choice, pro-democracy candidates across the country.
This is a direct attack on people-powered politics. And if we don’t fight back now, he’ll keep going. Chip in $7 right now to protect the future of grassroots democracy >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072225_2]
Trump’s latest move proves something we’ve always known:
They’re afraid of people power.
That’s why he signed an Executive Order directing the DOJ to investigate ActBlue — the secure, grassroots-driven platform used by millions of Democrats to support the candidates and causes we believe in.
If they can’t beat us on the issues, they’ll try to shut us down.
That’s why we launched an emergency $15,000 fund to defend ActBlue — and we’re still $5,000 short. 👉 Will you chip in $7 right now to protect the future of grassroots democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072225_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072225_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072225_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072225_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072225_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?express_lane=true&refcode=072225_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072225_2&amount=25]
This is the platform that helps school teachers, union workers, and retired nurses raise money for public office. It fuels campaigns fighting for reproductive rights, LGBTQ+ equality, climate justice, and voting rights.
And now Trump wants to dismantle it. Because he knows it works.
But here’s what he can’t do:
He can’t stop a movement that refuses to be defunded.
Let’s prove that. Let’s rise up. Let’s fight back — together.
Rush $7 now to stand your ground and power the resistance » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072225_2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072225_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=072225_2]

1150 N Loop 1604 W

San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

In a moment, I’ll explain what this means for New Mexico and beyond, but first, I have to ask: **[Will you make a donation to stand against this censorship and help defend public broadcasters by electing a Democratic majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111933602/558868542/-1710431385?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNDM5Yy0yMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25d7kgHTr-9BVuI0UqWssiheevwLwRmoVBPF0Wbk3Tw=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111933606/558868548/-1710431385?amount=&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNDM5Yy0yMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25d7kgHTr-9BVuI0UqWssiheevwLwRmoVBPF0Wbk3Tw=)

**Let's be clear:** Republicans’ cuts to NPR and PBS are not in pursuit of fiscal responsibility. This is about censorship and silencing unbiased voices who deliver critical information to our communities, especially in moments of crisis.
With wildfires, hurricanes, and rising global tensions, cutting off informational resources that rural and underserved areas rely on is not just reckless — **it’s dangerous.**
Their justification for this drastic measure? An executive order from Donald Trump in May claimed that NPR and PBS spread _"radical, woke propaganda disguised as news."_ Such claims are nothing more than an excuse to undermine journalists, educators, and broadcasters who strive to serve the public and uphold our democratic values.
We must stand together against efforts to stifle the free press and hinder the invaluable work of public broadcasters who inform, educate, and empower our communities.
**[I am committed to defending the institutions that allow us to stay connected and informed. Will you join me in fighting these attacks on our public broadcasters so they can continue to serve New Mexico and beyond?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111933609/558868551/-1710431385?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNDM5Yy0yMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25d7kgHTr-9BVuI0UqWssiheevwLwRmoVBPF0Wbk3Tw=)**

| | | We’re making two more endorsements this cycle! Amie Baca-Oehlert and Randy Villegas are running for Congress in Colorado and California, respectively. And they need your support! **[Split a donation between them and WFP today so we can vote out two awful Republicans who helped Trump pass his disastrous budget.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9n1Km6AUy1Et3nokC5J0Qgl_LebGg9F5GGTWx-ZJPklMuwOShTVLZhWOyU-ij7nSMOG3l59LKwtk236csha6s2ffzqKbHglFdQPVdtTcfcfCH26s7cogpBrXEmVhwdl7QyaxY05mx4ZjAIsw3Tcrc0FzIEYrXraqXeG7B_CJnjyj0cUsQlCq6J2kg3Q12MVdKkrgOyFpMt-i0WI4MkCb47R1Q9-e4-6G5cNAjIANHmunRpeq1eSasJznvn8oTy8lEfBA5R9csBAT2WRu4Kk3IeGU8CTIk7SveQ8T_c4Vt_MMyMAsPwfd4bbti95MAcCGwnF-tbAJ-DSs1fVhnGqQoNQ/4ie/ZLfplp3eSHaM171z20n9gg/h0/h001.yk1AnfgOkNZe8EFNsMdURQSQmPIzO_JJ9Q1IQmo0GqE)** **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9n1Km6AUy1Et3nokC5J0Qgl_LebGg9F5GGTWx-ZJPklMuwOShTVLZhWOyU-ij7nSM1Ihr9dV3dIqzwQsaZtrxwo7yKeXeWX0EbEmtGHgKoWDDM1wVppRk22qFJkbtXLFOHfefIySrkvRMKQdQRkNcIbWSH7rFzAVzwcvs1-DPO6Cme2yZKojnpqebsOOrB7HV4bonjqEd3xi-RhJbWOHA3rY1131PjMdFKxLf4xkkb8qKTojHCr6KsqRppEerKAQsyqHx1AeEEIJx2SK-_IErZIqWMfSUU45X6Ssr_Vrc64Xhp4BhOZsitmueyFJxXYDQJuHKXdev1-Ev9ODnSHL3XA/4ie/ZLfplp3eSHaM171z20n9gg/h1/h001.38N9KK7SM6Y7tdF4pQzvZatJH9nzgGp56Gp63Iek3lA)** Peter, Earlier this month, Trump and his Republican cronies passed a budget that will throw 17 million people off their health care and threaten thousands of rural hospitals and nursing homes. It’s an unforgivable betrayal. And we promised we’d kick the people who supported that bill out of office. **Today, we’re proud to announce our first two WFP champion candidates for Congress in 2026 — whose victories would each bring us closer to ending the GOP House majority.** **Amie Baca-Oehlert** is a Colorado teacher, mother, and union leader who has dedicated her career to helping ordinary people get a fair shake. Her opponent, Rep. Gabe Evans (R), has dedicated most of his time in Congress to stripping health care from families and demonizing immigrant communities — **and he only won his last election by less than 2,500 votes.** **Randy Villegas** is a California educator, former journalist, community organizer, and child of immigrants. He’s running against Rep. David Valadao (R) — who repeatedly promised his constituents that he wouldn’t vote for cuts to Medicaid — **but then did.** [If we want more members of Congress that put working families first, no matter what the billionaire class says — we need to elect more people like Amie Baca-Oehlert and Randy Villegas. Make a split donation to their campaigns and WFP today to end GOP control of the Congress and send two champions to Congress who will actually stand with working people.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9n1Km6AUy1Et3nokC5J0Qgl_LebGg9F5GGTWx-ZJPklMuwOShTVLZhWOyU-ij7nSMvEpOdX8lbLQaSowsZZcjUG6kF0KR98cHvvT1A6rdb1IpXtKiiAWjF5TAjhAtw7ljJHGw1HdbUkvbua3ykHuAE46gbtiE6HiVxln4HCgUlAW1bUUif5RGaPLu6ntSKVDC_rZ3BCiyzvT-804t8qcjnCuhy1u8zk2X-9cr-VeTh9HnH0HAyhQrQTfFao9qsfh-pwRbLQafGofxFlx_AaVMGTC0jGpW-qGnh5Gy6_jD_Izzd1v7remoXNs6x_JdXM_DrXWsvs5G0Tn7-IsUVHgFsQ/4ie/ZLfplp3eSHaM171z20n9gg/h2/h001.FDrLqDlBEzF3OmrHQyeFcEiRN2cWy91lC72u0HMf5BE) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9n1Km6AUy1Et3nokC5J0Qgl_LebGg9F5GGTWx-ZJPklMjgAYxk51DCTW8lrm2zeanwEA06nuAFrOH7TzszK3jZ0cviVC0oBT7rk9D2VGQnzhBDgA1-fbg5RJ4YLo1jCbJKB6TziQ7PcrfpkEiRrk_Lr5ocyUvqarRQLmCEwnzEfVBY5wFSe_b824wdJXfvEUJvSvHcs6p-TL9oP5bNnkE8_FdgWSVBjnbu9c-HZkO58dABCCmavstYhDpJS69TmuHHm3IsZy-yFtTESeQ74sqTdksDxr1lqvGoKavmIFwBAHkCALXtrafTES1jaekMaHPvpToh_5GQ610oSB1hIB-TLpHlLQ0FcMbHaOouZ-N2QE/4ie/ZLfplp3eSHaM171z20n9gg/h3/h001.7yW-PUwaHyHkDv3ODhJsPerflLugDQBJu8ige8mDOl4)** Peter, these are not longshot candidates. Over the last few months, millions of people have shown up in the streets, at town halls, or called or texted their elected officials to demand accountability. Rep. Gabe Evans and Rep. name: Kamala Harris
subject: One year ago...
body:
July 21, 2024
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=679%2E2563979%2EDD6spr)

Hello, Peter.
One year ago yesterday, I began my campaign for President of the United States.
Over the 107 days of our race, I had the opportunity and honor to travel our nation and meet with Americans who were fighting for a better future.
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/496?c0=.aG3D0-&refcode=em250722-1&t=2&akid=679%2E2563979%2EDD6spr)
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/496?c0=.aG3D0-&refcode=em250722-1&t=3&akid=679%2E2563979%2EDD6spr)
[](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/496?c0=.aG3D0-&refcode=em250722-1&t=4&akid=679%2E2563979%2EDD6spr)
And today, millions of Americans continue to stand up for our values, our ideals, and our democracy. Their courage and resolve inspires me.
Whether you are attending a protest, calling your representatives, or building community, I want to say: Thank you. We are in this fight together.
-- Kamala Harris
**🇺🇸 Wait... Before you click away! 🙏**
The Democratic National Committee is leading the fight to stop Trump's agenda and elect a Democratic Congress that will hold him accountable.
If everyone reading this donated $20 to the DNC today, they'd have the resources to get it done. Unfortunately, not everyone gives.
[**If you understand how important a strong Democratic Party is at this moment, we're asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250722-1&refcode2=679_2563979_DD6spr&akid=679%2E2563979%2EDD6spr)

clean_body: July 21, 2024 Hello, Peter. One year ago yesterday, I began my campaign for President of the United States. Over the 107 days of our race, I had the opportunity and honor to travel our nation and meet with Americans who were fighting for a better future. And today, millions of Americans continue to stand up for our values, our ideals, and our democracy. Their courage and resolve inspires me. Whether you are attending a protest, calling your representatives, or building community, I want to say: Thank you. We are in this fight together. -- Kamala Harris 🇺🇸 Wait... Before you click away! 🙏 The Democratic National Committee is leading the fight to stop Trump's agenda and elect a Democratic Congress that will hold him accountable. subject: Do the courts have the final say on the U.S. Constitution?
body:
CNN claims, “There are warnings that the U.S. is dangerously close to a constitutional crisis.”

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/wmn4n7vwAIo7CJf09fE6AH--9vuvQmpDiseae0Bln-d8WnVOg4f7AqNsclC_YD5LB9ALT1nbcGA1_qAF6BzBaYGCNmTxD379CN66WvHHC31jl3Hl6L5SDLBsnp10SXPyPvwptCIX8Blk3wQMo0AEjb_zD5ZMITi6GzOse-j7jH89wegne5CngLZj/vtynrw2_c7wBaaFMqj2bhyqRp52vWUHG/11)_

There is a constitutional crisis, but it's not what CNN thinks it is.

**The far-Left wants the current administration to obey the dictates of federal district court judges rather than the will of a majority of the American people.**

But do federal judges control the executive branch? Does the judicial branch have the final say in determining what is or is not constitutional?

Because the far-Left has undermined informed patriotism by promoting a distorted view of our nation's history and Constitution--including the judicial branch--many Americans do not know the answers to these questions.

That's why your participation in Hillsdale College's [**National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/zE-zG_oA91UW3l-waDyQzjLQcRukPr7UVlrNlNV4k79pbIerx3wgBOXNMmvSX5lru4EovDQzH-vHwWBvAihk1H8b8uysPuWDrHOltyYrX9c1wU8pWQHnv5rrZ2LaE2S6nNHnr-0Won8L3Of1TMpR0_XlulAEWJI2Koj3Q1PPrCjYWCms93rJgg6040Fb8Lxog1o5btWrE5gfjfq78O9fy5Zb353UxsKtTvoG1UcL1tcSSijnVcpcW4I6ntwDC8a6W8uCAa4Da6XDsFNj8E6wc9_Q8llqYubwRvaXOTdlSQz9Ixi3W_nNXm6tR_XaboNjwwwd9BlBKkX17xIqwyHKCPgDiclTrHt15l1MdqcS6wVzQGHzLNWz37SEuHIbK2qL-RGVqnL3PPFn3DuM0XhUFrHGA7GQsdkGktIw0tYpLsyrwzAAivF1GkaNEFsA6yABeUs0FrSbTFzqXFU4g5dC6ZvwbCrpORtk9jLyMzFPH_4KX6Og7wBD9RidGblV1SQfyE-8W2PuKqp3-qxTsLmXXir2QNNRY4dm6MbqrTQaV2wM-B4iw8e1VKEFFyXclF8DrStFDCMLAwiPFDMB_SH4PLB83kAnFooc7enp76KqeOLtO8LOCeJy0I6OnbKBnrcpE-aWZ3MePTxb4nE6wG-nau9BXa2OcueZKCp3RX0K39Oyz7t6I9vRAMkY1utzZq7lHmg_1p1d9Vks3akeeshM-RsW9hHxpaTreL7MDpUCX7vv17h_gAiDhgGdCqeX-XONLUMjHm4j5NPe3c-5_Gic/2suwHjOytayxPfVGOeqI_LJIAEJuwdYR/11) is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

You will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

name: Thank her! (via VPP)
subject: Ketanji Brown Jackson just BROKE HER SILENCE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sign our card now >>>
| ⬇️ **Ketanji Brown Jackson just _BROKE HER SILENCE._** ⬇️ [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92378?t=6&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD) **_WE TOLD YOU:_** Trump is using the Supreme Court — ran by _THREE (3!)_ of his MAGA nominees — to ram through his disastrous and dangerous agenda and _BYPASS the CONSTITUTION!_

**But Justice Jackson is having _NONE of Trump’s antics._** She’s calling out Trump, MAGA Republicans, and her conservative colleagues on the bench!

[**So we’re hand-delivering this card to her office at 10AM tomorrow. Claim your spot ASAP to thank Justice Jackson before we hit send: SIGN THE LETTER NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92378?t=7&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD) | [Chip in $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92378?t=8&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD)
---
TO: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: I am thankful for your leadership! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92378?t=9&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD) **_Dear Justice Jackson – thank you for giving me hope as a Democrat._**

Time and time again, Trump continues to defy the rule of law with his agenda to _SLASH_ Social Security, _FIRE_ thousands of federal workers, _SLASH_ Medicaid, and _become a KING of our country!!_

But you’ve not backed down. I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to expose Trump’s lies and continue to be a hero for our democracy.

**So today, I’m standing with you to make sure we stop Trump and his MAGA agenda in its tracks before he does more damage to our democracy!**

[**Because of your leadership, I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join the critical fight to Save our Democracy! Thank you for all that you do to call out Trump’s lies and to fight for freedom for all Americans!! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92378?t=10&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD) | [DONATE $3 TO SIGN NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92379?t=11&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing the letter!

_— The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20698%2E878179%2E8XgsJD)

name: Suhee You, API PA
subject: Our Communities are Counting on You – Power the Fight for Justice Now
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Dear Peter,
Thank you for your continued support of API PA [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/] . We’re writing today to bring you closer to the heart of our work – and to show you the impact your support has made possible.
[https://secure.everyaction.com/9Oblx1Yo5Eev714Ct-hrPA2?contactdata=bdWS3V2dssuFxYImVTuCv5oxl9M9s12NrR/LHYn3/h22njeSjDpmq/d8VICxDtPy5nur0zTULdq5LtV1usHfh9zkD97kEGmfyZ3NYxQ8erEnijC5RacRGrtkHeYEsmCch5UPZj3RRqlZslx3kXYSyip8CbW3Gbma15o1VgXbQaA=]
What We’ve Done So Far – Because of You
Thanks to your support, we’ve made nearly 29,000 Know Your Rights (KYR) phone calls. These calls are life-changing. On a recent KYR phonebank targeting Nepali and Bhutanese communities in Central PA, our team spoke with people who didn’t know that they have the right to remain silent – a powerful reminder of why we do this work.
We’re not just delivering information – we’re building trust. Our team works in up to 22 languages, making sure our communities are informed, mobilized, and recruited into our base year-round – not just during election cycles.
Our team strategically fought against the BBB by holding Congress accountable in critical districts. Through targeted phonebanking, we educated our API community about the real impact of the BBB’s passage – including devastating cuts to vital programs like Medicaid and SNAP benefits, alongside increased funding for ICE agents. We made close to 500,000 calls across the Commonwealth to activate our voters against the BBB, driving hundreds of calls to Congress.
We launched our Western PA Voter Registration program in Pittsburgh, and set a stretch goal of registering 1,500 new API voters by November.
And that’s not all. From our SEED Fellowship training the next generation of API organizers, to our new digital Creator Cohort fighting mis- and disinformation online, to workshops on Environmental Justice – your support has fueled it all.
What’s Ahead and Why It Matters
This fall, we’re going all in on the PA Supreme Court retention elections. The court currently has a 5-2 Democratic majority, and three Democratic justices are up for retention. If even one is not retained, Republicans can gain a majority – impacting redistricting, voting rights, and civil liberties in PA for years to come.
We’re planning a bold campaign across phones, doors, mail, digital, and organizing. We also aim to launch a political version of our Creator Cohort program, reaching voters directly in their languages about what’s at stake.
But we can’t do any of this without you.
Power What’s Next - Donate Today [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=35.00&contactdata=bdWS3V2dssuFxYImVTuCv5oxl9M9s12NrR/LHYn3/h22njeSjDpmq/d8VICxDtPy5nur0zTULdq5LtV1usHfh9zkD97kEGmfyZ3NYxQ8erEnijC5RacRGrtkHeYEsmCch5UPZj3RRqlZslx3kXYSyip8CbW3Gbma15o1VgXbQaA=]
What We Need Now More Than Ever and How You Can Help
Right now, we need the resources that will allow us to stay ahead. ICE has been heavily targeting our communities, and with an additional $75B in federal funding they’ll receive from the BBB, the urgency is even greater. We’re committed to protecting our people – but translating scripts into 22 languages, recruiting and training organizers, and running culturally competent outreach require funding. The earlier we raise the funds, the more impact we can make.
Here’s how you can help:
* Make a donation [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=35.00&contactdata=bdWS3V2dssuFxYImVTuCv5oxl9M9s12NrR/LHYn3/h22njeSjDpmq/d8VICxDtPy5nur0zTULdq5LtV1usHfh9zkD97kEGmfyZ3NYxQ8erEnijC5RacRGrtkHeYEsmCch5UPZj3RRqlZslx3kXYSyip8CbW3Gbma15o1VgXbQaA=] [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=35.00&contactdata=bdWS3V2dssuFxYImVTuCv5oxl9M9s12NrR/LHYn3/h22njeSjDpmq/d8VICxDtPy5nur0zTULdq5LtV1usHfh9zkD97kEGmfyZ3NYxQ8erEnijC5RacRGrtkHeYEsmCch5UPZj3RRqlZslx3kXYSyip8CbW3Gbma15o1VgXbQaA=] to API PA
* Become a monthly donor to sustain our culturally competent, multilingual organizing year-round
* Share our mission with friends and family who care about immigrant justice and democracy
Your support isn’t just appreciated – it’s essential. Together, we’re building a future where our voices are heard, protected, and powerful in PA.
In gratitude and solidarity,
Suhee You
Development Director
Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania] https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania [https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania] https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania [https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania] https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/apipennsylvania.bsky.social]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States

Power What’s Next - Donate Today [=] What We Need Now More Than Ever and How You Can Help Right now, we need the resources that will allow us to stay ahead. ICE has been heavily targeting our communities, and with an additional $75B in federal funding they’ll receive from the BBB, the urgency is even greater. We’re committed to protecting our people – but translating scripts into 22 languages, recruiting and training organizers, and running culturally competent outreach require funding. The earlier we raise the funds, the more impact we can make. Here’s how you can help: Make a donation [=] [=] to API PA Become a monthly donor to sustain our culturally competent, multilingual organizing year-round * Share our mission with friends and family who care about immigrant justice and democracy Your support isn’t just appreciated – it’s essential. Together, we’re building a future where our voices are heard, protected, and powerful in PA. In gratitude and solidarity, Suhee You Development Director Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance [] [] [] [] [] API PA PO Box 22611 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Peter,

I’m crisscrossing Georgia, going from cities to rural communities, sharing my story and plan to defeat Jon Ossoff and bring real leadership to this Senate seat.

We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. _**Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense.**_

This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally.

The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. We’ve traveled hundreds of miles in the last week alone and we’re gearing up to travel thousands of miles before this is all over. Keeping fuel in the truck is going to become a major campaign expense. This race will come down to just a handful of votes, so we can’t run low on fuel. Literally. The average cost of gas in Georgia is just about $3. Logistics and planning are the keys to a successful mission and a winning campaign. We’ll defeat Jon Ossoff by outworking him, so that means we must keep fuel in the truck and our team on the trail. name: Jason Crow
subject: I never imagined it would go this way.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Team, When I first decided to run for Congress in 2018, I never imagined it would go this way. Back then, I was up against a five-term Republican incumbent in a district that hadn’t elected a Democrat in decades. But against the odds, we flipped that seat and helped take back the House. Together, we sent a clear message that Colorado was ready for change. Since then, it’s been an incredible journey. I was humbled to be named the Colorado Democratic Party’s _Democrat of the Year,_ a reminder that hard work on the ground matters. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111935711/558876264/-1295807774?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmRhZWQ1OC0yNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6UhDnWVrktc_2a0VD6cIbXv3UVt0vb9AfmYwC8dtzA=) I’ve been honored to serve as the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s Recruitment Chair, working to elect servant leaders who put people first. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111935712/558876319/-1295807774?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmRhZWQ1OC0yNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6UhDnWVrktc_2a0VD6cIbXv3UVt0vb9AfmYwC8dtzA=) And I’ve been able to keep fighting for what matters most — lowering costs for Colorado families, fighting corruption, and stopping Republican cuts to Medicaid — thanks to the incredible supporters I’ve met with along the way. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111935713/558876320/-1295807774?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmRhZWQ1OC0yNzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6UhDnWVrktc_2a0VD6cIbXv3UVt0vb9AfmYwC8dtzA=) **But despite all we’ve accomplished, I know that the fight is far from over.** Donald Trump and his allies continue to push policies that benefit the wealthiest few while leaving everyday Americans behind. That’s why this moment is so critical. clean_body: | Team, When I first decided to run for Congress in 2018, I never imagined it would go this way. Back then, I was up against a five-term Republican incumbent in a district that hadn’t elected a Democrat in decades. But against the odds, we flipped that seat and helped take back the House. Together, we sent a clear message that Colorado was ready for change. Since then, it’s been an incredible journey. I was humbled to be named the Colorado Democratic Party’s Democrat of the Year, a reminder that hard work on the ground matters. = I’ve been honored to serve as the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s Recruitment Chair, working to elect servant leaders who put people first. = And I’ve been able to keep fighting for what matters most — lowering costs for Colorado families, fighting corruption, and stopping Republican cuts to Medicaid — thanks to the incredible supporters I’ve met with along the way. = But despite all we’ve accomplished, I know that the fight is far from over. Donald Trump and his allies continue to push policies that benefit the wealthiest few while leaving everyday Americans behind. That’s why this moment is so critical. We need to keep building on our progress, fight to take back the House, and support working families across Colorado and the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me, Jason Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

name: Jonathan Nez
subject: I’m running for Congress in one of the most critical districts for taking back the House
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nez.DTpKq3&refcode=em250722-1-30&refcode2=6128.6688874.ZYy9f2&t=1&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)
---
Hi there,
My name is Jonathan Nez and today I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District – one of the most critical districts to win to take back the House.
As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.
In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.
[**Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it. Will you help me start strong by splitting a donation between my campaign and Mark Kelly to close my $104,319 budget gap?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nez.DTpKq3&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=2&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your split contribution:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-nez.kUVSVm&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=21&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-nez.BV90yH&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=22&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-nez.YEDfYv&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=23&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-nez.UoNybV&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=24&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-nez.bgdSL7&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=25&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-nez.wOSys6&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=26&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
---
****
Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county official and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019.
I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, our current representative isn’t interested in improving the lives of his constituents. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.
[**I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please split a contribution between my campaign and Mark Kelly today?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nez.DTpKq3&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=27&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nez.DTpKq3&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=28&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.
As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. [**Please pitch in any amount today, split between my campaign and Mark Kelly.](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nez.DTpKq3&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=29&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
**[DONATE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nez.DTpKq3&refcode=em250722-1-30&t=30&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Jonathan Nez

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=31&akid=6128%2E6688874%2EZYy9f2).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Hi there, My name is Jonathan Nez and today I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District – one of the most critical districts to win to take back the House. As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district. In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instantly process your split contribution: | | ** | | | | | | | Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county official and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, our current representative isn’t interested in improving the lives of his constituents. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt. Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose. As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Thank you so much for your support, Jonathan Nez Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Team KTR Communications
subject: Nogales Police Officers Association Endorses Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
KTR is the only Gubernatorial candidate backed by law enforcement

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karrinforarizona/npoa-endorsement?e=ebfb0fda52)
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=6e31051488&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | | | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** July 22nd, 2025
**Nogales Police Officers Association Endorses Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor** _KTR is the only Gubernatorial candidate backed by law enforcement_
**PHOENIX, AZ —** The Nogales Police Officers Association (NPOA) officially endorsed Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor of Arizona. With the endorsement of the Nogales Police Officers Association, Karrin Taylor Robson now holds the support of three major law enforcement organizations in Arizona, as she is also endorsed by the Tucson Police Officers Association and the Combined Law Enforcement Associations of Arizona (CLEAA), which combined represent thousands of officers across the state.
In their endorsement letter, **NPOA President David Lopez** praised KTR’s unwavering support for law enforcement, stating:
“We take to heart your commitment to support law enforcement agencies, understand the dangerousness of the job, and most importantly the sacrifice our families face every time we put on the uniform. We strongly believe you are the best choice to be our voice and advocate as our next Governor and would like to wish you success in your campaign and election come 2026.”
**Karrin Taylor Robson** welcomed the endorsement, saying:
“I am honored to have the support of the men and women of the Nogales Police Officers Association. These officers are heroes who face complex and dangerous challenges every day, especially in our border communities. As Governor, I will work relentlessly to promote law and order, support law enforcement, and Make Arizona Strong Again.”###
---
|

|

clean_body: I’ve repeatedly said we must make DOGE’s spending cuts permanent. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Peter, I've repeatedly said we must make DOGE's spending cuts permanent. The good news is Congress finally voted and passed a rescission package. That means we have a chance to claw back billions in wasteful spending and finally start dialing back the size of Big Government. But let me be clear: 🛑 The Washington Swamp hates this. 🛑 The big spenders are already mobilizing to tank this effort. 🛑 And if conservatives don't show up in force, this package could fall apart. That's why I need your help right now. Since the start of the Trump administration, I've been pushing for serious cuts to Washington's bloated budget. Now, with this rescission vote, we have a real shot at making those cuts stick. But I can't do it alone. The special interests are lining up against us, and we need grassroots conservatives to stand up and help push this across the finish line. Let's show the big spenders that we're serious. Let's shrink the government, slash the waste, and secure a freer future for our kids and grandkids. | | | | | | | In liberty, Rand Paul | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | | P.O. name: Josh Weil
subject: EVERY Corner is on my List
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
This movement is alive, Friend.
Over the last few weeks, I’ve seen people stepping up, not for headlines, but because they know Florida can be better than this.
It’s not just one campaign. It’s all of us, and we’re inviting you to come along for the ride!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4B58626F6A51764A5238587A454475764A32327644706D59567144687939594F783841494A73354B7131586B414830306C413135574F47644B42643470717936/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-22%20at%2010.55.02%E2%80%AFAM.png]
We’re showing up in the places they thought we’d ignore. We’re organizing in counties they assumed they owned. We’re speaking up for those they’ve tried to silence.
And we’re just getting started. We need 10% of our whole projected budget to be set aside solely for voter registration. From gerrymandering to deactivating online voter registration, it has become increasingly difficult for anyone to see change.
So I have one question: Will you be part of this grassroots wave?
[Become an early donor TODAY with a contribution ]🇺🇸🇺🇸 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
Let’s take this all the way, because it is the last thing they would expect.
Thank you for your help,
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

Peter,

Stephen Colbert’s show was just canceled by CBS, days after he criticized his network’s parent company, Paramount, and settled a lawsuit with Donald Trump.

_This is the THIRD time a major network has ousted a prominent Trump critic in less than a year, after Joy Reid and George Stephanopoulos._

**If we don’t speak up now, Trump and his allies will think they can silence any voice that holds them accountable!** **[Peter, you didn’t take the poll the first time, but this moment is too big to ignore. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Made in Ohio
body:
Friend, our campaign is proudly Buckeye-born and raised, just like me.

| |
---
Friend, our grassroots campaign is proudly Made in Ohio. Our signs, our T-shirts, our mailers — they're all union printed. Our funds come from regular working people chipping in a few bucks a time, not from out-of-state super PACs. I wouldn't have it any other way. It's the honor of my life to represent the place where I grew up in Congress. **[We'll always be rooted right here in Ohio, friend. body:
Tom Homan's promise to unhinged purple-haired thugs.

"You want some? Come get some." [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Mxh2hr1X2mp1Sr8xp0Y3wQ~~/AARclBA~/XsUi4kZUc7LapnNqCiSp0Mt5SqDP3h2OAPEowU24WMToybYAz9DqukBose-4_COFOGPFN3iyErK3k-pxfvOmxVTz6k2eZZfiY5i-eHjBbgHyzYnIZ3Z1HToJmKrIvi49ByIbACCUV1_0713qDgZVjre9RUiQONKWm9_VIGsmihvilJTktLF8OX-nM0zlJSeud34Gd2BOpXidS4_32aj9gMZvTA0d74AsZZYWzhNz9UisIMGJUl5wZCp21wE9jy5UYQJDBNUHkByHwJ0PreHr9YzQYJVPrwyTkY0NWWjOYitU4ZnkpbxJ3jEmVmUDqZ93gfYYc5fav8j4XrSNkmdOndd-hLLGOlki9OmW0WlHnXLlGzsIBBf-UcalHIHUVr3A) That wasn't a threat. That's a promise straight from Border Czar Tom Homan, directed to the unhinged purple-haired thugs who have declared war on ICE. Let's cut the crap. ICE agents are being hunted in the streets of America.
* Attacks on federal agents are up 700%
* Agents ambushed at restaurants
* Vehicles firebombed
* Gunfire. Fire bombs. Physical assaults.
* Ten suspects were just arrested for an attempted assassination of ICE officers in Texas.

This isn't civil disobedience. This is domestic warfare - and the politicians lighting the match are sitting in Congress. Let's call them out by their names: Disgraced loser Tim Walz called ICE agents the "modern-day Gestapo." Hakeem Jeffries publicly threatened to dox federal ICE agents, promising their names and faces would be exposed "no matter what it takes." Crazy Rep. Jayapal said ICE agents are "deranged" and that it is "inspiring" to obstruct them. Recently convicted Rep. McIver, who just stormed an ICE facility, told her followers to "shut down the city" because "we are at war." This is organized, politically sanctioned violence against the men and women who defend our borders. [And that's why we're coming straight to our most loyal supporters - the Proud American Patriots who won't back down, because we know you always will stand for this country.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Mxh2hr1X2mp1Sr8xp0Y3wQ~~/AARclBA~/XsUi4kZUc7LapnNqCiSp0Mt5SqDP3h2OAPEowU24WMToybYAz9DqukBose-4_COFOGPFN3iyErK3k-pxfvOmxVTz6k2eZZfiY5i-eHjBbgHyzYnIZ3Z1HToJmKrIvi49ByIbACCUV1_0713qDgZVjre9RUiQONKWm9_VIGsmihvilJTktLF8OX-nM0zlJSeud34Gd2BOpXidS4_32aj9gMZvTA0d74AsZZYWzhNz9UisIMGJUl5wZCp21wE9jy5UYQJDBNUHkByHwJ0PreHr9YzQYJVPrwyTkY0NWWjOYitU4ZnkpbxJ3jEmVmUDqZ93gfYYc5fav8j4XrSNkmdOndd-hLLGOlki9OmW0WlHnXLlGzsIBBf-UcalHIHUVr3A) Democrats aren't hiding who they are anymore. They've made it crystal clear: They're willing to sacrifice ICE agents and law enforcement officers to score political points with their radical base. They're encouraging chaos, obstructing arrests, and turning ICE agents into targets. Enough is enough. We need every proud Patriot reading this to take a stand - publicly, loudly, and immediately. [ STAND WITH ICE ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Mxh2hr1X2mp1Sr8xp0Y3wQ~~/AARclBA~/XsUi4kZUc7LapnNqCiSp0Mt5SqDP3h2OAPEowU24WMToybYAz9DqukBose-4_COFOGPFN3iyErK3k-pxfvOmxVTz6k2eZZfiY5i-eHjBbgHyzYnIZ3Z1HToJmKrIvi49ByIbACCUV1_0713qDgZVjre9RUiQONKWm9_VIGsmihvilJTktLF8OX-nM0zlJSeud34Gd2BOpXidS4_32aj9gMZvTA0d74AsZZYWzhNz9UisIMGJUl5wZCp21wE9jy5UYQJDBNUHkByHwJ0PreHr9YzQYJVPrwyTkY0NWWjOYitU4ZnkpbxJ3jEmVmUDqZ93gfYYc5fav8j4XrSNkmdOndd-hLLGOlki9OmW0WlHnXLlGzsIBBf-UcalHIHUVr3A) Add your name below if you stand with ICE and demand that Democrats call off their mobs, restore the rule of law, and let law enforcement do their jobs. [ ADD YOUR NAME NOW ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Mxh2hr1X2mp1Sr8xp0Y3wQ~~/AARclBA~/XsUi4kZUc7LapnNqCiSp0Mt5SqDP3h2OAPEowU24WMToybYAz9DqukBose-4_COFOGPFN3iyErK3k-pxfvOmxVTz6k2eZZfiY5i-eHjBbgHyzYnIZ3Z1HToJmKrIvi49ByIbACCUV1_0713qDgZVjre9RUiQONKWm9_VIGsmihvilJTktLF8OX-nM0zlJSeud34Gd2BOpXidS4_32aj9gMZvTA0d74AsZZYWzhNz9UisIMGJUl5wZCp21wE9jy5UYQJDBNUHkByHwJ0PreHr9YzQYJVPrwyTkY0NWWjOYitU4ZnkpbxJ3jEmVmUDqZ93gfYYc5fav8j4XrSNkmdOndd-hLLGOlki9OmW0WlHnXLlGzsIBBf-UcalHIHUVr3A) Thanks for all you do, Hellfire PAC | | Paid for by Hellfire PAC

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23231%2E4449941%2EmrFbwX) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23231%2E4449941%2EmrFbwX) **_Friend, what else can we say???**_

We’ve been emailing you for weeks that it has been 15 years since _Citizens United_ began wreaking havoc on our Democracy.

We were sure Proud Democrats everywhere would step up...[**but we were wrong.**]()

[**WE TOLD YOU:**]() Amazing Democrats like Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer are RACING to pass a Constitutional Amendment to DESTROY _Citizens United._

[**WE TOLD YOU:**]() It would block Super PACs and Dark Money donors from flooding undisclosed funds into our elections.

[**WE TOLD YOU:**]() Trump and his MAGA cronies want this amendment to GO NOWHERE so they can keep buying our elections.

If we don’t put an end to this blatant corruption before next year’s critical midterms, chances of taking back our Democratic Majorities are slim to none. [**Now that you understand the severity of this situation, can you rush $5 right now to fund our campaign to END _Citizens United?_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64697?t=3&akid=23231%2E4449941%2EmrFbwX) | [RUSH $5 TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64697?t=4&akid=23231%2E4449941%2EmrFbwX)

clean_body: | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Friend, what else can we say??? We’ve been emailing you for weeks that it has been 15 years since Citizens United began wreaking havoc on our Democracy. We were sure Proud Democrats everywhere would step up...[but we were wrong.]() [WE TOLD YOU:]() Amazing Democrats like Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer are RACING to pass a Constitutional Amendment to DESTROY Citizens United. [WE TOLD YOU:]() It would block Super PACs and Dark Money donors from flooding undisclosed funds into our elections. [WE TOLD YOU:]() Trump and his MAGA cronies want this amendment to GO NOWHERE so they can keep buying our elections. If we don’t put an end to this blatant corruption before next year’s critical midterms, chances of taking back our Democratic Majorities are slim to none. | | | | | | | Together until the end. -Fight for Reform | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/22/2025
body:
Big wins, bigger fights—Colorado conservatives are gaining ground
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s9uacf09177)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s0jb4359d7e)**
| | Hi friends,
Big news to kick off today’s newsletter: Richard Holtorf was elected Vice Chair of the Colorado GOP last night! And a new episode of _[]()[Unleashed with Heidi Ganahl](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/set81c0c81d)_ is out today, packed with fresh insights and energy. Tune in and stay connected!
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/sem07c9f532), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s6r4f782fcf) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s6odc0d205c)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** District 11 in Colorado Springs is confronting the media trust crisis by launching a [high school journalism course](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/sct85a62685) focused on objectivity and ethics. At the same time, the Colorado Supreme Court is [issuing fewer opinions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s2p02e9078b) but stirring major controversy—loosening rules on jury discrimination and opening the door for climate lawsuits. Meanwhile, a Redfin report shows [Gen Z outpacing millennials and Gen X in the Denver housing market](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s4t6acf11a2) by relocating and embracing affordability.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Declassified documents show [Obama-era officials pushed the Trump-Russia hoax](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s5r6bd86fe3) despite contrary intel—prompting accusations of a “treasonous conspiracy.” Meanwhile, Sen. Rand Paul is demanding a [full audit of the Federal Reserve](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s4gf0545ff0) after its $2.5 billion renovation spree, calling for more transparency and oversight.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Don't miss this week's installment of the [COvid Chronicles](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/sfn57cd653a)! Schlichter [blasts the DIGNITY Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/sfi69b75d65), warning that the bill is just another amnesty scheme disguised as reform. Ortiz is sounding the alarm: it’s time for the Fed to [stop choking Main Street](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/sdq50099b99), urging Fed Chair Powell to follow the global trend and cut rates. Meanwhile, Hanson says voters worldwide are [rejecting the Left’s illusions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/seh742f47fc) on energy, crime, and culture.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, July 22, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Ganahl: Big wins, bigger fights—Colorado conservatives are gaining ground](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s1k85d71a4a)** BY HEIDI GANAHL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s1h4f7eb218)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s5v37603685)
In this episode of Unleashed, Heidi celebrates the grassroots victories that are finally shifting momentum in Colorado—and breaks down the strategy behind it all. From major wins in school board races and party leadership elections to the rise of a new, bold generation of conservative voices, she shares why the energy is building—and how we keep it going into 2026.
Heidi also sounds the alarm on Democrats’ latest power grabs: a new ballot initiative to eliminate the Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights (TABOR), backroom efforts to hijack our election systems, and legislation designed to silence conservative media.
Plus, she shares her vision for the Mountain Majesty Gala, how to get plugged into the Road Back to Red movement, and why reclaiming Colorado starts with reclaiming our courage. This episode is a rally cry. Victory is possible—but only if we stay engaged, stay principled, and stay in the fight.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s6mf15f3a10)**
|
---
**[The COvid Chronicles June 24-30, 2020: Statues fall, restrictions return–and kids get left behind](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s1s3111ce75)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/scl9271f099)
* While mass protests over racial injustice dominated headlines, government leaders quietly brought back pandemic restrictions—reigniting debates over hypocrisy and unequal application of public health mandates.
* Iconic statues were toppled or removed across the country, from Theodore Roosevelt in NYC to Abraham Lincoln in Boston, signaling a cultural reckoning that critics say replaced history with mob rule.
* Amid the chaos, students bore the brunt of failed policies: learning gaps widened, school reopenings stalled, and long-term harm to kids' mental and educational well-being was largely ignored.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s0q15aadae0)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s9ga554192d)
|
---
**[D-11 takes on media trust crisis with new high school journalism course](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s8o0d4bc9e7)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s4oa4120d00)
* Colorado Springs School District 11 is launching a new high school journalism course focused on restoring public trust by teaching ethical reporting, objectivity, and fairness.
* Students will gain hands-on experience in broadcast, podcasting, video, and print, guided by the theme “ethics in journalism.”
* The course was developed by Chaim Goldman, founder of The Peak News and its associated educational nonprofit, aiming to create a new generation of citizen journalists.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s2u7cc52b55)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Devotional: The darkroom where truth becomes life](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s8sa49aafa5)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/seob907ad27)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | JULY 20** _There was something sacred about that small darkroom in my father’s house. During those custody visits with my dad, I recall slipping into a mysterious room filled with the faint scent of chemicals, the dim red glow, and the quiet hum of transformation. It wasn’t just a room — it was a portal where blurry, black-and-white film strips turned into full-color memories._
__
**[Tracking the untracked: The dangerous fallout of Biden’s broken migrant child system](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/scl8e17d805)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/seha2b24506)****BY SHAINA COLE | NATIONAL | JULY 18** Each year, children continue to arrive at the southern border without anyone to look after them. They’re officially called unaccompanied alien children—or UACs—but behind that label are thousands of kids trying to navigate an immigration system meant for adults.

**[O’Donnell: Colorado’s new wildlife commission will conserve everything—except common sense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s0i91ab5f80)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._gJw/s2jd3230c26)****BY MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | JULY 18** _The Democratic Party swept to power in Colorado in the 2018 general election (the first time since 1936) under the guise of being a progressive party with the best interests of all Coloradans at heart._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**💨 DID YOU KNOW?** **Chicago’s “Windy City” nickname isn’t about the weather.** The name actually comes from 19th-century critics who mocked Chicago politicians and residents as boastful “windbags”—full of hot air, not blustery weather.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "A careful definition of words would destroy half the agenda of the political left and scrutinizing evidence would destroy the other half." – Thomas Sowell

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: The New York Sun Is Carrying My Weekly Column

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Reader,I'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column. In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - **and there are many.** Our nation has lost its way. Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.
---
| | [ JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ → ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0f39102cdeae475a83cb194d7b529fab&_e=gE4Yg93xTjbyOEEodgj_oOAMXjrjrVrVzByxM78pWY1caR4xIWq3AbxSyStTgfp8JIR8R1L9O8ip4OsEZ8mfquU5uBfSIk8ZJK773sN_LwoafyKziqQyx_PJGvqE4Eny8aLIg4OYbMUbCiBuvOmSO1mMFDhQdcapbKUiUmR5rk6ZlnBUffE0wYojVmpka_7_vFJuktoAGtJAcfX_Y6OupqtBKqspgC-8s93IfZgTBJrirvNzofCPHhNeDgU5UzXG5YjBBr_KoheAtRMtMlh02CZxbydiQ8VV8EAckmvOFPBV4NYF-hugwkxsoHQ2JE2ibOotAmzv339SSSt2qa3JNdjWV9WDmaHw9MC3oIs5uHij53TvkvZrw6qM3Co-4pI_Gw03YLf86Ct1fbIyHexRHjS8vE4JDIW0O8SUIWyfKKKX4Qn7UUunx2BJ8KqvpkRnJYAmk76u09PTmXJZVdxuwkXcdDNsUGsVM8Xi_Nl7w1NQOVQGoyOfz_6u0rKHR8e84UqKJCiL4RarFRSNCBjoivXBQjuNeaqs8A7jA7m5urCz1xgGqroYUaprHNVOlZ4owGuRVsKu1vw1c3nghpFaTA%3D%3D)

| | But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, **I 've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.**It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years. It's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values. It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens. Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.**To win, we need you to join us.** To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America. Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: I figured there is no harm in asking for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m running for the Senate against a politician who, while our streets burned, pushed lawsuits against law enforcement officials |

---

Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** I’m requesting your support in this critical battle to restore common-sense conservative values to Minnesota.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b9ee2862cb6447eba8b8d64ec1639844&_e=iyBfP2_rGRgUZu9M1pOnBnTFwdXEQbAQksnhDK2hGdghpQlrT9DWYECcFrQmXOyJm13k_M8iMzJEXU0b5i5WS6tQudoTI_8NfV002r_azxjZ0edAdgU6EV5lKOAJcmyqmXCGiUAtK-6nCRYRY6Xis0YlPdWtQQS97Wt8q0ypFst4LDoh7eAOejdHUlLRoSBbUwgYq-QMecZXLhcg_LS0iAqKSd3DdpOmNAbGB1lNcCKahHqP4RC_iAn62KYKC-qCqcA3qpcLROzq11vbsyHjHfsrklLdMNifSoEmm1O59K-xwbkn1MmFJaqfwgA9Rb89ixaFX3R19ujHQO3-G4-m0CiA0MViFhY7qW996O17ndGrK4OUJEW921oI0I-y7j7MYQdB6Sic1XvyaWlA93g_wOelYLyDl98MW0v88oQk2t6LCnxv7pCMOv-TA8HqFb_Y5q6mk9q7fCH2AhKF2l_8NQ1nIRYkSwhKK5SDUsFa_zq_uewFVrg_OHRigCOltwUE62T23g5nItfslTrJB3o74BNDxc0z8D19bP5GDpMWg8-8-JE1VFI6Md_k1RP3-NAhWnyo6QM8ZwV1Jx2lW9ZtVXmb0srY-57dDDCvTddoN0mxoX-DdD8qPkCkPn0RCFNZcdKhudFlGn-TKP7R8v_q_3QXfMB75HdmRSOKXouwY79J4uDW7k_bZfcEfdN0EIO2bMNkUaZObzO5thy0QvQ-71hgC9IFdLjNWN1AZkEZKLxazHXELPPFioc_B23riU0eKalyvNEc1-tPHP11EjXcMRsw7_99xtGGMfJsj9Hn4BQ%3D)

* 2.) you read this email without contributing, but you at least now know who I am.

[**HELP ME GET MY CAMPAIGN OFF THE GROUND

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a regular guy from a working-class family who grew up playing hockey and answered our nation’s call on my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after the 9/11 attacks.** I joined the Marine Corps to defend our country, and as a Navy SEAL, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries, risking my life to protect our freedoms and way of life. Unlike Tim Walz, who retired from the National Guard before his unit deployed to Iraq, I never backed down from serving our nation during war.

Minnesota is at a crossroads. Under Governor Walz and his lieutenant governor, our state has been dragged left by radical policies that fueled the violent unrest in Minneapolis in 2020, **defunded our police** , and burdened hardworking families with higher taxes and inflation. **While our streets burned, the lieutenant governor pushed lawsuits against law enforcement, undermining the officers keeping us safe.** This isn’t the Minnesota I grew up in—or the one any Minnesotan deserves.

But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. I’m starting this race with absolutely nothing , but because of the enormity of the race's outcome, I figured there is no harm in asking for your help. Defending our Second Amendment rights and traditional values. Stopping the radical left’s agenda that’s eroding the America we love. You don’t know me, but you know what men like me stand for and our reputation. So, . This race won’t be easy. **Protect your home and get this one-of-a-kind collectible firearm, complete with Certificate of Authenticity.** The firearms demonstrated on GunStuff TV typically have less than 100 rounds shot through them and are highly prized by collectors. They come with signed, sealed, and embossed certificates to prove your ownership of these one-of-a-kind collectibles. But don’t put this one on a shelf, take it to the range, shoot it, and arm yourself against home invasion! **This semi-auto bullpup shotgun is only 30 inches long, making it perfect for home defense.** Shotguns are often the choice for home defense but are unwieldy. Not this Best Arms Bullpup. It is easy to handle and maneuver in tight spaces. It comes with one 5 round and one 10 round magazine, plus choke and choke wrench. **That’s not all, you get 100 shot shells to get you started!** **Plus we get you an electronic alarm to hang on your doorknob to alert you in case of intruders.** No home monitoring subscription required, just arm it and hang it on your doorknob for extra peace of mind. null: Donald Trump's chaos agenda has already inflicted so much harm on Michigan's working families and people all across the country.
Whether it's been his reckless tariffs, his attempts to gut Social Security and Medicaid, or his abuses of presidential office – like using our military against American citizens to advance his personal agenda – the Trump administration has only hurt working families and benefited billionaires.
But we want to know where _YOU_ stand, null. We launched an urgent flash poll and need 30 responses from Cresco before midnight tonight. Use your voice now:
**DO YOU APPROVE OF DONALD TRUMP?**
| | | [YES](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3998?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=405%2E49239%2EgLDsSj)

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. **[If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3999?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=405%2E49239%2EgLDsSj)** | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/3997?t=9&akid=405%2E49239%2EgLDsSj)

name: CADEM Organizing
subject: Announcing our new Monthly Training Series!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
Democrats,
The fight for the House majority starts right here in California, and we're not waiting until 2026 to get organized. We're excited to announce the launch of a comprehensive organizing program - including our new CADEM Monthly Training Series - to flip the House blue and deliver real results for working families.
Join us for our first training on Digital Organizing basics this Tuesday, July 29 at 6pm [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/] . Sessions are online, free and open to anyone who shares our mission.
https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/ [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/]
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/]
And this is just the beginning! We're hosting trainings every month [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/] :
- Tuesday, July 29th: Digital Organizing
- Tuesday, August 26th: Rural Organizing
- Tuesday, September 16th: Messaging to Swing Voters
- Tuesday, October 21st: Using the New and Improved PDI
- Tuesday, November 18th: Volunteer Recruitment and Engagement
- Tuesday, December 16th: TBA
We’ll also be rolling out a full series of events in the months ahead, including town halls, phonebanks, canvasses, and house parties to build grassroots power across California.
Sign up here [https://cadem.org/organize/] to stay updated on how you can be involved every step of the way.
With some of the most competitive House races in the country happening right here at home, California is ground zero for taking back the House. But to win in 2026, we have to organize in 2025.
Thank you for all you do to stay in the fight. See you on July 29! [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/]
Team CADEM
https://www.instagram.com/cademocrats [https://www.instagram.com/cademocrats] https://www.facebook.com/cadems/ [https://www.facebook.com/cadems/] https://x.com/ca_dem [https://x.com/ca_dem] https://bsky.app/profile/cademocrats.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/cademocrats.bsky.social] https://www.tiktok.com/@californiademocrats [https://www.tiktok.com/@californiademocrats] https://www.threads.com/@cademocrats [https://www.threads.com/@cademocrats]

Sacramento, CA 95811

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Ray McKay
subject: Ronald Reagan warned us. It’s happening now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McKay for Senate Inc 19 Bakers Creek Rd, Warwick, RI, 02886
body:
I didn’t serve in the Cold War to sit back and watch THIS:

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
_**Fellow patriot**_ ,

**[🚨 I need you to chip in RIGHT NOW if you believe America is under attack from within. 🚨](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ CHIP IN TODAY!
<CLICK HERE>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**I served during the Cold War.**

_**I stood face-to-face with the threat of communism.**_

Back then, it was in Moscow.

Now? It’s here. _**In our schools.** **In our government.** **At our border.**_

**The red threat is REAL** — _**and I’m running for the United States Senate to stop it.**_

This isn’t hyperbole. It’s history repeating itself.

They called it the Soviet Union in the '80s.

Now they hide it behind buzzwords like “ _**equity**_ ” “ _**climate justice**_ ” and “ _**reparations**_.”

It’s not progress.

It’s _**SOCIALISM**_ with a fresh coat of lipstick—and they’re ramming it down America’s throat.

But I’ve seen this story before. It ends in RUIN..

_**That’s why I’m launching the most unapologetically anti-communist campaign in the country—and I need you standing with me.**_
---
[ SUPPORT RAY'S CAMPAIGN HERE! ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**Ronald Reagan once said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”**

Well, guess what?

_**This is that generation.**_

And the Left isn’t hiding it anymore.

**They want WIDE-OPEN borders.** **A surveillance state.** **Thought police.** **Drag queens in kindergarten classrooms. And full-blown Marxist brainwashing in every school in America.**

_**They want to erase America—and rebuild it in their own radical image.**_

_**I risked my life once to stop this.**_

_**Now I’m risking everything again.**_

But I can’t win this battle without you.

**[_Friend_ , will you rush a donation before it’s too late?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ RUSH YOUR DONATION HERE ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
We’re building a movement of patriots who refuse to surrender this country.

No more compromise. No more silence.

Just one final, full-throttle fight for freedom.

__**Will you join me?**__
---
[ DEPLOY WITH RAY HERE! ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aQaC/?__vbtrk=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzA0NTczOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
_– Ray McKay_
_Cold War Veteran_
_Candidate for U.S. Senate, Rhode Island_
---
|
---
