name: Lindsey
subject: I had no silver spoon
body:
This is my story, but it’s not so different for many Americans. |
---
I want to share something from the heart with you, Peter.

**_My story._**
It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me.

Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements.

Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=de90937e23124cf79a5ad489362537ca&_e=6wMlzLjdnTWeNmOD5ipqpau4MmvrYlGAQJjYEgh2Q24SXSKeUFRoC9Y5RL6ODwpvCwInEgUYEkqBzbY65JHR9wBYQyzJHoE6F9xgtJNR22wbr2Ke1c9ccHm_VI0TVxoIRotSuMcdMfxZTVl1-RU5kgGZP_P_cihslh0G0oxXhRJAoOTp04GirfGvc7280OQ69paUWtNK7EsGpuG0XH87B3xRA-Pmf5s1uE2xn_QIzsexCTS00qemmnZ41-g3ffKVgFni4h9-X3cCt1I7r8vaQJ3Bw1S1GwDJvhFMuzVxFB1tYXwRdsJPQ6BS9lcCQZ6ulBRWecQ3xrw3BU7lxocWwEIvwpFRI0ysQlJHZa1dawDqwME8LmbxfCeH9BCf1WlPijRWri20U_KrrRO9yiVSjLdVqS2jxYkE4roG20HgwQxmZfZkehaKQXsuffXViiNhmBZCgIi342Jshq8q2-NxuLEeuO2vGy4epEQHsoNqz4GBEq3CVcotuIb0mJXz3XcfQIP-ObcJo1jN9I4zQqgpYzaNmVCUK-ZPd-qsIEBRol6H80hn5rqucBx78Kifn5PrRXj7AllA0kYBej-YE2eBnPnOnQ0Spb9m4lT9lZUynCdwXr6Bminps8cVZLYDvzUKbyK_BTbI1nv7TnA07Sf-1nDwhBwUf9BuH-4tHQOwmxNsBqKdLCWkRdnVgBu2rcnAUDVgYJMLJIjq_pOxvsw6IQ%3D%3D) I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up.

I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=de90937e23124cf79a5ad489362537ca&_e=6wMlzLjdnTWeNmOD5ipqpau4MmvrYlGAQJjYEgh2Q24SXSKeUFRoC9Y5RL6ODwpvCwInEgUYEkqBzbY65JHR9wBYQyzJHoE6F9xgtJNR22wbr2Ke1c9ccHm_VI0TVxoIRotSuMcdMfxZTVl1-RU5kgGZP_P_cihslh0G0oxXhRJAoOTp04GirfGvc7280OQ69paUWtNK7EsGpuG0XH87B3xRA-Pmf5s1uE2xn_QIzsexCTS00qemmnZ41-g3ffKVHgi01SsTt48yRvI6XpAo3Vxmys3TCwuAD6rwMP5-teq--rm3z6-GXAEEJzD7phMCKaXDC5yThN-pAuFBQWJZP_sBQthOlCjP3l8WpQIafaQycvb8IE_AgWGsym2TO_LNzKldp3wU0Xxs9aSdiz0xjz2Mogf_Hotw8ERVCuI4GCp1CgjfyJipBMaihiHKK_dWtMHUEFuNFnFvUDn9p8vQ27m7d0_vOFzL5zoxwNDfTSS8TlUmxon5Doe2q94SWWvKT4Z5Ph7GHXit_VUr63ECe0FwyO6hYD00_TPwctvYCQ9mX75XuLlwiNxrwmJv8UHUXsLlns2R1wTxjMZJEC-2SEsLRCwVzE9KQxhmYZRuEtgQhiUyZChUX7ZjuaiI7UP6cpKC5OsOTuTTYwChL0Gov_PzplFoh_DBy_uKnqddVoLfyZr6AVyrD1G_Cyi0KlkRRNK5z8q64wRD9qXYcMFsMg%3D%3D) **Peter, I learned some tough lessons early on.**

After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform.

My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities.

**But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military.** _Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve._

Now, Peter, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple.

**🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe.**
**🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan.**
_It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start._
**[That's what I'm fighting for every single day, Peter.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=de90937e23124cf79a5ad489362537ca&_e=6wMlzLjdnTWeNmOD5ipqpau4MmvrYlGAQJjYEgh2Q24SXSKeUFRoC9Y5RL6ODwpvCwInEgUYEkqBzbY65JHR9wBYQyzJHoE6F9xgtJNR22wbr2Ke1c9ccHm_VI0TVxoIRotSuMcdMfxZTVl1-RU5kgGZP_P_cihslh0G0oxXhRJAoOTp04GirfGvc7280OQ69paUWtNK7EsGpuG0XH87B3xRA-Pmf5s1uE2xn_QIzsexCTS00qemmnZ41-g3ffKVIjtmaHG7sDV3PWmopIgB7hJqp3OsJsut7Utj-hki8r94NLtsDiO-Du-FJ9cuO6jQhl-lKDKCqJKxF51R8FAivCqFgVshcNgFoO_imD_DxiuF36zRCiYF1vEhOOpLbt8-mO5PiDrYM0tEkxbu5zIhR9k_66IgJ_p1qG3eA1lZ_7wMe9jEEjE7p7vV0JpRY1QVkC_McaUSTCOGC-A5K5Cj9ttl3-zvhYUnz2c389IwT3pXGHtm7pvW1xn_GFWUTg0QVGZLltCuO0jf7Go3qrdIno9y561TEHymK0NqxBakJc3Ea2MkCJyn_LLtMMfyedUH6OimsAVUZLljqKwAzttc7ibByinsABF6U2vp6_RyHQIG2UBLRx-dmFSPM2fea0VFm7J1_3qczKwkvZwFXaMscqBPnpO3m6Uune4D4zGZ98oMMAvD1powAyjQPHFP4eZthC6qOsIHMF8hFq8-Qdgwqw%3D%3D)**

Sadly, there are folks in Washington, across the aisle, who don't see it that way. They're fine with open borders, allowing violent crime spill into our neighborhoods. They're okay with slapping higher taxes on hard-working folks like you, piling more burdens on your family. That isn't right, and I won't stand for it.

So I'm coming to you with a simple ask, Peter. If you've got a few dollars to spare, **[would you consider joining Team Graham to support my campaign?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=de90937e23124cf79a5ad489362537ca&_e=6wMlzLjdnTWeNmOD5ipqpau4MmvrYlGAQJjYEgh2Q24SXSKeUFRoC9Y5RL6ODwpvCwInEgUYEkqBzbY65JHR9wBYQyzJHoE6F9xgtJNR22wbr2Ke1c9ccHm_VI0TVxoIRotSuMcdMfxZTVl1-RU5kgGZP_P_cihslh0G0oxXhRJAoOTp04GirfGvc7280OQ69paUWtNK7EsGpuG0XH87B3xRA-Pmf5s1uE2xn_QIzsexCTS00qemmnZ41-g3ffKV5lQ7GRqCvrU9NkxRxub_KiPSaVWltsKawpgcWwJ7fY53tEGohiLd7WCdWKnpd6eXqt7Xmco7azXX-wsxuKwyVAlw9k1rcr5YW0DT0Q4SJTB6GFKgEEq4piXq-xEHiBMjUE1hXI2Aa8J_aoQ67_3LtWeDNSwfxQuNd0FGoinyRBmaS1m0DUte8eW_N3aGeTganT2WeXCCN5Du45Q7K_TFG2ChTgMfsqV9gVWvv1wfPj9saA2dAk5Gl85Qe8s8fN-5lWnwfnXdRwwvxjy0ZJGjh_OdcyASs119Rvk2TvhAlTnTyIAx2fldkkiBKrn7JfyHgrulOW2lJFhN0MSwWYeFGu_RB4h3KEGDIZN2tZ0ghp8MlQfoNhSctig6-TB9D6WLOJPpfkGMoWovObc8XoWvJ3wPwZnXaulgb46u6baCGAE40sZxhq3OMZSv_3CCNvJGSH04DVFgP2fnjr21x6gLaw%3D%3D)**

| [**JOIN TEAM GRAHAM >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=de90937e23124cf79a5ad489362537ca&_e=6wMlzLjdnTWeNmOD5ipqpau4MmvrYlGAQJjYEgh2Q24SXSKeUFRoC9Y5RL6ODwpvCwInEgUYEkqBzbY65JHR9wBYQyzJHoE6F9xgtJNR22wbr2Ke1c9ccHm_VI0TVxoIRotSuMcdMfxZTVl1-RU5kgGZP_P_cihslh0G0oxXhRJAoOTp04GirfGvc7280OQ69paUWtNK7EsGpuG0XH87B3xRA-Pmf5s1uE2xn_QIzsexCTS00qemmnZ41-g3ffKVRUalVjhvgCt2gCmrdpuI8mZYFczSlnVOCp49nSA3TmuptlY-RO16TARJv7OAzZ6LuVg3T7hWN_NoZB0aQGl1ka3y-wh84eHCxDQbez3FgXXLHMrVx2v8k8bcQGaQXOUkwyYiA1oc4wCG_7dn686wK_HzeEzd8kMftQzNIxUXX1zkGAPTSToPIfLS7JixzolcUhfTC_QEYpAIU9Ra51don5u9Lkdeomf2_pxzFFStm8WEA_CiMjn673CK0KrWkW-QQpRwPuUkoAVDLVCswqvoJWsxYxBiMzjCPyzpH95MeQnNTReHnu2VOLGS8KR-MzoUuzmN9a4IZK0BpaOWUVOMq6Q0nuVSyEBTgU2Bz_Agu7h9s4QGzbNku-ZujBERJag2sSPLsWv_YZiNyFSChiI4X6BdUJvxkWPVy3V4CjnAUqrwXWquZZKDJemQn_mqcyi6hnd39rjS9LmiIrubYfDNcQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter, I know we can build a country that keeps our communities safe, rewards hard work, and gives every American a chance to chase their dreams -- just like I did. Thank you for taking a minute to hear my story. I'm grateful for you.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=de90937e23124cf79a5ad489362537ca&_e=6wMlzLjdnTWeNmOD5ipqpau4MmvrYlGAQJjYEgh2Q24SXSKeUFRoC9Y5RL6ODwpvCwInEgUYEkqBzbY65JHR9wBYQyzJHoE6F9xgtJNR22wbr2Ke1c9ccHm_VI0TVxoIRotSuMcdMfxZTVl1-RU5kgGZP_P_cihslh0G0oxXhRJAoOTp04GirfGvc7280OQ69paUWtNK7EsGpuG0XH87B3xRA-Pmf5s1uE2xn_QIzsexCTS00qemmnZ41-g3ffKV2dNA1Fu6eRTtCt_6H73td1cjEIrKPIZIJkou6SLcZaDiYNpy7APZmIUDFqt42lLGu6wIEVZFR2sLeE6k2PdXcAHE1U6pVVCRYUcEOpEylSvCbDl3kIE1DDOMyx2dZET1Zjip2EBolmZb2a-HIEeUrELpiCBa1Z4gceuaySAWb7g4AKd670nZ7Z382nN9io5I7VN9Lo2qb4YpYtdQVpRgkY7gKFNIa3dCYFDVG-hWW0nGnv79hNIPojBEKCVmqPYPKbhgjG6vIlIHxoU-6_070y3wWtvgDp6rXFVWATTBRcre0DW3uJRP1Plr7pWZN1qCVMQtmWse1UuSXEyCo6IgIWwLcr-w9yQe8h4AqFKHRXlV40SoRDadfrbfbKF-Gf4B_lDJw0-YPP4LJCZnHwMNVxXHHZt4Py-o1ojHUKPE7zk4nIhwai9kN7_8jATrE8WlD2Yo7wohnVuZlLzA5HQuog%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is my story, but it’s not so different for many Americans. | I want to share something from the heart with you, Peter. My story. It isn't one of glitz and glamour -- it's about hard work, loss, and fighting for what's right. I'm reaching out to tell you why I'm in this fight for our future, and why I need you with me. Neither of my parents finished high school. But they were hardworking and determined that their children would surpass their achievements. Most of my growing up happened on the main street of a small textile mill town. My parents had a business establishment -- a combination beer joint, restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall -- known as the Sanitary Cafe right on Main Street in Central, SC. We all lived in the back of the bar where we worked late into the evening, especially my mom, before heading off to bed in the backroom. I had no silver spoon in my mouth but I never felt I was missing out on something because I didn't live in a house like my friends did. I had a great life, and it was a great way to grow up. I was the first in my family to attend college, but then life hit me hard. While I was in school, I lost my mom and dad within two years of each other. And just like that, I stepped up to help raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, while coming back home on the weekends to help at our family business. Peter, I learned some tough lessons early on. After law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a Judge Advocate General, serving as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after the people of South Carolina sent me to the United States Senate, I continued my service in the Air Force Reserves. I performed several short deployments in war zones like Afghanistan and Iraq, standing shoulder to shoulder with our brave men and women in uniform. My story isn't all that different from yours or most people across this great country. I didn't have anything handed to me. I worked hard, grew up quickly, and took on big responsibilities. But what shaped me most was listening to the hard -working South Carolinians who'd come by our family business, sharing their hopes and struggles, or hearing the perspectives of my brave colleagues in the military. Whether I agreed with them or not, those conversations built my understanding of what Americans need and deserve. Now, Peter, we all know our nation's in a tough spot -- we're divided, but there are some things we should agree on, plain and simple. 🇺🇸 We need a country where you can raise your family without fear, where the streets are safe. 🇺🇸 We need a country where the American Dream isn't just a slogan. It's alive, and every hard -working American has a real shot at it, no matter where they start. Sadly, there are folks in Washington, across the aisle, who don't see it that way. They're fine with open borders, allowing violent crime spill into our neighborhoods. They're okay with slapping higher taxes on hard-working folks like you, piling more burdens on your family. That isn't right, and I won't stand for it. So I'm coming to you with a simple ask, Peter. If you've got a few dollars to spare, | Peter, I know we can build a country that keeps our communities safe, rewards hard work, and gives every American a chance to chase their dreams -- just like I did. Thank you for taking a minute to hear my story. I'm grateful for you. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

name: Pres. Trump
subject: Don’t blow it.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205gazlmcrpmlbmxkjfu5soyicqf7rm4hcwspf3xaynlpp43mpvhakn9rj2yaefk5a910f5lfm35hyafiff&__stmp=sztfmq&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sztfmq&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03u7jmu3ucgffs159thuek93yfss48zh3vosvrq7cnm8kdpqqf6zkojgtis62e6eljmdh0q35rb87hd0ppnp9nkhw3ujh4vqzrqptifl0aigvusz2lrh31aaq3kx53j2efmu6bz599&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sztfmq&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sztfmq&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sztfmq&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sztfmq&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol03u7jmu3ucgffs159thuek93yfss48zh3vosvrq7cnm8kdpqqf6zkojgtis62e6eljmdh0q35rb87hd0ppnp9nkhw3ujh4vqzrqptifl0aigvusz2lrh31aaq3kx53j2efmu6bz599&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sztfmq&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sztfmq&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Show us the files 👀 |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111939759/558890369/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmFlYTlhMy0zMjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kVAkH93r6RcF-uamjWab2WvDQsunO8NGzQ6W08p1dk=&emci=5fe7ec30-7866-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=82aea9a3-3267-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7878003)
We’ve got one question - what’s in the files, Donald? Friend \- MAGA is tearing itself apart right now. Why? **Because Donald Trump reneged on one of his biggest campaign promises — releasing the Epstein files. ** Now, we think there is maybe _prettyyyy_ good reason as to why he’s refusing to fulfill his promise to his base, but to make matters worse, when the Wall Street Journal reported on Trump’s close friendship with Epstein, he tried to silence them by suing. **This is America. From: Team Hirono
Date: Monday, July 7, 2025
Subject: I want to hear from you_
I don’t rely on billionaires, Peter.
I’m proud that my work is powered by a team of everyday folks who are committed to protecting our freedoms, delivering real progress for working families, and defending our democracy.
That’s why I refuse to sit quietly while Republicans slash Medicaid funding and rip food assistance away from families so they can give billionaires tax cuts.
But while I’m fighting against their billionaire-first agenda, I also want to make sure I’m fighting _for_ the issues that matter most to you.
**Today, I’m not asking for your monetary support for my campaign. I’m asking for your opinion. **
Your voice helps shape my work in the Senate to deliver for working families in Hawaii and across the country. Whether you’re concerned about the high cost of living, GOP attacks on our rights, or something else, I want to know what matters most to you and your family.
**[So Peter, can you fill out our July Priorities Survey today? ---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111940306/558891985/-534145353?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTNlNTFmYy0zMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8maPL486NOGP9sUvJTqapdpHabNp8263pOG9b5CxLCI=) Hi Peter, My name is Jonathan Nez, and today I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District – one of the most critical districts to win to take back the House. As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district. In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House. **[Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it. Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county official and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019.
I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, our current representative isn’t interested in improving the lives of his constituents. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.
**[I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please split a contribution between my campaign and Yassamin today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111940314/558891993/-534145353?refcode=AU_YA_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTNlNTFmYy0zMzY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8maPL486NOGP9sUvJTqapdpHabNp8263pOG9b5CxLCI=)**

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.
As the former President of the Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. **_The Des Moines Register_ : "Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks leads Iowa's US House campaigns in fundraising with $2M"**
Hey Peter –

We’re Christina’s Finance Team, and we have some numbers to share with you.

Mariannette Miller-Meeks just announced she has a whopping $2 MILLION in cash to hang on to her seat. But we delved through the numbers for you.

Her numbers may look impressive — until you see where they came from:

💸 Massive checks from Speaker Mike Johnson’s political machine
💸 Hundreds of thousands from corporate PACs
💸 And more from billionaire donors looking to protect the status quo

⬆️ That’s what it looks like when Washington insiders are fighting to keep one of their own in power. They want Mariannette Miller-Meeks to stay and help push their corporate agenda. **The _people_ of Iowa want a fresh start with a leader they can trust — someone like Christina.**

Christina’s campaign is built by everyday Iowans who are ready for something different: a leader who actually listens, puts people first, and fights for working families–not corporate special interests. If we’re going to compete with the kind of money Miller-Meeks is raising, we need to keep building this grassroots campaign, one donation at a time.

Mariannette Miller-Meeks leads Iowa's US House campaigns in fundraising with $2M" Hey Peter – We’re Christina’s Finance Team, and we have some numbers to share with you. Mariannette Miller-Meeks just announced she has a whopping $2 MILLION in cash to hang on to her seat. But we delved through the numbers for you. Her numbers may look impressive — until you see where they came from: 💸 Massive checks from Speaker Mike Johnson’s political machine 💸 Hundreds of thousands from corporate PACs 💸 And more from billionaire donors looking to protect the status quo ⬆️ That’s what it looks like when Washington insiders are fighting to keep one of their own in power. They want Mariannette Miller-Meeks to stay and help push their corporate agenda. The people of Iowa want a fresh start with a leader they can trust — someone like Christina. Christina’s campaign is built by everyday Iowans who are ready for something different: a leader who actually listens, puts people first, and fights for working families–not corporate special interests. If we’re going to compete with the kind of money Miller-Meeks is raising, we need to keep building this grassroots campaign, one donation at a time. = If you've saved your payment information with body:
The experts say we can win — so long as we act now to stay ahead.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92459?refcode=em20250722-9157&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9157%2E614464%2EmPZsRp)
Peter, we've got a situation here.
You all should know by now I'm all in for Abigail Spanberger. She's running one heck of a campaign for Governor of Virginia, criss-crossing the Commonwealth, building a big coalition, and speaking directly to voters on the issues that matter most.
**But here's the problem, and it's a biggie:**
_Abigail's opponent is outspending her on ads._
If we don't make some smart, strategic investments, we could lose the biggest election in the country.
**[Peter, I need you to send a split contribution between Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots right now to fund her outreach to voters. There's no bigger election on the map in 2025, and Abigail has to win big so we can show this huckster in the White House what's what.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92459?refcode=em20250722-9157&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9157%2E614464%2EmPZsRp)**

Here's the bottom line: The experts say we can win — so long as we act now to stay ahead.
Abigail is the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's office this year, and with Trump's inner circle cashing checks to Winsome Earle-Sears, it's high time we all stepped up and gave what we can to Abigail Spanberger.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111941704/558897058/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20250722_FR_ClimateChange_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGI5OTcyNS0zODY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGjXbPrL0uS_ZqnLn1UuxaPhPBwT0MpbKvhZcWpHvhc=&emci=56b99725-3867-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=60b99725-3867-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=6108787) | **_Peter — California is on the frontline in the climate fight._** From wildfire seasons that start earlier and burn longer to coastlines threatened by rising tides and offshore drilling, we are living with the consequences of inaction every single day. That’s why I’ve spent my time in Congress pushing for bold, science-based legislation that protects our natural resources and invests in clean energy for the future.

But now we’re seeing the same old attacks again. This administration wants to unravel the historic progress we made through the Inflation Reduction Act. **They want to turn back the clock on sustainability.**

I’m not going to let that happen — but I need your help.

**_[Will you chip in $10 to help us protect our planet and stop anti-climate extremists in their tracks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111941708/558897067/182852633?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250722_FR_ClimateChange_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGI5OTcyNS0zODY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGjXbPrL0uS_ZqnLn1UuxaPhPBwT0MpbKvhZcWpHvhc=)_** | [DONATE TO DEFEND OUR FUTURE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111941711/558897068/182852633?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JP_20250722_FR_ClimateChange_0_6MD_Jimmy_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGI5OTcyNS0zODY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TGjXbPrL0uS_ZqnLn1UuxaPhPBwT0MpbKvhZcWpHvhc=)

body:
James Walkinshaw is the strong advocate for federal workers that we need in Congress right now

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111941780/558897229/-895231828?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WalkinshawSplit_250722_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODg0OTkyYi0zODY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFpDjzcWVw6_nDfIdaEuWhGxrk85wmP4SF6WWjezgQg=) Derek,

After the Supreme Court ruled that the Trump administration can proceed with its plans to "reshape" the federal workforce, **we’re expecting this summer to be another mass firing frenzy.**

Now more than ever, we need strong advocates for federal workers in Congress – leaders who will fight alongside me to stop these political attacks on our civil servants and keep Trump from inflicting more chaos on our country.

[_**That’s why I’m asking if you can split a $10 donation between me and James Walkinshaw – the strongest candidate to protect our federal workers – who’s running in a special election for Virginia’s 11th Congressional District, to succeed my friend, the late Congressman Gerry Connolly.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111941782/558897231/-895231828?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_WalkinshawSplit_250722_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODg0OTkyYi0zODY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFpDjzcWVw6_nDfIdaEuWhGxrk85wmP4SF6WWjezgQg=)

James has spent over a decade serving Virginians in Fairfax county – supporting working families and fighting for a more just and fair future for _every_ Virginian. He’s also _never_ backed down from the fight to protect and strengthen our federal workforce, increase pay, safeguard benefits, and defend civil servants from Trump’s incessant attacks.

With _tens of thousands_ of federal workers on the frontlines in the 11th district, we _need_ James in Congress to stand with them and fight back against Trump’s all-out assault on the public servants who provide services Americans rely on.

I’m counting on your help to elect James so we can protect this seat from flipping red and support our federal employees who are having their lives turned upside down because of Trump’s political stunts.

[_**So please, if you can, Derek, split a contribution today between our campaigns to elect James Walkinshaw, protect this House seat, and secure another strong advocate for federal workers in Congress clean_body: James Walkinshaw is the strong advocate for federal workers that we need in Congress right now | | | = Derek, After the Supreme Court ruled that the Trump administration can proceed with its plans to "reshape" the federal workforce, we’re expecting this summer to be another mass firing frenzy. Now more than ever, we need strong advocates for federal workers in Congress – leaders who will fight alongside me to stop these political attacks on our civil servants and keep Trump from inflicting more chaos on our country. = James has spent over a decade serving Virginians in Fairfax county – supporting working families and fighting for a more just and fair future for every Virginian. He’s also never backed down from the fight to protect and strengthen our federal workforce, increase pay, safeguard benefits, and defend civil servants from Trump’s incessant attacks. With tens of thousands of federal workers on the frontlines in the 11th district, we need James in Congress to stand with them and fight back against Trump’s all-out assault on the public servants who provide services Americans rely on. I’m counting on your help to elect James so we can protect this seat from flipping red and support our federal employees who are having their lives turned upside down because of Trump’s political stunts. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between James Walkinshaw and Mark Warner: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Defending Americans' health care from Trump—again
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Donald Trump spent his entire first term trying to destroy the Affordable Care Act and kick millions of Americans off their health insurance. Now, he’s back at it—and this time, he’s even closer to getting it done.

According to the Trump administration’s own estimates, up to 1.8 million Americans would lose their health insurance altogether under a new rule that makes it harder to obtain coverage under the ACA. Millions more would face higher premiums and out-of-pocket costs.

I will not stand back and allow the Trump regime to kick Americans off their health insurance. That’s why I joined a coalition of Attorneys General to challenge this rule in the courts.

But I wouldn’t be able to stand up to Trump’s cruel attacks on our health care without support from this grassroots movement. So, Peter, I’m asking for your help today.

Will you chip in right now to show your support as we push back against Trump’s attacks?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250722ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250722ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250722ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250722ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250722ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250722ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250722ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Montana Senator Steve Daines is in trouble! He was the architect behind the Republican Senate Majority that passed President Trump’s America First agenda. This has made him public enemy #1 for every Democrat in the country. Leftist megadonors from CA and NY are lining up to defeat him and turn Montana blue! To keep up with the wave of Leftist activists and paid ads, Steve needs an immediate surge of contributions from Republican supporters like you. Thank you, Jason Thielman Campaign Chairman Steve Daines for Senate Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Tobias Read
subject: The values that guide me:
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs]
Hi, folks. It’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
People often ask me why I still send out fundraising emails even though I was just elected. Trust me – asking for money is not my favorite part of being a candidate.
Here’s the bottom line: I love my job and I’m proud of the work we have done in the Secretary of State’s office. But even though the election is behind us, the work of building a strong, effective campaign never really stops. Maintaining a campaign apparatus is crucial in modern politics. Without it, I’d be vulnerable to a challenger. Raising money also allows me to build stronger alliances across Oregon and to support organizations and candidates who will fight to protect our democracy.
Most importantly, it allows me to maintain a consistent and aggressive communication structure with Oregon residents about what I’m doing to uplift our democracy and help make Oregon's government more accountable to voters.
To support my campaign, please consider pitching in $25 or more. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs]
The principles that guide my time in office are the same ones that guided me during the campaign.
Democracy. The rule of law. Public service. Fairness and equality.
So when it comes to standing up to MAGA extremism and President Donald Trump’s illegal actions, it’s never a question of whether I’ll bow to political pressure.
I’ll choose my values and the bedrock principles of American democracy every time.
But as our country faces unprecedented challenges, I need your help to continue defending Oregon’s elections. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs]
I also wanted to share a quick update. I recently had the honor of sitting down with Southern Oregon’s Jefferson Public Radio to discuss the work that my office has been doing over the past few months.
You can listen to what I had to say by clicking on this link. [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
And then, if you’re able, chip in $10 (or whatever you can spare) to help my campaign stay strong in the face of these unprecedented attacks on our democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs]
https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read [https://www.ijpr.org/show/the-jefferson-exchange/2025-05-14/thurs-9am-a-candid-conversation-with-oregon-secretary-of-state-tobias-read]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250722em-values-rs]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=pJbkMrVwoQPJ84eucykU8TnzZ6JLDr4uM9Ry9GZc6T%2B0%2BaePUlitWcjk3yLLuTYtEhxbUbPPkjTA5XClw56QWIyOJkf9Na7VLjvD6n8DJH5D7c3MX8z%2FWNTcavdbXzWT%2BbsdNHlxemwNbh2M1Y8C1yPsI2cOAz1fAf9NrVRDgcCp4mIrAH%2BiRhZpezeJFBHm6IqWYJGcQ8JzHdP5vXYrD2kbxkjAXMzQfGA7Ke%2FNz0hlGKTQck0Y2%2Fu1rXFxBd8w1NhXyAqtJNtGlHCRS5tOj4t%2FJLh1yOeLtUMrquL2JWgmRiuZVF92hn%2Bn9wwppLGE%2B5q4CzWzd34hv7s%2FHot9e9jTB359ti5KxTLaybVIZt6HBgth7DcRBcMMGYKOOLk5uZizZMuE20Ls90SXrTqN8HeaotF9AiaVjfdJIvVujzPv9QZW%2Fv4oHje0zbOC60AS .

Peter — did you see Valerie’s email?

**We’re reaching out to top Democrats like you to provide feedback on the issues that matter most as Valerie continues her mission in Congress.**

Valerie’s mission is rooted in serving her neighbors, listening to your concerns, and uplifting the common good. But that is only possible if we receive your feedback on which issues Valerie should prioritize.

We’re forwarding Valerie’s original email where she breaks down why your feedback is so important. _Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee:_
Hi Peter,do you have a minute to chat?

My favorite part of being a public servant has always been getting to have conversations with folks like you. From my first elected role on Chapel Hill-Carrboro City Schools Board, to the North Carolina General Assembly, to now as your Congresswoman — I’ve remained committed to serving my neighbors, and that means listening to what my neighbors have to say.

I wish I could sit down with each of you and hear your concerns directly, but until I can be in 746,711 places at once, we’ll have to settle for the next best thing. My team put together a survey so you can share directly with me what’s on your mind. It will only take a minute (or less!)

[Now that we’re halfway through the year, it’s important that I know which issues are on your mind as we inch closer to 2026. Will you please take a minute to complete this survey? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111942714/558900289/-395073308?source=SBD_VF_EM_EN_072225_PrioritiesFWD_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWRiMjMwYi0zYjY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cZ8x_71cF9Boo9aQHcWBDKLlV-EUYf2S8RdUpttFcVw=&emci=97db230b-3b67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=9edb230b-3b67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=799895)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter — did you see Valerie’s email? We’re reaching out to top Democrats like you to provide feedback on the issues that matter most as Valerie continues her mission in Congress. Valerie’s mission is rooted in serving her neighbors, listening to your concerns, and uplifting the common good. But that is only possible if we receive your feedback on which issues Valerie should prioritize. We’re forwarding Valerie’s original email where she breaks down why your feedback is so important. | Begin Forwarded Message from Valerie Foushee: Hi Peter,do you have a minute to chat? My favorite part of being a public servant has always been getting to have conversations with folks like you. From my first elected role on Chapel Hill-Carrboro City Schools Board, to the North Carolina General Assembly, to now as your Congresswoman — I’ve remained committed to serving my neighbors, and that means listening to what my neighbors have to say. I wish I could sit down with each of you and hear your concerns directly, but until I can be in 746,711 places at once, we’ll have to settle for the next best thing. My team put together a survey so you can share directly with me what’s on your mind. It will only take a minute (or less!) My focus has always been on making a real difference in the lives of folks in my community, so thank you in advance for taking the time to share your thoughts. — Valerie Foushee | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Trump’s latest attacks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250722&t=1001&akid=1892%2E1088799%2ECy9g-F ]Rob Bonta

I’ve filed a 34th lawsuit against Trump. Here’s
why:

The Trump administration has abruptly restricted access to more than a
dozen public benefit programs based on immigration status. We’re talking
about soup kitchens, mental health and substance use disorder programs,
shelters for domestic violence survivors, and other social safety net
programs that vulnerable people in our communities rely on.

It’s inhumane, and it’s illegal.

This isn’t about waste, fraud, or abuse. This is about Trump’s
anti-immigrant agenda — and primarily, it’s going after working moms and
their young children.

I won’t stand by and let the President violate the law in service of his
inhumane and hostile campaign against immigrants. So I’ve said this
before, and I’m saying it again: We’ll see President Trump in court.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250722-pet/?t=1002&akid=1892%2E1088799%2ECy9g-F ]If you’re with me on this and want to see Trump held accountable to the
law, please sign on today.

ADD YOUR NAME

These programs exist because as a country, we’ve decided we are all better
off when everyone has the opportunity to succeed. Requiring them to verify
immigration status will have a devastating impact: People in need will
lose access to nutrition, healthcare, and education. Unnecessary burdens
will be placed on the organizations providing these critical services. And
federal funding could be jeopardized, putting these organizations at risk
of shuttering entirely.

Trump and his administration continue to blatantly violate the law — and
every time they do, I’ll be here ready to fight back.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250722-pet/?t=1003&akid=1892%2E1088799%2ECy9g-F ]To join me in the fight, please add your name today.

Thanks for speaking out.

-Rob

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

body:
We need to act now >>

| Hi friend, we’re reaching out again because the threat to the U.S. Postal Service hasn’t gone away — in fact, it’s getting worse.

Donald Trump is doubling down on his push to privatize the USPS, **even though it’s protected by the Constitution and essential to millions of Americans.**

If he succeeds in handing over a vital public service to private corporations, it would set a dangerous precedent that presidents can dismantle core public services without any oversight.

New Dems are fighting back, but we need the backing of the American people who are paying attention and ready to push back.

**[Will you take a moment to add your name and stand with us to protect the Postal Service? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111943692/558903768/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250722_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2UwZDFkOC0zZTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FfGq0lnteM9Bm6nNIPhkdbeIhVEHNt3dvQ4jfNTRIR8=&emci=ee8ae5a3-2167-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=97e0d1d8-3e67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)** | [YES, I’M STANDING WITH NEW DEMS TO DEFEND THE USPS! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111943696/558903807/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250722_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2UwZDFkOC0zZTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FfGq0lnteM9Bm6nNIPhkdbeIhVEHNt3dvQ4jfNTRIR8=&emci=ee8ae5a3-2167-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=97e0d1d8-3e67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)

Here's what you need to know and what you can do to help save the Postal Service.

1\. **The Post Office is enshrined in the US Constitution and created by an act of Congress.** _Trump’s efforts to unilaterally dismantle it are unconstitutional!_

2\. **Privatizing USPS would mean higher costs, slower delivery, and the loss of universal service** — especially for rural communities, seniors, and people with disabilities.

3\. **It’s a threat to our elections.** Millions depend on the USPS to vote by mail. Weakening it makes it harder for everyday Americans to participate in our democracy.

We can’t allow Trump to dismantle the USPS and privatize it completely.

**[As New Dems fight to defend working Americans’ access to the USPS, we need you to have our back! Can you add your name to defend the USPS? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111943711/558903840/830179060?refcode=NDCAF_20250722_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2UwZDFkOC0zZTY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FfGq0lnteM9Bm6nNIPhkdbeIhVEHNt3dvQ4jfNTRIR8=&emci=ee8ae5a3-2167-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=97e0d1d8-3e67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=48524772)**

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: North Carolina's latest attempt at voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=cG8VtyIsbNu05lyX/qcWVIlZAwosQuwENGH5E/T9PjPGCk90aTT054KDu5kIRtmIZGLidjLmPrVEeAO/WKxr1EvWuaqa1xZHILLWkTkRU5E=]
NC Newsline: NC House bill would allow elections board workers to be replaced with political hires [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=cG8VtyIsbNu05lyX/qcWVIlZAwosQuwENGH5E/T9PjPGCk90aTT054KDu5kIRtmIZGLidjLmPrVEeAO/WKxr1EvWuaqa1xZHILLWkTkRU5E=]
Get this, Team: Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina have introduced a sweeping elections bill that, among other steps, would bar election officials from encouraging or promoting voter turnout. This is just the latest and starkest example of a trend among the vote suppressors of opposing even nonpartisan outreach efforts that could boost voting rates.
This bill would also take more than a third of existing nonpartisan staff positions at the state elections office and convert them to jobs for partisan political appointees deeply invested in the results of the elections they would be in charge of. Finally, the measure would add new voting restrictions for military and overseas voters, and ban ranked choice voting.
The bill and proposed ban on promoting turnout “ raises real questions about what democracy means in North Carolina, who really holds the power, who government is answering to ” according to Andrew Garber, a counsel in the nonpartisan Brennan Center’s Voting Rights and Elections Program.
Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. It's just another example of what they'll export around the country if they get away with it here.
This troubling bill has the potential to impact us all, no matter what state we live in. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to help us stop voter suppression [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=cG8VtyIsbNu05lyX/qcWVIlZAwosQuwENGH5E/T9PjPGCk90aTT054KDu5kIRtmIZGLidjLmPrVEeAO/WKxr1EvWuaqa1xZHILLWkTkRU5E=] in North Carolina and [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=cG8VtyIsbNu05lyX/qcWVIlZAwosQuwENGH5E/T9PjPGCk90aTT054KDu5kIRtmIZGLidjLmPrVEeAO/WKxr1EvWuaqa1xZHILLWkTkRU5E=] across the country >>

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] NC Newsline: NC House bill would allow elections board workers to be replaced with political hires [=] Get this, Team: Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina have introduced a sweeping elections bill that, among other steps, would bar election officials from encouraging or promoting voter turnout. This is just the latest and starkest example of a trend among the vote suppressors of opposing even nonpartisan outreach efforts that could boost voting rates. This bill would also take more than a third of existing nonpartisan staff positions at the state elections office and convert them to jobs for partisan political appointees deeply invested in the results of the elections they would be in charge of. Finally, the measure would add new voting restrictions for military and overseas voters, and ban ranked choice voting. The bill and proposed ban on promoting turnout “ raises real questions about what democracy means in North Carolina, who really holds the power, who government is answering to ” according to Andrew Garber, a counsel in the nonpartisan Brennan Center’s Voting Rights and Elections Program. Opponents of voting rights in North Carolina are more focused on expanding and cementing their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. Hey Peter,

million ad buy attacking me.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-ossoff.Y8Sd3h&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=4882%2E35263%2EjEzEzp ]Axios - Scoop: GOP unveils $5 million in attack ads against Sen. Jon
Ossoff

If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight —
please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election
campaign and Tammy Baldwin today:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-ossoff.Y8Sd3h&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4882%2E35263%2EjEzEzp ]secure.actblue.com/donate/stb-em-ossoff

Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign,
especially today.

This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning,
Peter. In the months ahead,
Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the
book to defeat me.

Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate
majority — they lock it in for the long-term.

With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s
left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees.
No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law.

So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is
counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear
message:

Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid and
defunds hospitals and nursing homes.

We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights.

And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our
history.

I will fight, and I will win. But I can’t do it alone.

body:

|

**Join us virtually tomorrow at 7:00pm ET for an emergency Texas redistricting briefing!**
Peter,
Right now, a special legislative session is underway in Texas, where conservatives — at the direction of Donald Trump — are aiming to draw an even more egregiously gerrymandered congressional map.
The reality is, what happens in Texas will have broad implications for the rest of the country. All On The Line has been mobilizing supporters to fight back against this brazen power grab.
[**We invite you to join us and our affiliate, the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, for a special Texas emergency briefing tomorrow at 7:00 pm ET.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111944419/558906267/-1794448058?refcode=sign_aotl_tier1_email_TXBriefing_email_20250722-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250722-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing_&utm_campaign=TXBriefing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZTBkMWQ4LTNlNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R2um8bHMzitSyRnJ7gbDvlGGw_HGw9k-OxK6e8W2BoA=&emci=a0ec5e90-3067-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=96e0d1d8-3e67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)_A.G. Eric Holder will be joined by House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu to discuss what’s at stake in Texas and our plan to fight back for fair maps and fair representation — together._
**What:** Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests
**When:** Wednesday, July 23 | 7:00 pm ET
**Where:** Register on Mobilize
[REGISTER NOW!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111944423/558906268/-1794448058?refcode=sign_aotl_tier1_email_TXBriefing_email_20250722-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250722-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing_&utm_campaign=TXBriefing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZTBkMWQ4LTNlNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R2um8bHMzitSyRnJ7gbDvlGGw_HGw9k-OxK6e8W2BoA=&emci=a0ec5e90-3067-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=96e0d1d8-3e67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
---
We are building a strong coalition to safeguard our democracy, protect fair maps, and combat ongoing gerrymandering in Texas and nationwide. [**If you’re all in, please register here.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111944425/558906273/-1794448058?refcode=sign_aotl_tier1_email_TXBriefing_email_20250722-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=sign&utm_content=20250722-AOTL-Tier1-TXBriefing_&utm_campaign=TXBriefing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZTBkMWQ4LTNlNjctZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R2um8bHMzitSyRnJ7gbDvlGGw_HGw9k-OxK6e8W2BoA=&emci=a0ec5e90-3067-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=96e0d1d8-3e67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=8431045)
We hope to see you there!
The All On The Line Team

clean_body: Register now! | Join us virtually tomorrow at 7:00pm ET for an emergency Texas redistricting briefing! Peter, Right now, a special legislative session is underway in Texas, where conservatives — at the direction of Donald Trump — are aiming to draw an even more egregiously gerrymandered congressional map. The reality is, what happens in Texas will have broad implications for the rest of the country. All On The Line has been mobilizing supporters to fight back against this brazen power grab. . Eric Holder will be joined by House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries, Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi, Congressman Greg Casar (TX-35), and Texas House Democratic Caucus Chair, Representative Gene Wu to discuss what’s at stake in Texas and our plan to fight back for fair maps and fair representation — together. What: Stop The Texas Takeover: A Live Event With AG Eric Holder and Special Guests When: Wednesday, July 23 | 7:00 pm ET Where: Register on Mobilize We are building a strong coalition to safeguard our democracy, protect fair maps, and combat ongoing gerrymandering in Texas and nationwide. We hope to see you there! subject: We made history.
body:
But I’m not done. Are you?

| |
---
Team, Together, we’ve already made history. You helped elect the first Latina from New Jersey to Congress. We won in one of the most competitive House districts in the country. In just my first six months in Congress, I’ve worked every day to deliver for the working families who made this possible. I voted to protect Medicaid from deep Republican cuts. I opposed the extreme MAGA bill that prioritized billionaire tax breaks over New Jersey families. And I’ve continued standing strong against this administration’s extreme agenda and its attacks on our freedoms and future. **I’m proud of what we’ve built. But I’m not done.** We have to protect access to affordable health care, invest in our schools, small businesses, and communities. We need bold, unrelenting leadership in Washington. That means staying ready to fight for every single vote in this swing seat. This reelection campaign is already shaping up to be one of the hardest-fought battles in the country. name: Brent Hennrich
subject: She voted to praise ICE. I'm running to stop her.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87IT6qcVHF9CCjAMJGYEfmpLVoWmeqNJjhNd8SPbduEJ7mfVKYeuy8IMZS7UIg_DrdmlgaLz8JUXTvA475PzFaYx1zcJDsowQLN5iiRbJO03EsU_f5HDQDdDdIIovLnatzekQ7TgZTHOW0JCqBrv36iBek1I1WHR_H7AsTV6HHD2ITKd3-sfcROkIYqX4JHhHxKnpFkOG0pgAjhE_R8c7Z9oQw/4ie/a22HqRHgRGKxR9KGNe8jug/h0/h001.NvfFnXL4htltItZgL-g_2bjoBNVqcm2ivwRlYwd1B4M)
---
Peter,
In a Miami ICE jail, dozens of migrants were shackled with their hands tied behind their backs and forced to kneel and eat off styrofoam plates "like dogs." Let that sink in.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUANoXL3dHfdW1mtXprjqkklHh0eZ3SWLJK8_jW0bNmIuEl_lizxnkoegEG4VRnFWBIuseTZoWGzQuQlMdOmqX75hoo_RQqDPBOBDkdOrdRzXc8K0n5M54qg8kGI7xSyToBzAuPmvqCM_C1hbjouAU60KxRgYDTglulUlMa0nKLuHWibtOUD_xmRb_wcbejFaitEq6b2lNE8tnhwWCNI_KRj4bpG_SPl37bz1FcuzNv7owom4NxImjrXOIDf2tUOCA-9soVd_dXz_8l1Cm1LnXEXVJg3Hbw8Q56xytgHGMRkww/4ie/a22HqRHgRGKxR9KGNe8jug/h1/h001.tWVcl-fsxTI2E9wS0hshan507Aycl1LZSmfJ61kEBsE)
---
These are human beings, packed into a cell for hours, denied food, dignity, and even the most basic decency. At another ICE facility, women were denied access to gender-appropriate care and forced to use the toilet in full view of male detainees. At a third, a woman died. Across the board, medical care was withheld, people were crammed into "ice boxes" without bedding, and the abuse was so rampant guards were allegedly turning off surveillance cameras to cover their tracks. Our immigrant neighbors work hard, raise families, and give back to our community. Every time I hear these disturbing reports I can't help but think _what if this was happening to someone you loved?_ It could happen to any one of our neighbors, friends, or coworkers. While this cruelty is horrifying enough on its own, what's even more infuriating is that **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez voted to praise ICE.** She was one of the House Democrats who voted for a resolution celebrating the very agency responsible for this abuse. Let's not forget that **she also voted for the Laken Riley Act, Trump 's signature mass deportation bill**, and she continues to echo MAGA lies that blame undocumented immigrants for the fentanyl crisis. This isn't leadership. This is COWARDICE.
When I am elected to Congress**,** you can count on me to fight like hell to investigate these abuses, shut down facilities that violate human rights, and hold ICE accountable. What you'll never catch me doing is rubber-stamping Trump's mass deportation agenda like my opponent.

clean_body: | | Peter, In a Miami ICE jail, dozens of migrants were shackled with their hands tied behind their backs and forced to kneel and eat off styrofoam plates "like dogs." Let that sink in. | These are human beings, packed into a cell for hours, denied food, dignity, and even the most basic decency. At another ICE facility, women were denied access to gender-appropriate care and forced to use the toilet in full view of male detainees. At a third, a woman died. Across the board, medical care was withheld, people were crammed into "ice boxes" without bedding, and the abuse was so rampant guards were allegedly turning off surveillance cameras to cover their tracks. Our immigrant neighbors work hard, raise families, and give back to our community. Every time I hear these disturbing reports I can't help but think what if this was happening to someone you loved? It could happen to any one of our neighbors, friends, or coworkers. While this cruelty is horrifying enough on its own, what's even more infuriating is that Marie Gluesenkamp Perez voted to praise ICE. She was one of the House Democrats who voted for a resolution celebrating the very agency responsible for this abuse. Let's not forget that she also voted for the Laken Riley Act, Trump 's signature mass deportation bill, and she continues to echo MAGA lies that blame undocumented immigrants for the fentanyl crisis. This isn't leadership. This is COWARDICE. When I am elected to Congress, you can count on me to fight like hell to investigate these abuses, shut down facilities that violate human rights, and hold ICE accountable. What you'll never catch me doing is rubber-stamping Trump's mass deportation agenda like my opponent. Marie's praising ICE's conduct is more than disappointing - it's a betrayal of everything it means to be a Democrat, an American, and a human. We don't have to live in a country that cages and dehumanizes people. But we do have to fight for something better. We've got this shot to prove that bold, honest, working-class leadership still has a place in Washington. Let's not waste it. Let's Heal Washington! We never set out to become publishers.

**We are just two retired Americans—Neland Nobel and John Ammon—who believed in truth, liberty, and the power of citizen voices. No corporate sponsors. No big donors. No journalism degrees. Just conviction.**

In five short years, The Prickly Pear has grown to over 100,000 monthly readers.

That growth has come from sweat, late nights, and a fierce love for this country. But now, we’ve reached a crossroads.

At 77 years old, we can’t do this forever. And if The Prickly Pear is going to survive—and thrive—**it’s time to pass the torch.**

There’s a new generation of Conservative writers ready to take up the mantle. Smart. Fearless. Patriotic. **But unlike us, they’re starting out in a world where truth doesn’t pay the bills. They need support.**

That’s where you come in.

**We’ve launched a VIP subscription—just $5 per month.**

It helps us train and support these young voices—and in return, you’ll get exclusive articles, videos, and podcasts from The Prickly Pear team.

If you believe in honest, grassroots journalism, now’s the moment to step in.

Because this next generation isn’t just the future. They’re the fight.

With gratitude,

Neland Nobel & John Ammon
_Founders_ , The Prickly Pear

We are just two retired Americans—Neland Nobel and John Ammon—who believed in truth, liberty, and the power of citizen voices. No corporate sponsors. No big donors. No journalism degrees. Just conviction. In five short years, The Prickly Pear has grown to over 100,000 monthly readers. That growth has come from sweat, late nights, and a fierce love for this country. But now, we’ve reached a crossroads. At 77 years old, we can’t do this forever. And if The Prickly Pear is going to survive—and thrive—it’s time to pass the torch. There’s a new generation of Conservative writers ready to take up the mantle. Smart. Fearless. Patriotic. But unlike us, they’re starting out in a world where truth doesn’t pay the bills. They need support. That’s where you come in. We’ve launched a VIP subscription—just $5 per month. It helps us train and support these young voices—and in return, you’ll get exclusive articles, videos, and podcasts from The Prickly Pear team. _**Insider stories in regular columns or videos, live shout-outs to new paid members, behind the scenes video/pics from oru livestreams, video production, etc, and a lottery for free merch**_
_**Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs**_**(starting next week)**
_**Support our Soundcheck Fund, create an ecosystem of indy media/creators to[save democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/aab00a46-d311-442a-9b9f-f37f3ac04794?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.WRjqGsE94szbGT9fsQe3wx6yUzFesOLeOsaR2pqor74?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=168986775)
_**By David Shuster**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/311a2427-cfbe-480f-b83e-b500c3ecd06e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the sun-drenched streets of Ontario, California, where one might expect to find nothing more sinister than tennis elbow or bone spurs, the great American experiment in civil liberty recently took another punch to the gut. This time it happened not [via lies to a microphone](https://substack.com/redirect/dfe4acc7-d95d-4b99-964b-28588dc13036?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in a courtroom, or anywhere near a Home Depot.
No, this occurred in a surgery center, of all places, in a temple of Hippocrates with the charge to heal others. Yet, nowhere is safe in today's America where any square foot of land can be turned into a battlefield by that ever-bumbling leviathan known as Trump's Department of Homeland Security.
The one run by Kristi Noem, the lady of many outfits--one day a cowboy, the next a soldier--but never, on no single day, has she dressed up as someone who can explain what the hell habeas corpus means. Something she might want to know for the job she holds.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0137d7f2-f328-4e4d-a05e-27638cc97336?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So there was Denis Guillen, a landscaper originally from Honduras, peacefully trimming grass outside this medical building. Guilty of nothing other than working hard and wielding a leaf blower without a U.S. passport. So the masked men with a penchant for unprovoked violence suddenly appeared.
[They were unidentifiable and as it turns out, unaccountable](https://substack.com/redirect/97ace718-ad02-46d8-9ca0-9ac6c5a2fd37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The Trump agents proceeded to try and snatch up Guillen, who preferred not to be disappeared. So like any sane person would do when pursueed by masked men without a badge, he fled into the medical clinic.
Staff inside--nurses, doctors, the people who are trained to heal, and not destroy like members of ICE, were also never trained to host a hostage drama. They politely asked the I.C.E. "agents" (a word that now means anyone with a badge-shaped piece of plastic and an extra Y chromosome) for identification.
The reply to this simple request? Violence. A request for a warrant? Met immediately with a refusal, as if due process were optional.
One might expect this sort of crap in banana republics, not under an American government that, at least on paper, pretends to value--and even be legally held to--the Bill of Rights. **But what we have here is not enforcement. It is government thuggery under the guise of law.**
Another horrific assault on not just an innocent human being, but the very idea of America, by some people who should perhaps start preparing something other than "I was following orders" for a future Nuremberg-like appearance. They may want to look that one up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1c376fb6-03f7-4e7a-b6b2-c11bff203ed2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## `Independent Media Just .26/day With Paid-Subscription Benefits!`
_**Support our Soundcheck Fund --[create an ecosystem of independent media](https://substack.com/redirect/aab00a46-d311-442a-9b9f-f37f3ac04794?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to save democracy**_
_**Weekly Substack AMA w/ Cliff & David, video posted for paid subscribers! Starting next week!**_
_**Insider stories in regular columns or videos, live shout-outs to new paid members, behind the scenes video/pics from our livestreams, video production, etc, and a lottery for free merch!**_
_**Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs**_**(starting next week)**
And the punchline to this travesty? A statement issues by Homeland Security, in all its Orwellian majesty, accusing the medical staff of "obstruction" for locking their doors and trying to prevent what any sentient being might mistaken for some kind of gang or terrorist attack.
Yes, the ones treating patients, acting in the interests of our socieity, and calling 911 in terror to report a "kidnapping," which is exactly what this was, are at fault here. Not the jacked-up Trump secret police offering no identification or warrant.
**Legal experts have since pointed out that these I.C.E. agents - without a warrant or willingness to identify themselves, were engaged in what could be defined as abduction.** But when the executive branch fancies itself above the law, the Constitution becomes just another flimsy piece of paper for Trump to trash. Like business agreements, wedding vows and any contract to pay a sub-contractor who's worked for him.
Meanwhile, Denis Guillen's friends and family haven't heard from him since he was disappeared by these hopped-up ghouls. Guillen has vanished into the bureaucratic void, detained, but never properly charged.
**His crimes, we are left to assume, include leaf blowing while Latino and existing while undocumented.**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4ee294eb-3b38-43c2-a316-d0fca048428d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**The video: Mr. Guillen assaulted by ICE cretins, and Barbara Stone telling her harrowing story**_
* * *
But it doesn't end there. In San Diego, a 71-year-old grandmother named Barbara Stone--an American citizen and legal observer--was hauled off by ICE after recording agents skulking about the courthouse.
Her offense? Having the gall to hold up a camera in a public hallway, an act protected by the First Amendment.
To document the state is now to obstruct it. To observe it is to threaten it. And if you challenge the government's authority with a question like "Do you have a warrant?" \-- you're liable to be met with brute force. Even if you're an American citizen (see video below):
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ef441938-d67a-410f-bb2e-3776ed45d876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The real tragedy here is not simply that [a clearly crumbling Trump--both physically and cognitively](https://substack.com/redirect/257cc015-7922-4ebe-84a7-e76f5da01761?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--has had his ICE agents have abandoned even the pretense of legality. It's that our nation is growing numb to it.
With every raid, every assault on dignity, every episode of masked men treating brown-skinned workers like prey, we inch closer to a mirror universe of who we claimed to be. To being[ a country completely unrecognizable to the one that once claimed to espouse principles](https://substack.com/redirect/9a794fc0-4c16-4629-825e-a2d4c59cae08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) such as fairness, equality, compassion, and due process.
Of course, the Trump administration insists this is about "criminal aliens." This is a euphemism as dishonest as any the Trumpsters have declared (and, for that matter, it rings a bit hollow coming from a 34-count-convicted felon), but not too dishonest for [our media monopolies to repeat](https://substack.com/redirect/ab1bfa70-3977-467f-95f3-075d2a4433e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) without questioning. ([We have an answer for this](https://substack.com/redirect/aab00a46-d311-442a-9b9f-f37f3ac04794?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
**Because what is criminal here is not the presence of immigrants. It is the lawlessness of those who are supposed to be enforcing the law.**
These raids are not justice. They are theater. A disgusting pageant [for corporate-media clicks](https://substack.com/redirect/aab00a46-d311-442a-9b9f-f37f3ac04794?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and voters intoxicated by fear and utterly ignorant about the Constitution. What we are witnessing is not law enforcement--it is federal vigilantism masquerading as policy.
And it has an economic cost. Entire industries including agriculture, hospitality, and construction are suffering, even going bankrupt, as labor vanishes into detention centers and deportation flights. But then again, the financial drags are invisible to the wealthiest 1% who write the rules and rarely acknowledge who mows their lawns.
This is the true spirit of Trump's government agents in 2025: callous, confused, and utterly devoid of any humanity or shame. [Monsters living among us](https://substack.com/redirect/52ce3876-5334-41ed-9dad-333af4fd07eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
We may watch and hear the screaming. We may see the doctors pleading for law and reason. But don't ask for logic.[ Don't ask for justice](https://substack.com/redirect/97b4558e-8e0b-4a2a-87d4-8ac03be39e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Not for those like Mr. Guillen, who have already been taken away...
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."_
