Another horrific assault on not just an innocent human being, but the very idea of America, by some people who should perhaps start preparing something other than "I was following orders" for a future Nuremberg-like appearance. They may want to look that one up. | | ---|---|--- `Independent Media Just .26/day With Paid-Subscription Benefits!` Support our Soundcheck Fund --, to save democracy Weekly Substack AMA w/ Cliff & David, video posted for paid subscribers! Starting next week! Insider stories in regular columns or videos, live shout-outs to new paid members, behind the scenes video/pics from our livestreams, video production, etc, and a lottery for free merch! Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs(starting next week) And the punchline to this travesty? A statement issues by Homeland Security, in all its Orwellian majesty, accusing the medical staff of "obstruction" for locking their doors and trying to prevent what any sentient being might mistaken for some kind of gang or terrorist attack. Yes, the ones treating patients, acting in the interests of our socieity, and calling 911 in terror to report a "kidnapping," which is exactly what this was, are at fault here. Not the jacked-up Trump secret police offering no identification or warrant. Legal experts have since pointed out that these I.C.E. agents - without a warrant or willingness to identify themselves, were engaged in what could be defined as abduction. But when the executive branch fancies itself above the law, the Constitution becomes just another flimsy piece of paper for Trump to trash. Like business agreements, wedding vows and any contract to pay a sub-contractor who's worked for him. Meanwhile, Denis Guillen's friends and family haven't heard from him since he was disappeared by these hopped-up ghouls. Guillen has vanished into the bureaucratic void, detained, but never properly charged. His crimes, we are left to assume, include leaf blowing while Latino and existing while undocumented. The video: Mr. Guillen assaulted by ICE cretins, and Barbara Stone telling her harrowing story But it doesn't end there. In San Diego, a 71-year-old grandmother named Barbara Stone--an American citizen and legal observer--was hauled off by ICE after recording agents skulking about the courthouse. Her offense? Having the gall to hold up a camera in a public hallway, an act protected by the First Amendment. To document the state is now to obstruct it. To observe it is to threaten it. And if you challenge the government's authority with a question like "Do you have a warrant?" \-- you're liable to be met with brute force. Even if you're an American citizen (see video below): The real tragedy here is not simply that had his ICE agents have abandoned even the pretense of legality. It's that our nation is growing numb to it. With every raid, every assault on dignity, every episode of masked men treating brown-skinned workers like prey, we inch closer to a mirror universe of who we claimed to be. To being such as fairness, equality, compassion, and due process. Of course, the Trump administration insists this is about "criminal aliens." This is a euphemism as dishonest as any the Trumpsters have declared (and, for that matter, it rings a bit hollow coming from a 34-count-convicted felon), but not too dishonest for without questioning. () Because what is criminal here is not the presence of immigrants. It is the lawlessness of those who are supposed to be enforcing the law. These raids are not justice. They are theater. A disgusting pageant and voters intoxicated by fear and utterly ignorant about the Constitution. What we are witnessing is not law enforcement--it is federal vigilantism masquerading as policy. And it has an economic cost. Entire industries including agriculture, hospitality, and construction are suffering, even going bankrupt, as labor vanishes into detention centers and deportation flights. But then again, the financial drags are invisible to the wealthiest 1% who write the rules and rarely acknowledge who mows their lawns. This is the true spirit of Trump's government agents in 2025: callous, confused, and utterly devoid of any humanity or shame. . We may watch and hear the screaming. We may see the doctors pleading for law and reason. But don't ask for logic.. Not for those like Mr. Guillen, who have already been taken away... David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter." `Independent Media Just .26/day With Paid-Subscription Benefits!` --create an ecosystem of independent media, to save democracy Weekly Substack AMA w/ Cliff & David, video posted for paid subscribers! Starting next week! Insider stories in regular columns or videos, live shout-outs to new paid members, behind the scenes video/pics from our livestreams, video production, etc, and a lottery for free merch! Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs(starting next week) You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Dan Carr
subject: Can Christians Be Patriots?
body:
"Loving God While Loving America"

| |

# Can Christians Be Patriots?
### "Loving God While Loving America"
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jul 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
In an age of growing skepticism about patriotism, some Christians are being told that loving their country is incompatible with loving God. They're warned that flying a flag next to a cross is dangerous. That singing the national anthem in a church service is idolatry. But is this truly biblical? Can Christians be patriotic--deeply grateful for and committed to their nation--while maintaining ultimate allegiance to Christ?
_**The answer is a resounding YES!!**_
[Click Here To Read The Rest Of The Article:](https://substack.com/redirect/9a87e0c0-71cd-47c8-9543-b58d925eef95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’ve been through it all. Or so I thought…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The Left’s playbook is to destroy the lives of patriots like us.
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ef57bef11e3f4a268ea004314080c5fd&_e=HtlTGZ5QUNjv0VKdfAvKinZ0M-5XJGZ6LeltGZvEXM6miTzg7BtHhpZ_FefhrZM6jzdqP8DfrB6PT59QXWMF_fSs6ABFmd4vzHyBskdIYHmhORb_GcnMxijuh7-qKq_PAR4PKnJH9Vcn45gt7rnBwgwHOk8qnP-u4WcV4HqB11gHAyymMql43UmDgDJKF3WVpFy7-Fg6G8eHNnZME6LCh8V_MiCvlR7BIB8DDfxcYdUYC15yvvFy2maDvOzk4UznPCtZA20gcDj3T-bO00aCVF3vJZGcZWPQYeYvgKe2SlBs8F-FKuUmErTdtls4NgSd2nKn13h5K8WiJdpmUHbQYiWb78e6Cg6JK3aW97ZG-TbvEPPFcOGgkHd5tvbH-YtsJXuYyruMy-5xA9GuSqhps31Sj2TTTW6O-nWe6drKD6e553JptZgwE3bXnpobQzDJb2yj3LYCZ5fi7xvpt7Chv89LqV-kteTBoaUb1UCpFpJLXbDBjRFIAnXACihgFFjwGzepspS-KSiI0V2-UVv8oYHGd_rxmck4bWeDKn6CX9YrDtZRhTB1yoSGPbFRcq_aCIh8-iEePOvELOx0FtTGSa_Uu0hhIVIglcWn0-MPPU5Xq8Y9vF3eC-pHRDgJdlEYOHpxPWYStUDPsQNXfidK7A%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
As I watched the troubling coverage of ICE agents being assaulted on the news the other morning, I felt compelled to write you this letter.
---
What I witnessed was a powerful reminder that the radical Left’s playbook is simple, _but nevertheless _evil_ :_
---
_**Their goal is to utterly DESTROY the lives of patriots like you and me!**_
---
While the brave men and women of ICE carry out the _people’s_ mandate to secure our border and our streets, the Democrats are doxing, attacking, and upending the lives of these honorable officers who are simply doing their jobs.
---
It’s disgusting! But sadly, I know all too well just how far the Left will go to tear down a patriot.
---
I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all. _Or so I thought..._
---
**...But now, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in state court.**
---
They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me: _**the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_.**_
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6836b12d-f386-4c7b-9dd6-eea807e232da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
American businesses are opening their wallets like they haven't in decades, and the numbers tell a remarkable story of economic revival under President Donald Trump's pro-growth agenda.
Capital expenditure--the money companies spend on equipment, machinery, and technology to expand their operations--is experiencing a "CapEx Comeback." Business equipment production surged an annualized 11% in the second quarter, following an even more impressive 23% gain in the first quarter, **[Treasury Sec. Scott Bessent announced on X, Tuesday morning.](https://substack.com/redirect/3ca2ec68-5fcf-42a5-afef-3ae5f26c07fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** This back-to-back performance represents the strongest growth streak since 1997, signaling that corporate America has regained confidence in the future.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3ca2ec68-5fcf-42a5-afef-3ae5f26c07fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**What This Means for America**
When businesses invest in new equipment and technology, it creates a virtuous cycle throughout the economy. Companies become more productive, workers become more valuable, and wages rise as a result. The data shows this cycle is already in motion--blue-collar paychecks are rising at their fastest pace since Trump's first term, with more gains expected ahead.
Capital expenditure jumped 16.6% in just the first half of 2025, indicating that Trump's "America First" policies are encouraging companies to invest domestically rather than shipping jobs and investment overseas. This represents a major shift from recent years when businesses were hesitant to make long-term commitments due to regulatory uncertainty and anti-business policies.
**The Policy Connection**
Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill"--the administration's comprehensive tax and regulatory reform package--appears to be the catalyst for this investment surge. By cutting red tape, reducing tax burdens, and creating certainty for businesses, the legislation has unleashed pent-up demand for expansion and modernization.
This isn't just about big corporations. When companies invest in new equipment, they need workers to operate it, creating jobs and driving up wages. The ripple effects extend to equipment manufacturers, construction companies, and the entire supply chain that supports business expansion.
**Looking Ahead**
With CapEx growth at levels not seen in nearly three decades, America appears to be entering a new era of business investment and economic growth. If current trends continue, this could mark the beginning of a sustained period of rising productivity and living standards--exactly what Trump promised when he campaigned on putting America's economic interests first.
The question now isn't whether the CapEx comeback is real, but how long this investment boom can sustain itself and drive broader economic prosperity.

# _**Bombshell!**_**: Trump calls for DOJ to prosecute Obama over Russia hoax origins**
President Donald Trump on Tuesday accused Barack Obama of orchestrating a criminal conspiracy to **[undermine his 2016 election victory](https://substack.com/redirect/4e61771a-1c66-450d-9cad-954d4933923f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and urged the Justice Department to prosecute him.
[Watch The Clip](https://substack.com/redirect/4e61771a-1c66-450d-9cad-954d4933923f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4e61771a-1c66-450d-9cad-954d4933923f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Speaking from the Oval Office** during a visit with Philippine President Ferdinand "Bongbong" Marcos Jr., Trump claimed Obama directed a U.S. intelligence assessment of Russian election interference to benefit Hillary Clinton and frame his campaign.
* **" Obama has been caught directly," Trump said**, referencing an email that showed Obama requested a report on Russian efforts to influence the 2016 election. He claimed the assessment was "irrefutable proof that Obama was seditious, that Obama led, was trying to lead a coup," and was reason he spent much of his first term advocating his innocence regarding Russia collusion.
* **Calling it "treason" and "criminal at the highest level," Trump also blamed Clinton, and others** for initiating what he called the coup attempt. "The leader of the gang was President Obama, Barack Hussein Obama. Have you heard of him?" Trump said. He also implicated Joe Biden, James Comey, John Brennan, and James Clapper.
* **Trump, facing his own legal challenges,** insisted the truth was the opposite of what liberals claim:**** "They tried to steal the election. They tried to obfuscate the election," he said, accusing Democrats of spending $12 million on the discredited Steele dossier and hiding key documents under classification. Trump again called for the DOJ to focus on the Obama-era officials.

Salvadoran President Nayib Bukele fired back late Monday at Hunter Biden after **[the former president's son threatened a future U.S. invasion](https://substack.com/redirect/2f2781ec-de3c-4beb-ac77-38cd93954368?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of El Salvador if deported immigrants held in Salvadoran prisons weren't returned to the U.S., dismissed the remarks with sarcasm, referencing Biden's history of drug use.

* **" Is Hunter Biden sniffing powdered milk?" **Bukele, a staunch ally of President Donald Trump **[wrote on X](https://substack.com/redirect/fba66123-f4bd-4da0-b729-64c8c99bffc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[,](https://substack.com/redirect/fba66123-f4bd-4da0-b729-64c8c99bffc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**** mocking Biden's past admission of mistaking parmesan cheese for crack cocaine. The Salvadoran president posted the message with a clip from Biden's interview, in which he threatened to "f---ing invade" El Salvador if detainees were not returned.
* **In the podcast excerpt, Biden raged against Trump and Bukele** , calling them "f---ing dictator-thug[s]" and alleging the pair committed a "f---ing crime" by partnering in U.S. deportation operations. "You either f---ing send [them] back or I'm going to f---ing invade," Biden said, referring to migrants imprisoned at the Salvadoran CECOT penitentiary.
* **Bukele responded by pointing to his cooperation with U.S. authorities** , citing a recent three-way prisoner exchange involving El Salvador, the U.S., and Venezuela. "Maduro's regime now shouts and expresses outrage -- not because they disagree with the deal, but because they just realized they are left without hostages from the most powerful country in the world," Bukele said.
* **The hostage agreement freed ten Americans held by Venezuela**. While Bukele emphasized his diplomatic ties, sharing a clip of Special Envoy Adam Boehler calling him a "good friend" of the U.S., Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the deal addressed "unacceptable" detentions of Americans under "highly questionable circumstances."

* * *
# **Robbery gone WRONG: Democrat Senator forced to resign**
Minnesota Democratic State Sen. Nicole Mitchell will resign from office after being **[convicted of burglary for breaking into her stepmother's home](https://substack.com/redirect/061f8f51-f814-442c-a557-e0465f6afcc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, her attorneys announced Monday.
* **" Senator Mitchell's constituents **deserve for her legislative projects to be finalized or ready to hand off to her successor before she resigns," her attorneys said in a press release, noting the resignation will happen no later than August 4. The resignation comes amid mounting pressure from colleagues and party leadership.
* **Mitchell was convicted Friday of burglary** stemming from an April 2024 incident in which Detroit Lakes police found her dressed in black in her stepmother's basement with a flashlight covered by a black sock. Carol Mitchell, her estranged stepmother, called 911 to report the break-in.
* **Democratic Senate Majority Leader Erin Murphy** said Mitchell previously pledged to resign if convicted. "I expect her to follow through on that pledge," Murphy said, following the jury's decision. Mitchell has faced bipartisan calls to step down since the verdict.
* **Mitchell, a former TV meteorologist** and Air Force officer, was elected in 2022 to represent Minnesota's 47th Senate District. Her office has not publicly commented on the resignation or the conviction.

With CapEx growth at levels not seen in nearly three decades, America appears to be entering a new exciting era of business investment and economic growth... | | | Jul 22 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- American businesses are opening their wallets like they haven't in decades, and the numbers tell a remarkable story of economic revival under President Donald Trump's pro-growth agenda. Capital expenditure--the money companies spend on equipment, machinery, and technology to expand their operations--is experiencing a "CapEx Comeback." Business equipment production surged an annualized 11% in the second quarter, following an even more impressive 23% gain in the first quarter, This back-to-back performance represents the strongest growth streak since 1997, signaling that corporate America has regained confidence in the future. | | ---|---|--- What This Means for America When businesses invest in new equipment and technology, it creates a virtuous cycle throughout the economy. Companies become more productive, workers become more valuable, and wages rise as a result. The data shows this cycle is already in motion--blue-collar paychecks are rising at their fastest pace since Trump's first term, with more gains expected ahead. Capital expenditure jumped 16.6% in just the first half of 2025, indicating that Trump's "America First" policies are encouraging companies to invest domestically rather than shipping jobs and investment overseas. This represents a major shift from recent years when businesses were hesitant to make long-term commitments due to regulatory uncertainty and anti-business policies. The Policy Connection Trump's "One Big Beautiful Bill"--the administration's comprehensive tax and regulatory reform package--appears to be the catalyst for this investment surge. By cutting red tape, reducing tax burdens, and creating certainty for businesses, the legislation has unleashed pent-up demand for expansion and modernization. This isn't just about big corporations. When companies invest in new equipment, they need workers to operate it, creating jobs and driving up wages. The ripple effects extend to equipment manufacturers, construction companies, and the entire supply chain that supports business expansion. Looking Ahead With CapEx growth at levels not seen in nearly three decades, America appears to be entering a new era of business investment and economic growth. If current trends continue, this could mark the beginning of a sustained period of rising productivity and living standards--exactly what Trump promised when he campaigned on putting America's economic interests first. The question now isn't whether the CapEx comeback is real, but how long this investment boom can sustain itself and drive broader economic prosperity. They say the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, and expecting different results. Well, that’s been the Democratic Party’s strategy in places like the Central Valley for far too long. We’ve abandoned our base. We’ve listened to consultants instead of communities. We’ve treated voters like data points instead of people. And meanwhile, turnout keeps falling, Republicans keep winning, and working families keep getting left behind. I’m not running for Congress to play the same game. **I’m running because we need to give people something to vote for, not just someone to vote against.** That’s what we’re doing here in CA-22. It’s how we’ve attracted over **3,500 individual** teachers, students, farmworkers, and neighbors who have donated to this campaign. We’ve got more volunteer sign ups than we have roles. They didn’t show up for political theater. They showed up to _fight_. Because when Democrats actually **stand up and fight** – not hedge, not poll test, not wait – _that’s_ when we win. **[If you’re ready for a people-powered campaign that listens more than it talks, that organizes instead of panders, and that’s rooted in the Valley, you’ve come to the right place. clean_body: | = They say the definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over again, and expecting different results. Well, that’s been the Democratic Party’s strategy in places like the Central Valley for far too long. We’ve abandoned our base. We’ve listened to consultants instead of communities. We’ve treated voters like data points instead of people. And meanwhile, turnout keeps falling, Republicans keep winning, and working families keep getting left behind. I’m not running for Congress to play the same game. I’m running because we need to give people something to vote for, not just someone to vote against. That’s what we’re doing here in CA-22. It’s how we’ve attracted over 3,500 individual teachers, students, farmworkers, and neighbors who have donated to this campaign. We’ve got more volunteer sign ups than we have roles. They didn’t show up for political theater. They showed up to fight. Because when Democrats actually stand up and fight – not hedge, not poll test, not wait – that’s when we win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let's do this, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. | | Hey team, By now, you may have heard that Georgia Republicans are preparing to purge nearly 500,000 voters across the state. **But don’t worry if this is your first time hearing about it, team.** We’re here to break down what this means for our democracy and voting freedom. **What exactly is happening?**
The state of Georgia is preparing for the second-largest voter purge in the state’s history — and what would also be one of the largest in U.S. history. Nearly 500,000 people are at risk of having their voter registration canceled, meaning they’d lose their eligibility to vote in Georgia almost immediately. **Who is behind this?**
Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is leading the way, and he’s backed by Georgia Republicans and MAGA extremists. **Where is this happening?**
The purge list consists of voters who are registered in Georgia and have been marked as inactive for various reasons, including out-of-state college students, members of the military, or even frequent, long-time Georgia voters who may have missed out on voting in any recent elections. The list also includes people who may have moved out of Georgia. **When is this happening? **
If a voter has been placed on the inactive list by the Georgia Secretary of State’s office, and does not contact their county office to be re-activated, they will be removed from the voter rolls by August 20th. **Why are they doing this? **
Republicans claim this is “routine maintenance” in the name of keeping the rolls clean. But we know all too well that past purges have removed thousands of eligible Georgia voters, and historically, have disproportionately impacted Black and brown voters. **How are they doing this? **
By relying on flawed data, outdated records, and wrongful “use it or lose it” assumptions, Georgia is stripping eligible voters of their registration. [**Fair Fight is fighting back — but we can’t do it alone. There has never been a more critical time to power our pro-voter movement and prepare for more attacks on voting freedom from Georgia Republicans and MAGA cronies everywhere. **For Georgia voters, here are some steps you can take: **
* **Check your registration status at[mvp.sos.ga.gov/s/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111945562/558910052/535300228?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250722_T1_VoterPurge1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdjMWNhMS00NDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWuSTFXykM70hxejx-NAwfkSNTtJudbtWFffzU22i5s=&emci=d0338fdd-4267-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f57c1ca1-4467-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=1037277)**
* **Contact your county elections office** ASAP to confirm your voter registration. If you are on the inactive list, verify you are an active voter.

**Got a loved one in Georgia?** Be sure to forward this email to any of your friends and family members who vote in Georgia, and [**make a donation to Fair Fight**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111945565/558910054/-1427917443?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250722_T1_VoterPurge1_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdjMWNhMS00NDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iWuSTFXykM70hxejx-NAwfkSNTtJudbtWFffzU22i5s=) so we can continue our efforts to combat voter suppression and help voters with the resources they need to exercise their voting freedom.

clean_body: Let’s break this news down: | | | Hey team, By now, you may have heard that Georgia Republicans are preparing to purge nearly 500,000 voters across the state. But don’t worry if this is your first time hearing about it, team. We’re here to break down what this means for our democracy and voting freedom. What exactly is happening? The state of Georgia is preparing for the second-largest voter purge in the state’s history — and what would also be one of the largest in U.S. history. Nearly 500,000 people are at risk of having their voter registration canceled, meaning they’d lose their eligibility to vote in Georgia almost immediately. Who is behind this? Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger is leading the way, and he’s backed by Georgia Republicans and MAGA extremists. Where is this happening? The purge list consists of voters who are registered in Georgia and have been marked as inactive for various reasons, including out-of-state college students, members of the military, or even frequent, long-time Georgia voters who may have missed out on voting in any recent elections. The list also includes people who may have moved out of Georgia. When is this happening? If a voter has been placed on the inactive list by the Georgia Secretary of State’s office, and does not contact their county office to be re-activated, they will be removed from the voter rolls by August 20th. Why are they doing this? Republicans claim this is “routine maintenance” in the name of keeping the rolls clean. But we know all too well that past purges have removed thousands of eligible Georgia voters, and historically, have disproportionately impacted Black and brown voters. How are they doing this? By relying on flawed data, outdated records, and wrongful “use it or lose it” assumptions, Georgia is stripping eligible voters of their registration. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- For Georgia voters, here are some steps you can take: Check your registration status at Contact your county elections office ASAP to confirm your voter registration. If you are on the inactive list, verify you are an active voter. Got a loved one in Georgia? Be sure to forward this email to any of your friends and family members who vote in Georgia, and = so we can continue our efforts to combat voter suppression and help voters with the resources they need to exercise their voting freedom. In solidarity, Fair Fight = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: The DC Bugle
subject: Barack Obama Got This Bad News That Could Land Him in Prison
body:

Check out these great sponsors of today's show:
**Masa Chips**
You're probably watching the Sean Spicer Show right now and thinking "hmm, I wish I had something healthy and satisfying to snack on..." Well Masa Chips are exactly what you are looking for. Big corporations use cheap nasty seed oils that can cause inflammation and health issues. Masa cut out all the bad stuff and created a tortilla chip with just 3 ingredients: organic nixtamalized corn, sea salt, and 100 percent grass-fed beef tallow. Snacking on MASA chips feels different--you feel satisfied, light, and energetic, with no crash, bloat, or sluggishness. So head to https://MASAChips.com/SEAN to get 25% off your first order.
**Riverbend Ranch**
Riverbend Ranch has been around for 35 years, selecting cattle that have higher marbling and tenderness than any other beef. You cannot get this beef in your grocery store. Riverbend Ranch ages their beef for 21 days and you'll find it more tender and flavorful than even the finest restaurants. So, if you're ready to have the best steak of your life, head to https://www.riverbendranch.com. Use promo code: SEAN to get $20 of your first order.
Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard releases a report showing that President Obama was directly responsible for the Russia hoax. Showing how the Obama administration received intel that Russia did not and was unable to interfere with the 2016 election. The administration weaponized and politicized false intelligence to subvert the American people. Gabbard submitted this report to the DOJ to launch a criminal investigation on Obama and his administration. Along with this Todd Blanche the Deputy Attorney General is set to meet with Ghislaine Maxwell to uncover individuals associated with Jeffrey Epstein who have committed crimes. The Dignity Act was introduced by Republican Congresswoman Maria Salazar. The bill has support from other moderate leaning Republican Congress Members and claims that it does not provide amnesty, government handouts or citizenship to illegal immigrants. Will Chamberlain, Senior Counsel at the Article III Project is with me today to unpack it all!

body:
Mapping the Future: Texas Redistricting Chaos & Grijalva’s Landslide Win in Arizona | Season 2025, Episode 23 | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/latinos.vote/podcast-season2025-ep23-8343222?e=5bd167f239)

| |
# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=cde75a6ef6&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=c90b00240f&e=5bd167f239 "Texas Redistricting Chaos & Grijalva’s Landslide Win in Arizona")
---

_**Mapping the Future:**_
**Texas Redistricting Chaos & Grijalva’s Landslide Win in Arizona**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 23
| Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid break down the shocking **Arizona special election** \- that wasn’t so shocking to anyone paying attention. **Adelita Grijalva didn’t just win — she crushed her competition** — despite the hype around viral social media candidates. What does her landslide win say about the myth of the “progressive takeover”?

Our hosts also take you deep into **Texas** , where **a mid-decade redistricting power grab** could unravel the GOP — and maybe the courts. Chuck drops precinct-level knowledge on Houston and Dallas districts (by literally drawing them out with his fists), while Mike sounds the alarm on how '**opening pandora's box** ' could backfire spectacularly.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Donald Trump's Support Collapses With Key Demographic](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=7fef9629ca&e=5bd167f239) By: Newsweek

clean_body: Mapping the Future: Texas Redistricting Chaos & Grijalva’s Landslide Win in Arizona | Season 2025, Episode 23 | | | | | | | | | | | "Texas Redistricting Chaos & Grijalva’s Landslide Win in Arizona" Mapping the Future: Texas Redistricting Chaos & Grijalva’s Landslide Win in Arizona The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 23 | Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid break down the shocking Arizona special election \- that wasn’t so shocking to anyone paying attention. Adelita Grijalva didn’t just win — she crushed her competition — despite the hype around viral social media candidates. What does her landslide win say about the myth of the “progressive takeover”? Our hosts also take you deep into Texas , where a mid-decade redistricting power grab could unravel the GOP — and maybe the courts. Chuck drops precinct-level knowledge on Houston and Dallas districts (by literally drawing them out with his fists), while Mike sounds the alarm on how 'opening pandora's box ' could backfire spectacularly. | | | | | Today's Headlines: By: Newsweek By: The Guardian By: The Guardian By: Los Angeles Times By: Daily Signal By: Campaigns and Elections By: L.A Times By: News Nation Now By: The Guardian By: The Fulcrum By: Eye on Sun Valley By: The Bee By: Axios By: L.A Taco By: The Texas Tribune By: Union-Bulletin By: Axios | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ¡Bienvenidos Todos! subject: They said we didn’t stand a chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, From the moment we launched this campaign, the insiders laughed.
They said we were too bold .
Too grassroots .
Too honest .
They told me we didn’t stand a chance, not against the money machine Ashley Moody and the GOP have behind them.
But here’s what they didn’t count on:
You.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/5A57454E457A6751673348397A47726A495134316861506F5272562B416E4A6236694E7A774F526C5A64524569646D50365A574949574C6E64355955576E5A52/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-22%20at%2010.54.08%E2%80%AFAM.png]
They didn’t see the retired teacher in Tallahassee who chipped in $10, the college student in Orlando registering voters every weekend, or the veteran in the Panhandle who told me, “Keep fighting... we need this.”
This isn’t just a campaign. It’s a challenge to everything they think they’ve locked down in Florida.
We do stand a chance, and it’s because people like you refuse to sit this one out.
We’re not done yet, and we’re getting louder. We’re getting stronger. And we’re building something real.
Will you help us keep proving them wrong?
Chip in now to power this fight forward, $15 is all it takes. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

name: Team Bennet
subject: Trump’s “beautiful” bill will hurt Coloradans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250722_healthcare_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250722_healthcare_act]
Hi team,
President Trump and his Republican Party are a disaster for working families.
The "big, beautiful bill" they just passed cut more than $1 trillion from health care and food assistance programs—gutting Medicaid and SNAP to help fund another tax break for their ultra-wealthy donors.
In Colorado alone, Medicaid helps cover the healthcare costs of 61% of Coloradans in nursing homes, nearly 40% of our children, and 44% of all births statewide. With Trump’s new budget, nearly 150,000 Coloradans could lose their health insurance.
This isn’t just politics as usual—it’s gambling with people’s lives.
Michael is running for Governor because he knows we can and must rise to the challenge of our time. He’s committed to protecting the programs our families depend on and making sure no one in our state is left behind.
We’ve been through tough times before, and we’ve gotten through them—and come out stronger—by sticking together. If you’re with us in this fight to protect our working families, defend our values, and build a Colorado that works for everyone, chip in today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250722_healthcare_act]

name: Gregory Wrightstone, CO2 Coalition
subject: Get the truth about climate science
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)
---
Friend, I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. The so-called "settled science" of climate change is a giant propaganda campaign –– one the Green Lobby uses to scare you and take your hard-earned tax dollars. _**[Friend, I want to personally invite you to subscribe to the CO 2 Coalition’s informative weekly newsletter to get the facts about the REAL science behind climate change.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)**_
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63) **[Get the Latest Climate Science News Now](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)** [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)
---
Are deserts expanding? Are there more hurricanes today? Have droughts become more frequent? These are the questions our experts explore in their hard-hitting news and analysis, Friend –– and their findings _will_ _likely make you question everything you’ve been told about the so-called “settled science.”_ The truth is, true scientific inquiry shows different results than the doom-and-gloom scenarios pushed by the Climate Cult and their allies in the mainstream media, the education establishment, and the Green Lobby! In fact, the CO2 Coalition’s scientific analysis, independent research, and in-depth, state-by-state studies consistently reveal something the Climate Cult doesn't want you to know: ecosystems are thriving, not dying –– and we've got the hard data to prove it. _**[That's why I'm urging you, Friend, to subscribe to our weekly newsletter today and discover the truth about climate science –– and expose the lies being pushed by climate alarmists.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)**_
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63) **[Get Reliable Climate Science News Now](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)** [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)
---
Since 2015, the CO2 Coalition –– a group of 180+ respected U.S. scientists and researchers, along with a Nobel-Prize-winning physicist on our board –– has brought truth directly to the American people. Our team of leading scientists and researchers has been featured in major media outlets. We've testified before Congress, armed with the facts that debunk the Climate Cult's false narratives. And we've reached over 200,000+ Americans with our educational campaigns. In short, the CO2 Coalition is the "tip of the spear" in the battle between scientific truth and politically-motivated science fiction! _**[If you want to learn more Climate Facts and debunk Climate Fiction, please sign up for CO 2 Coalition’s weekly newsletter today.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)**_
---
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63) **[Get the Latest Climate Science News Now](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)** [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/def7aeac731441269ff68d02029a09df-f0d60fc267ff4d1d8f7de55f9db904c8/63)
---
Thank you for joining the CO2 Coalition in our crucial education and outreach efforts. Together, we're building a movement of informed citizens who understand the real science behind climate change –– not the politicized version pushed by special interests in the Green Lobby. Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director

clean_body: Please read the following message from our sponsor. | | | | Friend, I'm sounding the alarm on a massive deception that's threatening the future of our country. The so-called "settled science" of climate change is a giant propaganda campaign –– one the Green Lobby uses to scare you and take your hard-earned tax dollars. Are deserts expanding? Are there more hurricanes today? Have droughts become more frequent? These are the questions our experts explore in their hard-hitting news and analysis, Friend –– and their findings will likely make you question everything you’ve been told about the so-called “settled science.” The truth is, true scientific inquiry shows different results than the doom-and-gloom scenarios pushed by the Climate Cult and their allies in the mainstream media, the education establishment, and the Green Lobby! In fact, the CO2 Coalition’s scientific analysis, independent research, and in-depth, state-by-state studies consistently reveal something the Climate Cult doesn't want you to know: ecosystems are thriving, not dying –– and we've got the hard data to prove it. Since 2015, the CO2 Coalition –– a group of 180+ respected U.S. scientists and researchers, along with a Nobel-Prize-winning physicist on our board –– has brought truth directly to the American people. Our team of leading scientists and researchers has been featured in major media outlets. We've testified before Congress, armed with the facts that debunk the Climate Cult's false narratives. And we've reached over 200,000+ Americans with our educational campaigns. In short, the CO2 Coalition is the "tip of the spear" in the battle between scientific truth and politically-motivated science fiction! Thank you for joining the CO2 Coalition in our crucial education and outreach efforts. Together, we're building a movement of informed citizens who understand the real science behind climate change –– not the politicized version pushed by special interests in the Green Lobby. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Almost half of ICE’s June arrests were non-criminal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

To carry out their mass deportation agenda, the Trump administration told
ICE to TRIPLE their arrests, increasing their daily quota from 1,000 to
3,000 in late May.

As a result, ICE is now targeting and detaining thousands of people with
NO criminal charges or convictions. This month, 47 percent — almost HALF —
of all ICE arrests were non-criminal:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250722?refcode=em20250722-36865&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36865_1203867_qPzC1g&akid=36865%2E1203867%2EqPzC1g ]Axios chart: ICE arrests by reported criminal status

It’s obvious: ICE is racially profiling and arresting anyone they can to
hit their numbers.

Trump’s mass deportation plan has always been a racist, xenophobic attempt
to persecute and demonize all immigrants.

With a budget larger than most countries’ militaries, ICE is now America’s
Gestapo, terrorizing communities across the country and violating basic
human rights just to score political points and achieve Trump’s cruel
campaign promise.

We can’t let it stand, and Justice Democrats members in Congress like Rep.
Delia Ramirez are boldly fighting back and introducing legislation to stop
this fascism.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250722?refcode=em20250722-36865&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36865_1203867_qPzC1g&akid=36865%2E1203867%2EqPzC1g ]Help us recruit and elect more progressive champions who will work to
abolish ICE and stop Trump’s mass deportation scheme: pitch in
$5 or whatever you can today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250722?refcode=em20250722-36865&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36865_1203867_qPzC1g&akid=36865%2E1203867%2EqPzC1g ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

* * *
Stephen Colbert’s fearless commentary often holds those in power accountable.
Most recently he accused his employer and CBS’s parent company Paramount, for paying a “big fat bribe” of $16 million to Donald Trump.
**Just THREE DAYS later, CBS canceled Colbert’s show in what seems like an effort to win Trump's favor and get an approval from his FCC for the sale of Paramount to SkyDance.**
Trump’s response on his social media platform was, “I absolutely love that Colbert got fired. His talent was even less than his ratings.”

clean_body: | | | Protect the people who speak truth to power! Stephen Colbert’s fearless commentary often holds those in power accountable. Most recently he accused his employer and CBS’s parent company Paramount, for paying a “big fat bribe” of $16 million to Donald Trump. Just THREE DAYS later, CBS canceled Colbert’s show in what seems like an effort to win Trump's favor and get an approval from his FCC for the sale of Paramount to SkyDance. Trump’s response on his social media platform was, “I absolutely love that Colbert got fired. His talent was even less than his ratings.” In fealty to Trump, it appears CBS canceled their number one program! | Colbert has become an essential figure in our national dialogue, blending humor with sharp critique to address the pressing issues of our time. For over three decades, "The Late Show" has been a platform for meaningful discourse and entertainment. We cannot let this vital outlet disappear, especially when public debate is more critical than ever. Colbert should stay, Trump should go! ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Heather Williams (via DLCC.org)
subject: Our membership drive is closing
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Through the end of this month, a coalition of donors are matching grassroots donations three times, making your donation to activate your DLCC membership even more impactful. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Hi, it’s Heather with the DLCC. **Our 2025 membership drive is closing on July 31st, and I couldn’t let our deadline pass without reaching out to you.** DLCC members are an integral part of the Democratic grassroots movement, and strengthening our numbers to reach this team’s full potential has never been more critical. I’m counting on you to take action for the first time today. [Will you make your first donation and claim your 2025 membership before it's too late?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDa7m90zNjTmBK_i5PQ3_eFHHKG_AUh0BpuwESPs8BxxdGBKYLYlufenXCA02B0gi-IzXIES5C54HStahUVL4u5Xpa7QphPcrnV74od9ehq_u22S_zDoiz8rbAOLilmZBIgMHNLal7hT4kGJalKOL0f0NKt8Lze5iWGW7_CqTGLeCunvzBUaGWmUbLYtlnUChDSPCwPdvRq3sBpOjA20IIlOo8likh1lt3fZZEiSb1xIhXFLGS4HvD03k6b6CSPCbVex03q98LUnYf0rNFrZNrWpaGbp77Ayv5Kxm_ymAhAmT5QXMLmNcuZgHOn8nsNGWpYd5KjJQ-KUwMSoiPw1JoiqarxRuzEmKXOH5d2OgKJG3k_tVMactrlhT4KBk_Oy7ZeyKwKh0NhBh34YbxxkAg26jbT4sMxfNR1uyVP0vFGn_aVW5VB7Kjn_Y0zQ5YpBdHrH4PU8mzEqfvAsTcdDeYWEZrcLMs6XSuVkaZXPX33EYo0411N1i2Rb3OyiA3RU0i-6oLCxyFbqjNRHsvbVe6BYeBSg0Bb30Lmnv_UphHlTg/4ie/5wi14DM8T2eJIKkElEnfhg/h0/h001.fryG66hQEod9T8_xoZgh3HdNi6drqHSFzoIPWOQS5ec) Trump and Republicans have taken a sledgehammer to our federal government, gutting Medicaid, defunding the Department of Education, and firing thousands of federal workers. Their actions will continue to have dangerous consequences for millions of people. Joining our membership team with a donation of $10 or more helps strengthen our efforts to elect state Democrats and fight back. **Here’s how:**
* **Each one of our over 16,000 members owns a stake in helping elect state Democrats who will fight to stop the extremism in state legislatures.** Every seat we win is a huge step forward in the battle against Trump’s agenda.
* **Our members support the groundbreaking strategy that helps win elections.** We make **data-driven decisions** to ensure that every dollar spent at this ballot level is maximized. Our best-in-class analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs will help lead our party to victories nationwide.

**I’m urging you not to wait. Through the end of the month, a coalition of donors are matching grassroots donations _three times_ , making your donation to activate your DLCC membership even more impactful.** [Donate $10 to join our exclusive group of DLCC members and watch your donation make a difference → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDa7m90zNjTmBK_i5PQ3_eFHHKG_AUh0BpuwESPs8BxxdGBKYLYlufenXCA02B0gi-IzXIES5C54HStahUVL4u5Xpa7QphPcrnV74od9ehq_u22S_zDoiz8rbAOLilmZBIgMHNLal7hT4kGJalKOL0f0NKt8Lze5iWGW7_CqTGLeCunvzBUaGWmUbLYtlnUChDnP6lxu1Gqa_rUmzFx0O5kaxAj9EzWmi1NJeutbRcLOUUEZyEiS66iU2Mpr6upDJx9E8dJcE4YMc2ZVlK6A4vqTrZxH2iLK8P0T_Zt8WYvAOfM0rlztlBpuf_B9MREMr58cdWr-1koWTfixAC9NNRSZn3q4oskq1-6kw10jyhFYk3hHQLQ9M6Ny-6VNOQ0aSKVvOucL14Z3FJQufgt-Fd4QrDDmnsxK4AG_pGL2Mbjl3_DvoToF3TdP93G6vI15ujB2JF1AB379VgyFAzm_gdHONwSuVNLPZSaXEQGcgis7HGB8gyDuVruEicLs4batubwDEbCNvDbJebsQVK3dtO3_kEjvAg02Acbm_wzybCt04/4ie/5wi14DM8T2eJIKkElEnfhg/h1/h001.j5wpnZIaNYWDgrcVdnVB8qByhyrPAF4HKax92OFHdxs) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: This is how life feels when I'm visiting communities across New Mexico! 🫧🌞🌶️💛
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Every New Mexican has a role to play in our future.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
I'm back on the road for my Lift Up New Mexico tour — and I wanted to share some of my favorite moments from the campaign trail with you.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
_Kicking off our tour with a packed room in Shiprock._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
_Mud bogs, good food, and meeting New Mexicans in Cuba. That’s how we wrapped up Day 1 of our tour._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
_We marched in the Portales Heritage Day Parade. We celebrated community, tradition, and the spirit that makes eastern New Mexico so special._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
_Grateful to have met new friends & see familiar faces in Clovis!_
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
_I heard from families, small business owners, veterans, and educators in Hobbs._
It’s been wonderful to meet new supporters, reconnect with old friends, and talk with folks in rural communities about our shared vision to make housing, healthcare, and groceries more affordable.
**Every New Mexican has a role to play in our future, and we’re not leaving any community behind.** That’s why we’re organizing and meeting with communities _everywhere_ , but filling up the tank with gas in a state this big adds up fast.
**[Can you chip in $5 to help me reach the next town and continue meeting with voters across the state?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)**
Thank you, and more soon!
Deb Haaland
P.S. This is how life feels when I'm visiting communities across New Mexico! 🫧🌞🌶️💛
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250722_2_liftup?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-3326&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250722-2&t=2&refcode2=3326_400544_OcytZ1&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3326%2E400544%2EOcytZ1)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

**[I’m writing today because America is in deep trouble, and I wanted to see if you could help us fight back.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e31668960/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LXByb2plY3QtcGFjL2Rlc2tvZmFubi1oaWl0c2Fubi1lbS1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsUnZQU2wxbw/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1iciZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTA0MF93cjE/gaIAPig/sbg809087fb)**
Whatever your politics, you should be alarmed by the radical left’s assault on students across the country.
**Every ludicrous fad has bubbled up from the schools:** – Explicit pornography in school libraries, – The attack on pronouns (pronouns!), – Propagandizing anti-white and anti-Western hate – The preposterous term, “Latinx,” – Affirmative action in school discipline, and last but not least ... – The poisoning and mutilating of children.
And guess what? Test scores are plummeting nationwide, as school officials claim that MATH and MERIT are “racist systems.” Who could have seen that coming? Friend, none of this is happening by accident. The left has waged a multigenerational war to infiltrate the schools and control what America’s children are taught.
But I’ve got great news! Now there’s a way for patriots like you and me to fight back. **Allow me to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC:** This Political Action Committee was founded by my friend Ryan Girdusky to counteract what the left has been doing for decades by getting involved in local school board elections.
_**Take it from me: Ryan’s team at the 1776 Project PAC is the best there is.**_
**Since the 1776 PAC was founded over 3 years ago, they’ve:** ✅ Liberated MILLIONS of students from left wing leadership in their local school boards. ✅ WON over 270 VICTORIES across the country. ✅ Created a plan to more than triple their impact with HUNDREDS of new, conservative school board candidates in 2024 and 2025. No other organization is doing what Ryan Girdusky and the 1776 Project PAC are doing.
[**Will you join me in supporting the 1776 Project PAC today with a donation of $17.76 -- or more!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e31668960/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS8xNzc2LXByb2plY3QtcGFjL2Rlc2tvZmFubi1oaWl0c2Fubi1lbS1vbS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA3MjI/LbmNsUnZQU2wxbw/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1iciZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMTA0MF93cjE/gaIAPig/sbg809087fb)
Sincerely, Ann Coulter

name: John Fetterman
subject: Trump’s attack on veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey Derek, John here. I need you to know what's happening at the VA:

👉 First, Trump’s crew said they had to fire 83,000 VA workers.

👉 Then, they walked it back – said 30,000 would do. 🫠

👉 Now, they’re using backdoor tricks: hiring freezes, forced retirements, quiet pushouts. The result? 17,000 gone already. Another 12,000 by fall.

And they’ve got the nerve to say it won’t hurt vets' access to their health care. Ask any vet stuck waiting months for a claim or an appointment! 😡

If you're as angry about this as I am, will you please take two minutes to fill out our Save the VA Strategy Survey?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51463?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk179-su-fl&t=1001&akid=10216%2E434096%2EWNrNRX

Here's the thing: Docs and nurses are doing paperwork because the admin staff is gone. And while the workforce shrinks, the number of vets needing care is only rising. This is a recipe for disaster.

This is all part of Trump's plan. Slashing jobs. Gutting Medicaid and SNAP. Letting rural hospitals die. All to chip away at the system that's supposed to support the folks who've sacrificed so much to keep us all safe.

What are they trying to do? Trump and his buddies want to replace these programs with a patchwork mess of red tape, fees, and for-profit care. That means worse care for vets and fat profits for insurance companies and private contractors.

Trump, his VA secretary Collins, and the rest of that crowd have never given a damn about veterans. This was never about saving money. It’s about making their rich pals richer off the backs of vets and taxpayers.

Here in PA, the VA is our biggest federal employer. Trump’s mess is hitting us HARD, so that's why I'm reaching out to you, Derek.

I need you to join us in the fight to save the VA and make sure that when vets can't get the care they need – they care they've EARNED – everyone knows exactly who's to blame.

Will you please take two minutes to fill out our Save the VA Strategy Survey before midnight tonight?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51462?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk179-su-fl&t=1002&akid=10216%2E434096%2EWNrNRX

Thanks for your quick response,

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=10216%2E434096%2EWNrNRX

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=10216%2E434096%2EWNrNRX

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

This was never about saving money. It’s about making their rich pals richer off the backs of vets and taxpayers. Here in PA, the VA is our biggest federal employer. Trump’s mess is hitting us HARD, so that's why I'm reaching out to you, Derek. I need you to join us in the fight to save the VA and make sure that when vets can't get the care they need – they care they've EARNED – everyone knows exactly who's to blame. Will you please take two minutes to fill out our Save the VA Strategy Survey before midnight tonight? Thanks for your quick response, John ❤️

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111947438/558916556/-629675555?refcode=email_072225_getjobdone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTk5MjU3NmItNGI2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3kACO64U4G51OUFq_V3ZtpWglOkTsVzf_F_xaKsIr1E=) Friend, I grew up in a working class family. My parents were both teachers and my grandfather was a police officer. They taught me early on that you don’t stop fighting until you get the job done for your community. **As a mom of four, a small business owner, and a public servant, I strive to live by that principle every day.** That’s why I’ve always been proud to mentor my employees and help provide scholarships to continue their education. That’s why I fought hard as a state representative to lower costs, codify reproductive rights, build affordable housing, address homelessness, and invest in Oregon’s education system. And that’s why I’m working in Congress to protect healthcare, lower the cost of living, stand up for hard working families, and defend Americans from Trump and MAGA Republicans’ extreme agenda. But with Republicans passing Trump’s trash budget bill, this fight for our community is far from over. **[Like my parents and grandfather taught me, I’ll never give up on our fight for Oregonians. I’m all in to defend healthcare, improve our quality of life, and build a brighter future for the next generation — and I need your support. But with Republicans passing Trump’s trash budget bill, this fight for our community is far from over. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle Bynum | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. Did you see me on Stephen Colbert’s Late Show last week,
Derek?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8812%2E5257348%2EFItgVp ]Adam on Stephen Colbert’s Late Show

After countless attacks from Donald Trump and his MAGA allies, I had two
simple words to share with him:

Piss off.

Well, Derek, we
know Trump has thin skin, so it was no surprise that he came after me
again and again after this appearance.

But Trump can rant at me and try to smear me all he wants, and he won’t
deter me from my work to hold him accountable for his continuing
misconduct.

Ever since I led his first impeachment, he’s threatened me with jail and
prosecution and called me a traitor, accused me of treason, coerced House
Republicans to censure me and kick me off the Intel Committee. The list
goes on.

The attacks don’t scare me — but to respond and continue my work to hold
Trump accountable, I need the support of this team.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250722_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8812%2E5257348%2EFItgVp ]Will you chip in to have my back through all the attacks? Whether it’s
after a Late Show appearance or speaking on the floor of the Senate, Trump
is obsessed with my every move and will attack at every opportunity. With
your support, we can respond.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111947579/558916993/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEyZmE2ZGUtNGI2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T0Mhuzzbql5bsQDTbdkZiR4x3wlzczvtXSbzNPordMQ=)
Friend,

I’m still furious about Republicans passing Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – I know you are, too. It rips away Medicaid from millions, cuts food assistance for working families, and gives huge tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy.

While the GOP is busy playing politics, I’m focused on the people who sent me here. Every weekend, I come home to CA-45 to meet with small businesses, talk with families, and listen. I don’t take that responsibility lightly.

That’s why a few weeks ago, I sent you a survey to get your thoughts on what matters most to you and your family.

**[So instead of asking for a donation today, I’m asking for your input. Your answers help guide how I advocate for our community in Washington and on the campaign trail. Will you take a minute to fill out this survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111947580/558916994/-1882563727?refcode=em-7.22.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEyZmE2ZGUtNGI2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T0Mhuzzbql5bsQDTbdkZiR4x3wlzczvtXSbzNPordMQ=&emci=06a654d8-4967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f12fa6de-4b67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**
| **_SAMPLE QUESTION_**

_What concerns you most about this administration's recent actions?_
⚪ Gutting programs Americans rely on to give billionaires a tax break
⚪ Increased costs due to tariff plans
⚪ Attacks on our democracy
⚪ Threats to reproductive freedom and abortion access
⚪ Other | **[Begin the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111947581/558916995/-1882563727?refcode=em-7.22.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjEyZmE2ZGUtNGI2Ny1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T0Mhuzzbql5bsQDTbdkZiR4x3wlzczvtXSbzNPordMQ=&emci=06a654d8-4967-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=f12fa6de-4b67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=27336212)**

clean_body: | = Friend, I’m still furious about Republicans passing Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” – I know you are, too. It rips away Medicaid from millions, cuts food assistance for working families, and gives huge tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. While the GOP is busy playing politics, I’m focused on the people who sent me here. Every weekend, I come home to CA-45 to meet with small businesses, talk with families, and listen. I don’t take that responsibility lightly. That’s why a few weeks ago, I sent you a survey to get your thoughts on what matters most to you and your family. | SAMPLE QUESTION What concerns you most about this administration's recent actions? ⚪ Gutting programs Americans rely on to give billionaires a tax break ⚪ Increased costs due to tariff plans ⚪ Attacks on our democracy ⚪ Threats to reproductive freedom and abortion access ⚪ Other | Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. John cosponsored the Fix Our Forests Act to strengthen Colorado’s wildfire readiness as quickly as possible.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111947922/558918322/1435897075?refcode=email_072225_wildfire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODMxMWFhOS00ZDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W5UOAwv_z0op4tQPizFG84EUb8-qAg20wj6S4t-pYCc=&emci=3b6dc8af-4c63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=48311aa9-4d67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) Folks, western states like Colorado have long been prone to wildfires, but the effects of climate change — drier summers, prolonged droughts, and the buildup of dry underbrush — have intensified and extended our fire seasons. Now, wildfires today are far more catastrophic — growing larger, faster, and putting more Colorado communities at risk than ever before. **In the past seven years alone, Colorado has seen four of the five most dangerous wildfires in our state’s entire history.** _That means we need to adapt — fast._ **That’s why John is proud to cosponsor the _Fix Our Forests Act_ to expedite vegetation management, reduce fire hazards, and utilize prescribed burns to strengthen Colorado’s wildfire readiness as quickly as possible.** Amid all of the chaos and dysfunction in Washington, John is still committed to bringing people together and moving legislation forward that addresses the real challenges facing Coloradans. **The bottom line is, we need to act NOW to mitigate wildfires and protect our homes, businesses, and the environment before it’s too late.** This critical legislation has already passed the House. **The next step is getting this bill passed in the Senate, and we’re calling on John’s top supporters to amplify his message:[Please, if you’re with us, will you sign our petition calling on the Senate to pass John’s _Fix Our Forests Act_ and supercharge Colorado’s wildfire resilience? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111947923/558918323/-447217052?refcode=email_072225_wildfire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODMxMWFhOS00ZDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W5UOAwv_z0op4tQPizFG84EUb8-qAg20wj6S4t-pYCc=&emci=3b6dc8af-4c63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=48311aa9-4d67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111947924/558918324/-447217052?refcode=email_072225_wildfire&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODMxMWFhOS00ZDY3LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W5UOAwv_z0op4tQPizFG84EUb8-qAg20wj6S4t-pYCc=&emci=3b6dc8af-4c63-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=48311aa9-4d67-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715)

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Our organizing > their millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Republicans raised record-breaking sums last quarter |
#
---
Team, _Punchbowl News_ just reported that **Republican House Majority Leader Mike Johnson has raised a staggering $50 million to keep the GOP in power — _$18.65 million in just the last quarter alone._** He plans to funnel that money directly into the campaigns of vulnerable GOP incumbents, all to protect and expand his majority. They just passed their “One Big Beautiful Bill,” which would devastate Michiganders and people across the country. In Michigan alone, it could rip health care coverage away from hundreds of thousands of people, force rural hospitals to the brink of closure, slash food assistance, kill clean energy jobs, and drive up the cost of everything from electricity to housing. If they hold onto their majority, they’ll continue to push forward their cruel agenda and roll back progress. **This is what we’re up against, and it’s on all of us to stop them.** We’re fighting like hell and organizing in Michigan and beyond, holding Republicans accountable and working to elect leaders who will protect health care, defend abortion rights, and build an economy that works for working families. name: David Hogg
subject: You’ll never believe who I just called
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We talked about fear, courage, and the kind of leadership this moment demands.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250722-1&t=1&akid=2420%2E587540%2Eymm7ol)
Peter,
David Hogg here. I just got off the phone with one of my old teachers — and I can’t stop thinking about our conversation.
Every month, I try to personally thank as many of our grassroots supporters as I can. This time, one supporter stopped me in my tracks: my middle school teacher.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250722_1_teacher?refcode=em20250722-2420&amount=5&refcode2=2420_587540_ymm7ol&akid=2420%2E587540%2Eymm7ol)
She was one of those educators who have made a real impact. I would not be where I am today without her. And all these years later, it felt surreal to call and thank her for backing this movement.
She told me how upsetting it was to go through active-shooter drills with her students — how helpless and heartbreaking it felt. And honestly, it’s outrageous that teachers have to act as security guards, first responders, and therapists because the system refuses to change.
**It doesn't have to be this way, Peter.**
But the changes we need won’t come from the same broken system that got us here. It starts with electing young, brave leaders who _actually_ understand what’s at stake — and have the courage to do something about it.
**[Will you join our movement today by chipping in to help us elect the next generation of leaders? If you do, you might get a call from me too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250722_1_teacher?refcode=em20250722-2420&amount=5&refcode2=2420_587540_ymm7ol&akid=2420%2E587540%2Eymm7ol)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250722_1_teacher?amount=5&refcode=em20250722-2420&refcode2=2420_587540_ymm7ol&akid=2420%2E587540%2Eymm7ol)**
Thank you for being in this fight,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250722-1&t=2&refcode2=2420_587540_ymm7ol&akid=2420%2E587540%2Eymm7ol)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2420%2E587540%2Eymm7ol)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2420%2E587540%2Eymm7ol)

And all these years later, it felt surreal to call and thank her for backing this movement. She told me how upsetting it was to go through active-shooter drills with her students — how helpless and heartbreaking it felt. And honestly, it’s outrageous that teachers have to act as security guards, first responders, and therapists because the system refuses to change. It doesn't have to be this way, Peter. But the changes we need won’t come from the same broken system that got us here. It starts with electing young, brave leaders who actually understand what’s at stake — and have the courage to do something about it. Thank you for being in this fight, David Hogg

subject: My ‘what’

body:

It's important for us to hold the corruption of this administration accountable, but we also have to have an alternative vision.

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: Steve Hilton is cozying up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Katie Porter has always fought for working families and everyday Californians, and she’s not stopping now.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39916%2E3422442%2Ev7ndwv)
Peter,
It’s no secret how much Steve Hilton, our top Republican opponent, loves Donald Trump. Take a look:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250722_1_ak?refcode=em20250722-39916&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=39916_3422442_v7ndwv&akid=39916%2E3422442%2Ev7ndwv)
What Steve calls “delivering promises”, we call disastrous for the people of California. Millions will be kicked off their health insurance, federal funds held up at Trump’s request, and immigrant communities are under attack.
We need a governor who will protect California from Trump’s disastrous agenda, not double down on it. Katie Porter has always fought for working families and everyday Californians, and she’s not stopping now.
But here’s the truth: 48% of Californians say they’re open to voting for a Republican governor. If we don’t act now, we risk losing everything we’ve fought for.
**[Peter, can you help Katie stand up to Steve Hilton and Donald Trump by donating $5 today? Your contribution will help us connect with voters in every corner of California, and build the coalition we need to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250722_1_ak?refcode=em20250722-39916&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=39916_3422442_v7ndwv&akid=39916%2E3422442%2Ev7ndwv)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250722_1_ak?refcode=em20250722-39916&refcode2=39916_3422442_v7ndwv&akid=39916%2E3422442%2Ev7ndwv)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250722-39916&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39916_3422442_v7ndwv&akid=39916%2E3422442%2Ev7ndwv)**
---

name: Team Jena
subject: Election denialism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250722-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250722-email]
Peter –
In June, a man with a history of election denialism was arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail into a Colorado election office.
Let that sink in.
Acts of political violence have been inspired by the dangerous conspiracy theories pushed by Donald Trump and his extremist allies. Jena was on MSNBC to discuss this and the other attacks on democracy that have happened since 2020. Watch her interview here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250722-email]
We cannot normalize this. We cannot look away. And we cannot allow those who incite violence against our democracy to go unchallenged.
Jena Griswold knows this fight better than anyone. As Secretary of State, she has faced death threats for standing up to Trump’s Big Lie. She took action to protect election workers, secure voting equipment, and make sure every voter — Democrat, Republican, and Unaffiliated —can cast their ballot in a safe and secure election.
Now, Jena is running for Attorney General to continue that work. She will hold those who attack our democracy accountable. But she needs your help to win.
Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help elect Jena Griswold as Colorado’s next Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250722-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250722-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg-video?refcode=250722-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
